Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Will you take the to tell us what you think? Do you approve of Trump's Administration? President Trump's Administration is critical to the successful implementation of America-first policies. Your valuable approval is needed to ensure that each member of Trump's Admin is America-first and aligned with the 47th President's agenda to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. ** Thank you! name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: re: Trump’s reckless tariffs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Virginians are facing rising prices. Virginia businesses are struggling. Virginians are losing their jobs.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106527704/541804024/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY5ZjVlMDctMzMyMi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P6psjsfpWtFjniKf0T9FB6eWM4Dm3xIsO_-qWB0XSJw=)
---
| Peter,

When President Trump announced massive, global tariffs earlier this month, the stock market took a nose dive, retirement savings cratered, the bond market began to falter, and Trump relented a little bit.

But only just a bit — he left 25% tariffs in place on some goods from Mexico and Canada, put 10% tariffs in place on some of our closest trading partners, ratcheted up tariffs on China to 145%, created exemptions for some companies’ products, and left others to question how to survive if their businesses buy from or sell to China. These tariffs are a tax on working Virginians and small businesses.

Amid the chaos, one large company in Virginia announced this week that it would be laying off 250-350 workers, citing “the impact of tariffs” among the reasons for the layoffs.

Virginians are facing rising prices. Virginia businesses are struggling. Virginians are losing their jobs.

**_But what has my opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, said?_ She thinks tariffs are “good” and will “benefit” Virginians.**

I couldn’t disagree more. We can’t trust her to look out for Virginians or Virginia’s economy. She’ll say anything to get in Trump’s good graces, even if it means selling out Virginians in the process.

As Governor, I will work to lower costs for Virginia families, not drive them up. I’ll stand with our farmers, manufacturers, and small business owners—who will be among the first to feel the pain from Trump’s economic chaos.

[_**But we need your help. Can I count on you to contribute today so we can flip Virginia blue this November?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106527705/541804025/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-25_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY5ZjVlMDctMzMyMi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P6psjsfpWtFjniKf0T9FB6eWM4Dm3xIsO_-qWB0XSJw=)

In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. body:
grateful to have you in this fight

null, ever since I reached out to share that I’m officially running for Senate in Michigan, I’ve been overwhelmed by how many people have pitched in to make sure we hit the ground running.
---
**But I just got an update from my team, and we’re still short of reaching our critical $1 million launch goal. Republicans and their billionaire buddies will dump millions into this race at the drop of a hat, so we can’t afford to miss our first major goal of the campaign.**
**[Will you give $5 or more now to help us close this gap, win in Michigan, and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106528261/541835959/-531186435?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk74-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU2NWVmYS0zZDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lkb9-mTjZ3ZY6W2cv5CjHs_rN6wUea4-beM-x_w0hw=)**
I can’t tell you how grateful I am to have you by my side in this fight. Thank you.
Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
Date: Tues, April 22, 2025 at 8:05 a.m.
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106528262/541835960/-1886691151?refcode=jtk74-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU2NWVmYS0zZDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lkb9-mTjZ3ZY6W2cv5CjHs_rN6wUea4-beM-x_w0hw=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106528263/541835961/-531186435?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk74-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU2NWVmYS0zZDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lkb9-mTjZ3ZY6W2cv5CjHs_rN6wUea4-beM-x_w0hw=)
Hi, friend – this is Congresswoman Haley Stevens writing to you with exciting news: Today, I’m launching my campaign for Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat.
Winning in Michigan is essential to regaining our Democratic Senate majority, and right now, The Cook Political Report is rating our race as a “toss up.” That means we’re _already_ one of the GOP’s top targets for defeat. Just last year, they spent nearly $80 million trying to buy Michigan’s Senate seat and came up only 0.3% short, so I need your early support to win.
**Friend, I want to tell you a bit more about myself and why I’m running. _[But if that’s all you needed to hear and you’re ready to get to work, please chip in whatever you can now to help hit our $1 million launch goal and become a Founding Donor of my campaign to keep Michigan blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106528264/541835962/-531186435?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk74-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU2NWVmYS0zZDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lkb9-mTjZ3ZY6W2cv5CjHs_rN6wUea4-beM-x_w0hw=)_ **
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106528265/541835963/-531186435?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk74-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU2NWVmYS0zZDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lkb9-mTjZ3ZY6W2cv5CjHs_rN6wUea4-beM-x_w0hw=)
---
I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander. I learned the value of hard work by watching my parents – who owned their own landscaping business – build things. Heavy machinery equipment, bobcats, plows, dirt, grease, and grime – it was all part of my childhood.
Later in life, I got the call to give back to the state I love during a time of great uncertainty: the Great Recession. **I can’t tell you how unfathomable it was to hear the words “bankruptcy” and "General Motors" in the same sentence.** So I stepped up to do my part and served as chief of staff for the Auto Rescue initiative under President Obama.
We brought workers, corporations, and union leadership around the same table to stabilize the auto industry. On Friday nights, I’d stay in the office until the late evening to return every call from every Michigander who called worried about the future. _In the end, we saved 200,000 Michigan jobs._
I can’t help but see parallels between then and now as we find ourselves in another moment of great uncertainty, thanks to the chaos forced on us by Donald Trump and his billionaire buddy Elon Musk.
People are rightly concerned about rising costs, shoot-from-the-hip tariffs, and attacks on our personal freedoms. **Michiganders need a fighter in their corner – and that’s who I’ve been my entire life. **
**_[If you’re ready to fight with me – to win this battleground race, take back the Senate majority, and stop Trump – can I count on your grassroots donation now toward my $1 million campaign launch goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106528266/541835964/-531186435?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk74-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU2NWVmYS0zZDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lkb9-mTjZ3ZY6W2cv5CjHs_rN6wUea4-beM-x_w0hw=)_ **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106528267/541835965/-531186435?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=jtk74-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU2NWVmYS0zZDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lkb9-mTjZ3ZY6W2cv5CjHs_rN6wUea4-beM-x_w0hw=)

I know a thing or two about winning competitive races when the odds are stacked against me. Back in 2018, I flipped a battleground House seat from red to blue and helped usher in a Democratic majority to serve as a check on the Trump administration. I was also just recognized as the most effective Michigan congressperson in the House.
I’m taking that tenacity straight to the campaign trail. But I need you with me, friend. Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate, Mike Rogers, is running _again_ – and we know Republicans will spend tens of millions of dollars to buy this Senate seat for Trump.
**That’s why we must build the strongest possible campaign from day one: _[Help me hit this $1 million campaign launch goal by making a gift of $5 or whatever you can spare right now. With your support, we’ll win Michigan’s open Senate seat, take back the Senate for Democrats, and stop the chaos and uncertainty of the Trump administration.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106528271/541835969/-531186435?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk74-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU2NWVmYS0zZDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lkb9-mTjZ3ZY6W2cv5CjHs_rN6wUea4-beM-x_w0hw=)_ **
Thank you for being a part of this team right from the get-go. I’m so grateful for your support.

Haley
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106528272/541835970/-1886691151?refcode=jtk74-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU2NWVmYS0zZDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lkb9-mTjZ3ZY6W2cv5CjHs_rN6wUea4-beM-x_w0hw=) | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106528273/541835971/-1886691151?refcode=jtk74-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU2NWVmYS0zZDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lkb9-mTjZ3ZY6W2cv5CjHs_rN6wUea4-beM-x_w0hw=)

Thank you,
Haley

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/iQDPcvNxkkq4y8DRPxW_EQ2?unsubscribedata=zujs%2BZOqKGoFy%2BQ%2F9IzqUedrXruWX7sPdF0qVrv1hbdq9jb1OSK1hclydhZ12PYRIOmHsc0vQhR8w9Z%2BTQyreB3Xib8VcwB%2F7j%2B2X%2BlrEH7xyxKJ5aznl0QYOOyVfIRUSWCpIY0lfxMioE6DisdGgAKR01LXMcpx3JWBiy3BKpe1UADoKG2OhqBapBLqQ%2FXvjBX6KNhe0yggoAdYZlTZ%2BmFlWSCb1UWYog2yKJ5R8v2KHwWSesIc0i0xqEwbVQtiJ3%2F5vyaKYhPhe9GU9btdzYpAFzIk3yZb9Pf3eXKORv3Bis4dU5N%2FZlRpNFokgBF%2FpujGSi19rS50TgYFlc0KcHSKREbD8lIIr%2BMS2Eryob7lBgPDCSfgErDpyVtB6RYKz4NXllQlL6q0uVYFfujMeHfdkYx8e7hP9BaeJFyoG68%3D).

clean_body: grateful to have you in this fight null, ever since I reached out to share that I’m officially running for Senate in Michigan, I’ve been overwhelmed by how many people have pitched in to make sure we hit the ground running. But I just got an update from my team, and we’re still short of reaching our critical $1 million launch goal. Republicans and their billionaire buddies will dump millions into this race at the drop of a hat, so we can’t afford to miss our first major goal of the campaign. = I can’t tell you how grateful I am to have you by my side in this fight. Thank you. Haley Stevens \---------- Forwarded message ---------- Date: Tues, April 22, 2025 at 8:05 a.m. From: Haley Stevens Subject: I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat | | | = = Hi, friend – this is Congresswoman Haley Stevens writing to you with exciting news: Today, I’m launching my campaign for Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat. Winning in Michigan is essential to regaining our Democratic Senate majority, and right now, The Cook Political Report is rating our race as a “toss up.” That means we’re already one of the GOP’s top targets for defeat. Just last year, they spent nearly $80 million trying to buy Michigan’s Senate seat and came up only 0.3% short, so I need your early support to win. Friend, I want to tell you a bit more about myself and why I’m running. = | | = I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander. I learned the value of hard work by watching my parents – who owned their own landscaping business – build things. Heavy machinery equipment, bobcats, plows, dirt, grease, and grime – it was all part of my childhood. Later in life, I got the call to give back to the state I love during a time of great uncertainty: the Great Recession. I can’t tell you how unfathomable it was to hear the words “bankruptcy” and "General Motors" in the same sentence. So I stepped up to do my part and served as chief of staff for the Auto Rescue initiative under President Obama. We brought workers, corporations, and union leadership around the same table to stabilize the auto industry. On Friday nights, I’d stay in the office until the late evening to return every call from every Michigander who called worried about the future. In the end, we saved 200,000 Michigan jobs. I can’t help but see parallels between then and now as we find ourselves in another moment of great uncertainty, thanks to the chaos forced on us by Donald Trump and his billionaire buddy Elon Musk. People are rightly concerned about rising costs, shoot-from-the-hip tariffs, and attacks on our personal freedoms. Michiganders need a fighter in their corner – and that’s who I’ve been my entire life. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I know a thing or two about winning competitive races when the odds are stacked against me. Back in 2018, I flipped a battleground House seat from red to blue and helped usher in a Democratic majority to serve as a check on the Trump administration. I was also just recognized as the most effective Michigan congressperson in the House. I’m taking that tenacity straight to the campaign trail. But I need you with me, friend. Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate, Mike Rogers, is running again – and we know Republicans will spend tens of millions of dollars to buy this Senate seat for Trump. That’s why we must build the strongest possible campaign from day one: = Thank you for being a part of this team right from the get-go. I’m so grateful for your support. Haley A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. = | | | = You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign. Thank you, Haley

name: Tom Fitton
subject: ‘Peanut the Squirrel’ Update
body:
Thousands of Biden Era Unaccompanied Alien Children Missing

[INSIDE JW]

AUTHORITIES PLANNED TO EUTHANIZE PEANUT THE SQUIRREL BEFORE SEIZING
HIM

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=35053&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1DS1phRDF4ZjFNYyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=1b396f2cbe39440436424603455f686140f2107529f3d15eeff689553067e0f7]

We have learned a good bit more about New York State’s authoritarian
response to a complaint about a pet squirrel and raccoon.

We received 163 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=35026&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3RhZ3MvbWFoYXItcGVhbnV0LXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=99bc733eb8054c4a13aa8f806b28a8071b96297d51890b43195ed84bb8909cd7]
of records from the New York State Department of Environmental
Conservation in a Freedom of Information Law (FOIL) lawsuit that
showed authorities had planned to euthanize a squirrel named
“Peanut” and a raccoon named “Fred” before they were seized
from Pine City, NY, resident Mark Longo.

The incident report from the raid on Longo’s home shows that 12 law
enforcement personnel were involved in the October 30, 2024, operation
to seize Peanut and Fred.

The records also show that Peanut was decapitated for rabies analysis
after a wildlife biologist who seized the animal from Longo claimed to
have been bitten on the thumb.

The records were produced as part of two FOIL requests filed on
November 6, 2024. The Department of Environmental Conservation
initially failed to comply, but a Judicial Watch lawsuit filed last
month seems to have expedited the release of the records (_Judicial
Watch Inc. v Sean Mahar, Interim Commissioner, New York State
Department of Environmental Conservation_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=34750&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbWFoYXItcGVhbnV0LWNvbXBsYWludC05MDI1OTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3b6e0bfce8b20ee0ee5107982ff9b23f3de854c155f3b930705dbdbc25e673ce]
(No. 902596-25)).

In the New York State Department of Environmental Conservation’s
“Incident Report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=35028&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbWFoYXItcGVhbnV0LXJlY29yZHMtOTAyNTk2LXBncy0xLTIxL13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c5e016b257ebd2b1596850f909274ce3b6c4d985ed846fc849cce98ee9f05859
dated October 24, 2024, related to the raid on Longo’s home in which
Peanut and Fred were seized, the officers redacted the name of the
“complainant,” as well as three other “associated persons.”
The form indicates that two items of “wildlife” property were
seized to be “held” – including a “live raccoon” and a
“live gray squirrel.” It notes that both animals were “seized
and transferred to [redacted]” on October 30, 2024. They also note
that a firearm, model CT4-2A (which is a semi-automatic 9mm AR-15
style rifle produced by Delta Level Defense) was seized and sent to a
lab on October 30, 2024. The form lists the “value” of the animals
and firearm as “$0.00.”

In the “narrative” portion of the form, officers indicate, “R8
dispatch and R8 wildlife email have received multiple complaints of
unlawfully possessed raccoons, and an unlawfully possessed squirrel
that were posted to several social media outlets.”

The incident report indicates there were “0” victims, but “2
suspects” in the case.

Further along in the incident report, the officer details preparations
for the squirrel raid:

> 10/22/24 I was forwarded an email on my approved day off from
> [redacted] regarding assisting with a possible search warrant to
> collect the unlawfully possessed raccoons. We made arrangements to
> discuss the matter further on 10/23/24 at the R8 bloc meeting.
>
> 10/23/24 I met with [redacted] and discussed the basics of this case
> and made a plan for [redacted] and I to meet on 10/24/24 a [sic] the
> R8 office to begin working on the case file. I advised [redacted] of
> the case and that I would be assisting the uniform officers with a
> possible search warrant to collect the raccoons.
>
> 10/24/24 I met with [redacted] at the R8 office and began
> researching the social media accounts of suspect Mark Longo. I also
> advised [redacted] of the case and to relay any new complaints to me
> or [redacted]. I spoke to [redacted] and [redacted] and made a plan
> to work the case with the uniformed officers. I advised wildlife
> staff of DLE’s [Division of Law Enforcement’s] involvement and
> to forward any inquiries regarding the case to me or [redacted].
>
> I observed several videos on TicToc [sic], Facebook, and Instagram
> related to the suspected unlawful possession of squirrels and
> raccoons on the accounts held by Mark Longo.

Further along in the incident report, the following narrative appears:

> On 10/30/2024 from approximately 1035 hours to approximately 1400
> hours I assisted with execution of a search warrant at 37 Beckwith
> Road. ECI [Environmental Conservation Investigations] [redacted] and
> I took photographs with the OSCR360 and DSLR camera. 70 photographs
> were taken with the OSCR360 and 20 Photographs were taken with the
> DSLR camera. I also assisted with searching the residence. I
> observed an unlawfully possessed raccoon and squirrel within the
> residence.

In another portion of the report, an officer writes:

> On 10/30/24: I assisted with the execution of a search warrant at 37
> Beckwith rd Pine City. I conducted a safety sweep of the house with
> [redacted] securing multiple firearms. I also completed the evidence
> chain of custody for the firearms and animals that were seized.
> Finally I completed a sketch of the house.

In another portion of the report, an officer discusses at great length
how he had multiple complaints about “allegations of unlawful
possession of a squirrel and a raccoon.” The officer notes that
Longo “did not possess a wildlife rehabilitators license.”

Further along in the narrative, the officer writes that on October 29,
2024, before the raid:

> I provided [redacted] with a summary of the case and then requested
> their suggestion on what they would like done with any wildlife
> located during the investigation. [Redacted] advised that if any of
> the wild animals had contact with humans, they would most likely
> need to be submitted for rabies testing. [Redacted] advised that
> they utilize the Elmira Animal Control for euthanasia and submission
> of rabies testing and suggestion I contact them.

The reporting officer notes that after the squirrel was found,
“Longo began pleading to not take the squirrel:”

> I was advised that while capturing the squirrel, while wearing latex
> gloves under heavy duty leather gloves, Wildlife Biologist
> [redacted] was bit [sic] on the thumb. [Redacted] stated that the
> bite didn’t appear to break the latex glove, but wasn’t sure.
> [Redacted] showed me the abrasion on her thumb.

The officer writes that he called the Chemung County Health Department
to advise them:

> [A] squirrel and raccoon that cohabitated a common living area, were
> confiscated during the investigation. [Redacted] was advised that
> the squirrel had bitten a DEC employee, that the incident and
> investigation is high profile and then was asked if the animals
> should be tested for rabies since the raccoon is a rabies vector
> species. [Redacted] stated that both animals should be tested as a
> precaution as she didn’t want to chance it.

> At approximately 1404 hrs, I spoke to [redacted] via cell phone to
> advised [sic] that I would be bringing a squirrel and raccoon to the
> Elmira Animal Control that needed to be euthanized and tested for
> rabies as per the direction as per the direction of the County
> Health Department.
>
> ***
>
> Upon arrival to the Animal Control Office, [redacted] advised that
> he had called [redacted] again to reiterate the specifics of the
> case and to emphasis [sic] that the case is high profile. [Redacted]
> stated that [redacted] said it didn’t change anything and that the
> animals would need to be tested.
>
> [Redacted] and I met with [redacted] and brought the raccoon and
> squirrel into the facility. I assisted [redacted] and another Animal
> Control Officer in transferring the raccoon and squirrel into
> different enclosures so that Detota would be able to euthanize them
> utilizing drugs that she is certified to use.

Another officer’s statement indicates that there were “four
complainants” regarding Longo possessing the squirrel and raccoon.
On October 27, 2024, an individual claiming to be one of the
complainants called the officer and “was able to corroborate certain
information from the complaint, and social media posts made by Mark
Longo online. The caller did not wish to give a written statement and
wished to remain anonymous for fear of retaliation.”

Another officer, who organized the raid on Longo’s home, reveals
that at least 12 law enforcement personnel were involved in the raid
to seize Peanut and Fred, including: “3 DEC [Department of
Environmental Conversation] Investigators, 1 Investigator Lieutenant,
4 Uniform ECOs [Environmental Control Officers], 1 Uniform Lieutenant,
and 3 Bureau of Wildlife staff.”

Another officer’s statement indicates that Fred the Raccoon was
found hidden in a piece of luggage in Longo’s house and Peanut the
Squirrel was found in a bathtub in the house.

Despite the assertion in the incident report that the latex glove of
the wildlife biologist who seized Peanut was not broken, a “Rabies
Report Form
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=35029&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbWFoYXItcGVhbnV0LXJlY29yZHMtOTAyNTk2LXBnLTIyL13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=30d1f6feea44ff381cc4ea17d665c94cd191b22ceff0b055d362a9c8b7b4b221
claimed that the “skin was broken” of the individual. The report
notes that “Animal decap requested on 10/30/24” and that the
“Decap” was done by the city. [“Decap” refers to decapitation,
which is reportedly done in New York State so that the head can be
sent for rabies testing.]

On October 22, 2024, an individual whose name is redacted, sends an
email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=35030&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbWFoYXItcGVhbnV0LXJlY29yZHMtOTAyNTk2LXBnLTI2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8ce68c5ea1b5fc66721acdb9874afedad626b3449b5a7799d65a84b8b3b47dc2]
complaining about Longo’s videos involving ‘Fred the Raccoon’
under the heading “Raccoon Animal Abuse.” The sender of the email
states:

> I’d like to report an account I follow online. Mark Longo in Pine
> City, NY. This man takes videos farm animals without water or
> shelter. He has been showing his squirrel, Peanut in a dirty
> disgusting room. He’s been doing [TikTok Live] all week. [He’s]
> got a pretty large raccoon in what appears to be his kitchen in a
> small cage. It looks like a very small dog crate. He takes it out
> during his lives [sic] and puts him back in. This is no way for an
> animal to live. I also believe it’s illegal to keep a pet raccoon
> in NY. He said its name is Fred.

On November 14, 2024, lawyers representing Longo and Bittner sent
a records preservation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=35031&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbWFoYXItcGVhbnV0LXJlY29yZHMtOTAyNTk2LXBncy0zOS00Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=33c691bfb1cea116d5a1cac727e53c0322e4ef62f1eca6f8e17ddbd7753ca253]
request letter to the New York State Department of Environmental
Conservation and other state agencies, advising them that litigation
was likely relating to the seizure of Peanut and Fred and to preserve
records relevant to the October 30 raid. The letter also called for
the preservation of the bodies of Peanut and Fred.

A copy of the search warrant
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=35032&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbWFoYXItcGVhbnV0LXJlY29yZHMtOTAyNTk2LXBncy00My00NC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=1235e08334cc13c8a12e4c6927f6de09012b9353897bab6c89e1cece53934c23]
signed by Chemung County Court Judge Richard Rich, Jr. and executed at
Longo’s home indicates that the New York State Environmental
Conservation Police official who sought the search warrant was
Investigator Joshua J. Crain.

“They treated me like I was a terrorist. They treated this raid as
if I was a drug dealer. They ransacked my house for five hours,”
Longo told the _New York Post_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=35033&F=T&&hash=f4a1b48cb2de53255a1f8d64889c62aa9e08190f40b6da9397b0c347cb90b7f0.
_Peanut,
also known as P’Nut, was popular on social media.

New York State bureaucrats did not want to turn over these documents,
but our lawsuit forced their hand. The documents show an abuse of
power where 12 officers were sent in on a raid to seize Peanut and
Fred, who the bureaucrats decided beforehand would be killed. These
documents show the killing of Peanut the Squirrel and Fred the Racoon
was the result of pure government abuse and insanity.

The event sparked
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=34752&F=T&&hash=e6be8477b4a4ae904fae5adbfc4f34ed0a5518765a8cd8494f52f9c8a2a7dfac]
public outrage. President Trump’s supporters “denounced the death
of Peanut the Squirrel as a case of government overreach.” JD Vance,
campaigning for President Trump, said
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=35034&F=T&&hash=7fe23b9e907f24c3e5ed9c14bb140bcdacb61ab8296235d7e58b7bf5d779636b]
that then-candidate Trump was “fired up” about Peanut being
euthanized.

JUDICIAL WATCH SEEKS U.S. IMMIGRATION AND CUSTOMS ENFORCEMENT PLAN TO
FIND ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT MINORS

We’re asking for details on the many thousands of minors who were
victims of President Biden’s inhumane border policies.
Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog explains
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=35042&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWNlLXBsYW4taWxsZWdhbC1pbW1pZ3JhbnQtbWlub3JzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b269dfe28067895262599593976093ac19e2affab8a18b86e4d8a0e50799393f]
that they may be victims of abuse or perpetrators of crimes against
Americans.

> The Biden administration failed to monitor hundreds of thousands of
> illegal immigrant minors who entered the United States through
> Mexico and tens of thousands simply vanished from the government’s
> radar, according to a federal audit
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73603&L=33289&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub2lnLmRocy5nb3Yvc2l0ZXMvZGVmYXVsdC9maWxlcy9hc3NldHMvMjAyNC0wOC9PSUctMjQtNDYtQXVnMjQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4d61597627457bec7b1d7021be26b5395e45ebaa997f8595d7568f4e330247ac].
> Judicial Watch has covered the scandal extensively and is
> investigating the Trump administration’s plan to locate the young
> migrants, known as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC). A few weeks
> ago, several media outlets reported that the Trump administration
> directed Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to track down
> UACs to, among other things, prevent them from being trafficked or
> exploited. As the “premier” Homeland Security law enforcement
> agency created after 9/11 to safeguard the nation and preserve
> national security, ICE is responsible for monitoring the location
> and status of all UAC inside the U.S. but somehow the agency lost
> track of around half a million.
>
> This is important since many of the minors have been victims of
> abuse and forced labor but also because some have committed violent
> crimes after being released by the government into American
> communities. This includes a teen from El Salvador who raped and
> murdered
>

clean_body: Thousands of Biden Era Unaccompanied Alien Children Missing [INSIDE JW] AUTHORITIES PLANNED TO EUTHANIZE PEANUT THE SQUIRREL BEFORE SEIZING HIM [] We have learned a good bit more about New York State’s authoritarian response to a complaint about a pet squirrel and raccoon. We received 163 pages [] of records from the New York State Department of Environmental Conservation in a Freedom of Information Law (FOIL) lawsuit that showed authorities had planned to euthanize a squirrel named “Peanut” and a raccoon named “Fred” before they were seized from Pine City, NY, resident Mark Longo. The incident report from the raid on Longo’s home shows that 12 law enforcement personnel were involved in the October 30, 2024, operation to seize Peanut and Fred. The records also show that Peanut was decapitated for rabies analysis after a wildlife biologist who seized the animal from Longo claimed to have been bitten on the thumb. The records were produced as part of two FOIL requests filed on November 6, 2024. The Department of Environmental Conservation initially failed to comply, but a Judicial Watch lawsuit filed last month seems to have expedited the release of the records (Judicial Watch Inc. v Sean Mahar, Interim Commissioner, New York State Department of Environmental Conservation [] (No. 902596-25)). In the New York State Department of Environmental Conservation’s “Incident Report [ dated October 24, 2024, related to the raid on Longo’s home in which Peanut and Fred were seized, the officers redacted the name of the “complainant,” as well as three other “associated persons.” The form indicates that two items of “wildlife” property were seized to be “held” – including a “live raccoon” and a “live gray squirrel.” It notes that both animals were “seized and transferred to [redacted]” on October 30, 2024. They also note that a firearm, model CT4-2A (which is a semi-automatic 9mm AR-15 style rifle produced by Delta Level Defense) was seized and sent to a lab on October 30, 2024. The form lists the “value” of the animals and firearm as “$0.00.” In the “narrative” portion of the form, officers indicate, “R8 dispatch and R8 wildlife email have received multiple complaints of unlawfully possessed raccoons, and an unlawfully possessed squirrel that were posted to several social media outlets.” The incident report indicates there were “0” victims, but “2 suspects” in the case. Further along in the incident report, the officer details preparations for the squirrel raid: 10/22/24 I was forwarded an email on my approved day off from [redacted] regarding assisting with a possible search warrant to collect the unlawfully possessed raccoons. We made arrangements to discuss the matter further on 10/23/24 at the R8 bloc meeting. 10/23/24 I met with [redacted] and discussed the basics of this case and made a plan for [redacted] and I to meet on 10/24/24 a [sic] the R8 office to begin working on the case file. I advised [redacted] of the case and that I would be assisting the uniform officers with a possible search warrant to collect the raccoons. 10/24/24 I met with [redacted] at the R8 office and began researching the social media accounts of suspect Mark Longo. I also advised [redacted] of the case and to relay any new complaints to me or [redacted]. I spoke to [redacted] and [redacted] and made a plan to work the case with the uniformed officers. I advised wildlife staff of DLE’s [Division of Law Enforcement’s] involvement and to forward any inquiries regarding the case to me or [redacted]. I observed several videos on TicToc [sic], Facebook, and Instagram related to the suspected unlawful possession of squirrels and raccoons on the accounts held by Mark Longo. Further along in the incident report, the following narrative appears: On 10/30/2024 from approximately 1035 hours to approximately 1400 hours I assisted with execution of a search warrant at 37 Beckwith Road. ECI [Environmental Conservation Investigations] [redacted] and I took photographs with the OSCR360 and DSLR camera. 70 photographs were taken with the OSCR360 and 20 Photographs were taken with the DSLR camera. I also assisted with searching the residence. I observed an unlawfully possessed raccoon and squirrel within the residence. In another portion of the report, an officer writes: On 10/30/24: I assisted with the execution of a search warrant at 37 Beckwith rd Pine City. I conducted a safety sweep of the house with [redacted] securing multiple firearms. I also completed the evidence chain of custody for the firearms and animals that were seized. Finally I completed a sketch of the house. In another portion of the report, an officer discusses at great length how he had multiple complaints about “allegations of unlawful possession of a squirrel and a raccoon.” The officer notes that Longo “did not possess a wildlife rehabilitators license.” Further along in the narrative, the officer writes that on October 29, 2024, before the raid: I provided [redacted] with a summary of the case and then requested their suggestion on what they would like done with any wildlife located during the investigation. [Redacted] advised that if any of the wild animals had contact with humans, they would most likely need to be submitted for rabies testing. [Redacted] advised that they utilize the Elmira Animal Control for euthanasia and submission of rabies testing and suggestion I contact them. The reporting officer notes that after the squirrel was found, “Longo began pleading to not take the squirrel:” I was advised that while capturing the squirrel, while wearing latex gloves under heavy duty leather gloves, Wildlife Biologist [redacted] was bit [sic] on the thumb. [Redacted] stated that the bite didn’t appear to break the latex glove, but wasn’t sure. [Redacted] showed me the abrasion on her thumb. The officer writes that he called the Chemung County Health Department to advise them: [A] squirrel and raccoon that cohabitated a common living area, were confiscated during the investigation. [Redacted] was advised that the squirrel had bitten a DEC employee, that the incident and investigation is high profile and then was asked if the animals should be tested for rabies since the raccoon is a rabies vector species. [Redacted] stated that both animals should be tested as a precaution as she didn’t want to chance it. At approximately 1404 hrs, I spoke to [redacted] via cell phone to advised [sic] that I would be bringing a squirrel and raccoon to the Elmira Animal Control that needed to be euthanized and tested for rabies as per the direction as per the direction of the County Health Department. *** Upon arrival to the Animal Control Office, [redacted] advised that he had called [redacted] again to reiterate the specifics of the case and to emphasis [sic] that the case is high profile. [Redacted] stated that [redacted] said it didn’t change anything and that the animals would need to be tested. [Redacted] and I met with [redacted] and brought the raccoon and squirrel into the facility. I assisted [redacted] and another Animal Control Officer in transferring the raccoon and squirrel into different enclosures so that Detota would be able to euthanize them utilizing drugs that she is certified to use. Another officer’s statement indicates that there were “four complainants” regarding Longo possessing the squirrel and raccoon. On October 27, 2024, an individual claiming to be one of the complainants called the officer and “was able to corroborate certain information from the complaint, and social media posts made by Mark Longo online. The caller did not wish to give a written statement and wished to remain anonymous for fear of retaliation.” Another officer, who organized the raid on Longo’s home, reveals that at least 12 law enforcement personnel were involved in the raid to seize Peanut and Fred, including: “3 DEC [Department of Environmental Conversation] Investigators, 1 Investigator Lieutenant, 4 Uniform ECOs [Environmental Control Officers], 1 Uniform Lieutenant, and 3 Bureau of Wildlife staff.” Another officer’s statement indicates that Fred the Raccoon was found hidden in a piece of luggage in Longo’s house and Peanut the Squirrel was found in a bathtub in the house. Despite the assertion in the incident report that the latex glove of the wildlife biologist who seized Peanut was not broken, a “Rabies Report Form [ claimed that the “skin was broken” of the individual. The report notes that “Animal decap requested on 10/30/24” and that the “Decap” was done by the city. [“Decap” refers to decapitation, which is reportedly done in New York State so that the head can be sent for rabies testing.] On October 22, 2024, an individual whose name is redacted, sends an email [] complaining about Longo’s videos involving ‘Fred the Raccoon’ under the heading “Raccoon Animal Abuse.” The sender of the email states: I’d like to report an account I follow online. Mark Longo in Pine City, NY. This man takes videos farm animals without water or shelter. He has been showing his squirrel, Peanut in a dirty disgusting room. He’s been doing [TikTok Live] all week. [He’s] got a pretty large raccoon in what appears to be his kitchen in a small cage. It looks like a very small dog crate. He takes it out during his lives [sic] and puts him back in. This is no way for an animal to live. I also believe it’s illegal to keep a pet raccoon in NY. He said its name is Fred. On November 14, 2024, lawyers representing Longo and Bittner sent a records preservation [] request letter to the New York State Department of Environmental Conservation and other state agencies, advising them that litigation was likely relating to the seizure of Peanut and Fred and to preserve records relevant to the October 30 raid. The letter also called for the preservation of the bodies of Peanut and Fred. A copy of the search warrant [] signed by Chemung County Court Judge Richard Rich, Jr. and executed at Longo’s home indicates that the New York State Environmental Conservation Police official who sought the search warrant was Investigator Joshua J. Crain. “They treated me like I was a terrorist. They treated this raid as if I was a drug dealer. They ransacked my house for five hours,” Longo told the New York Post [. Peanut, also known as P’Nut, was popular on social media. New York State bureaucrats did not want to turn over these documents, but our lawsuit forced their hand. The documents show an abuse of power where 12 officers were sent in on a raid to seize Peanut and Fred, who the bureaucrats decided beforehand would be killed. These documents show the killing of Peanut the Squirrel and Fred the Racoon was the result of pure government abuse and insanity. The event sparked [] public outrage. President Trump’s supporters “denounced the death of Peanut the Squirrel as a case of government overreach.” JD Vance, campaigning for President Trump, said [] that then-candidate Trump was “fired up” about Peanut being euthanized. JUDICIAL WATCH SEEKS U.S. IMMIGRATION AND CUSTOMS ENFORCEMENT PLAN TO FIND ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT MINORS We’re asking for details on the many thousands of minors who were victims of President Biden’s inhumane border policies. Our Corruption Chronicles_ blog explains [] that they may be victims of abuse or perpetrators of crimes against Americans. The Biden administration failed to monitor hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrant minors who entered the United States through Mexico and tens of thousands simply vanished from the government’s radar, according to a federal audit []. Judicial Watch has covered the scandal extensively and is investigating the Trump administration’s plan to locate the young migrants, known as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC). A few weeks ago, several media outlets reported that the Trump administration directed Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to track down UACs to, among other things, prevent them from being trafficked or exploited. As the “premier” Homeland Security law enforcement agency created after 9/11 to safeguard the nation and preserve national security, ICE is responsible for monitoring the location and status of all UAC inside the U.S. but somehow the agency lost track of around half a million. This is important since many of the minors have been victims of abuse and forced labor but also because some have committed violent crimes after being released by the government into American communities. This includes a teen from El Salvador who raped and murdered [] a Maryland woman, two teens—one from El Salvador and other from Guatemala—charged with raping a 14-year-old girl at a public high school, and a pair of 17-year-old Central Americans who executed a Massachusetts man by shooting him in the head shortly after crossing the southwest border. Both had ties to the famously violent gang known as Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13), renowned for drug distribution, murder, rape, robbery, home invasions, kidnappings, vandalism, and other brutal crimes. The administration’s new directive reportedly orders ICE to sort UAC into three groups—flight risk, public safety and border security—with officers told to prioritize flight risk minors, which include those with deportation orders for failing to appear in court hearings. Judicial Watch has reached out to ICE and its umbrella agency, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS), to obtain more details about the plan but has not heard back from either one. So, a few days ago, Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request asking DHS and its components to provide records of communications about UAC initiatives, including the recently issued order titled “Unaccompanied Alien Children Joint Initiative Field Implementation.” Judicial Watch is asking for records and communications about the four phases of implementation referenced in the initiative, including communication between ICE and DHS leadership and information about identification and categorizing of UAC into groups such as flight risk, public safety, and border security. We also requested records of consultation with legal service providers, child welfare experts or non-governmental organizations (NGOs) concerning the rights or welfare of unaccompanied minors under this initiative. Under U.S. law the Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR), which is a branch of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), is responsible for caring for UAC, which are overwhelmingly males over the age of 14, according to government figures []. They come from Guatemala (32%), Honduras (20%), Mexico (20%), El Salvador (8%), and “other” (19%). More than half a million entered the country during the Biden administration and Uncle Sam has spent a fortune to provide them with shelter, food, an education, medical care, and recreational activities before and after they are released to sponsors throughout the nation. The government is supposed to keep track of the minors even after they are released to sponsors, though a recently published DHS Office of Inspector General (OIG) report [] confirms that the Biden administration lost track of hundreds of thousands of UAC, placed them with dangerous sponsors and restricted information sharing with law enforcement. Tens of thousands of UAC release addresses were blank, undeliverable, or missing apartment numbers. The government’s UAC program has for years been rocked by many other problems that have put young migrants at risk, including physical and sexual abuse at U.S.-funded shelters. In 2021 Judicial Watch obtained records [] from HHS documenting 33 incidents of physical and sexual abuse during a one-month period at shelters where the government houses UAC until they are relocated with a sponsor. That year a federal audit [] blasted the agency for failing to protect UAC from sexual misconduct at the facilities. During a six-month period alone, investigators from the HHS Inspector General’s office uncovered more than 750 incidents involving sexual misconduct at dozens of shelters housing minor detainees. I interviewed border patrol agents who were extremely emotional and who clearly had reached their breaking point... not long after we came across a little girl standing alone in the desert in the middle of the night completely abandoned. This left me more convinced than ever that when it comes to the border, there are only two kinds of Americans. 1\. Those who _are_ outraged and already demanding it be secured; and 2\. Those who _will_ be outraged and demand it be secured once they come face to face with the threat posed by the 11.5 million migrants who illegally crossed our border over the last four years – a shocking 650,000 with criminal backgrounds (including 14,944 murders and 20,061 charged with sexual assault)
---
| | I traveled to this warzone. I saw with my own eyes. And I did all this so you wouldn’t have to. I also did this after being repeatedly struck in the face by the reality that __nothing__ will change until the second group of people I described a moment ago __wake up__ and stop their __complacency__. That’s exactly what this documentary has the power to do. Correction. That’s exactly what _you_ have the power to do. My friend, this is why I joined forces with Tucker Carlson to promote and distribute **“LINE IN THE SAND”**. We must continue to investigate what is really happening at our Southern Border. Here’s the problem. It’s one we can’t overcome alone. You see, our open southern border is much more than a national security threat...it’s big business. I call it the “migrant industrial complex.” Let’s connect those dots:
---
**_Your tax dollars_**** _→_**** _NGO’s masquerading as churches →_**** _Cartels_**** _→ _All of it_ under the eye (and protection) of local law enforcement_**
---
| | This isn’t conjecture. It’s reality...
---
_A reality_ that one of OMG’s undercover journalists (alias Caesar) working with Citizen Journalism Foundation experienced as he was held at gunpoint by cartel members after he infiltrated a border encampment in the middle of the Aravaca Desert – a site being operated by an NGO (non-governmental organization) affiliated with the Unitarian Universalist Church. _A reality_ I experienced when Pima County deputies threatened to arrest me for exposing a bus filled with illegal immigrants being brought to the Ramada Hotel. _A reality_ that is captured and documented on film by going inside a cartel tunnel, interviewing border patrol agents, climbing aboard a moving freight train with migrants from Venezuela, and uncovering the horrors of babies getting run over and children being drugged so they could be smuggled across the border in silence.
---
_Our New President gets it. Tom Homan and Kristi Noem get it. They’ve been relentless._ But you know who doesn’t report this? **The legacy media in America****.** The actions that you take over the next 5 minutes will play a huge role in whether we have the resources to continue with the powerful citizen journalism that made “**LINE IN THE SAND”** possible. It’s that simple. [Today, I’m asking you to make your **“LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution** using this link in the next 48 hours to join Citizen Journalism Foundation in the fight that will determine whether, at the end of the day, you and I still have a country.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8tuozAUhp_G7ED2sbl4waIpIZpbZpS01cwK-UbjCgMxJqjz9BURysaSP38-__mFGzvbfpYo3yGAi9UTAkD0CQFc_y3Ozx_uxyHWv_ExvmZHl66v8LypN3jIvRLp9c9ZL-ZVTAt2r39l52_koYfP0TzkLTQxTthupXkV6ZK2GrPIlCRnaUYzynB0KfNUtUZyQlpJUkYlYZRiTLGiWFLNZWRLwJBiBhmGNAdIADTJJZct51TmKUYM33MS4Yy3SpApLML7YXCJGlzUlZcQxum-WI2g1kMvgkmUDfa_6T-G2feis5Nrh7nXItihX78hqFMsCklyHROs25gVuogLnolYcq1ajgslgK8jaT0H10zD7JVBtNpVh_i0f0OQrdgZbWeHaLX_tZFg_HpfPNmAEm4U9r1HtNqasmZXHZrn73Xz89vx5dyc9m_N-eXpFK9H5Es9Lrbr7JTliOH3e_e16a2ErwAAAP__rcSV_Q) Oh, there may be a place on the map called “ _the United States_.” But, whether the idea of America (and the freedom it has represented for the last 249 years) will survive? That part depends on what _you_ do today. Because the very first freedom – the Freedom of Speech and a Free Press upon which all other freedoms rest – is being chipped away. And not little by little. But massive cracks and fissures are happening each and every day. [That’s the reason I’m writing so urgently to request your help today and use this link to make your **“LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8tuozAUhp_G7ED2sbl4waIpIZpbZpS01cwK-UbjCgMxJqjz9BURysaSP38-__mFGzvbfpYo3yGAi9UTAkD0CQFc_y3Ozx_uxyHWv_ExvmZHl66v8LypN3jIvRLp9c9ZL-ZVTAt2r39l52_koYfP0TzkLTQxTthupXkV6ZK2GrPIlCRnaUYzynB0KfNUtUZyQlpJUkYlYZRiTLGiWFLNZWRLwJBiBhmGNAdIADTJJZct51TmKUYM33MS4Yy3SpApLML7YXCJGlzUlZcQxum-WI2g1kMvgkmUDfa_6T-G2feis5Nrh7nXItihX78hqFMsCklyHROs25gVuogLnolYcq1ajgslgK8jaT0H10zD7JVBtNpVh_i0f0OQrdgZbWeHaLX_tZFg_HpfPNmAEm4U9r1HtNqasmZXHZrn73Xz89vx5dyc9m_N-eXpFK9H5Es9Lrbr7JTliOH3e_e16a2ErwAAAP__rcSV_Q)**.** People familiar with our multi-part border investigation keep texting me, asking if I fear for my life. Here is my response: I’m _not_ suicidal. But I’m also not afraid to die. At 40, I’ve lived a good life. Whether it’s complete or not is not up to me. What happens next, I don’t know. If there’s more to come here, so be it. I’ve learned the pursuit of truth requires extreme risk while operating without a safety net. Meteoric highs, extreme lows, and near-death experiences, jail and jury trials, constant travel, adventures, travails, failures, betrayals, repeated valleys, moving and climbing mountains, enduring multiple rebirths and renewals. Which leads me to the border videos I've released and the wider mission of Citizen Journalism Foundation – the mission is to discover other people whose principles are not for sale and who will do the right thing rather than talk about doing the right thing. clean_body: | | | Help me and Tucker Carlson today. | | From the desk of | | | Fellow Patriot, I risked my life to get this footage from the border. Jumping aboard a moving freight train filled with Venezuelan migrants in the dead of night... being detained by the Mexican national guard ... and even sneaking into a secret child encampment in Texas that housed unaccompanied children. Anyone who has seen what I’ve seen and still resistsPresident Trump on securing the border, deporting criminal illegals, and designating cartels as foreign terrorist organizations is leading America down a dangerous path. That’s why I’m writing to you today with this personal request. I interviewed border patrol agents who were extremely emotional and who clearly had reached their breaking point... not long after we came across a little girl standing alone in the desert in the middle of the night completely abandoned. This left me more convinced than ever that when it comes to the border, there are only two kinds of Americans. 1\. Those who are outraged and already demanding it be secured; and 2\. Those who will be outraged and demand it be secured once they come face to face with the threat posed by the 11.5 million migrants who illegally crossed our border over the last four years – a shocking 650,000 with criminal backgrounds (including 14,944 murders and 20,061 charged with sexual assault) | | I traveled to this warzone. I saw with my own eyes. And I did all this so you wouldn’t have to. I also did this after being repeatedly struck in the face by the reality that nothing will change until the second group of people I described a moment ago wake up and stop their complacency. That’s exactly what this documentary has the power to do. Correction. That’s exactly what you have the power to do. My friend, this is why I joined forces with Tucker Carlson to promote and distribute “LINE IN THE SAND”. We must continue to investigate what is really happening at our Southern Border. Here’s the problem. It’s one we can’t overcome alone. You see, our open southern border is much more than a national security threat...it’s big business. I call it the “migrant industrial complex.” Let’s connect those dots: Your tax dollars → NGO’s masquerading as churches → Cartels → All of it under the eye (and protection) of local law enforcement | | This isn’t conjecture. It’s reality... A reality that one of OMG’s undercover journalists (alias Caesar) working with Citizen Journalism Foundation experienced as he was held at gunpoint by cartel members after he infiltrated a border encampment in the middle of the Aravaca Desert – a site being operated by an NGO (non-governmental organization) affiliated with the Unitarian Universalist Church. A reality I experienced when Pima County deputies threatened to arrest me for exposing a bus filled with illegal immigrants being brought to the Ramada Hotel. A reality that is captured and documented on film by going inside a cartel tunnel, interviewing border patrol agents, climbing aboard a moving freight train with migrants from Venezuela, and uncovering the horrors of babies getting run over and children being drugged so they could be smuggled across the border in silence. Our New President gets it. Tom Homan and Kristi Noem get it. They’ve been relentless. But you know who doesn’t report this? The legacy media in America. The actions that you take over the next 5 minutes will play a huge role in whether we have the resources to continue with the powerful citizen journalism that made “LINE IN THE SAND” possible. It’s that simple. Oh, there may be a place on the map called “ the United States.” But, whether the idea of America (and the freedom it has represented for the last 249 years) will survive? That part depends on what you do today. Because the very first freedom – the Freedom of Speech and a Free Press upon which all other freedoms rest – is being chipped away. And not little by little. But massive cracks and fissures are happening each and every day. . People familiar with our multi-part border investigation keep texting me, asking if I fear for my life. Here is my response: I’m not suicidal. But I’m also not afraid to die. At 40, I’ve lived a good life. Whether it’s complete or not is not up to me. What happens next, I don’t know. If there’s more to come here, so be it. I’ve learned the pursuit of truth requires extreme risk while operating without a safety net. Meteoric highs, extreme lows, and near-death experiences, jail and jury trials, constant travel, adventures, travails, failures, betrayals, repeated valleys, moving and climbing mountains, enduring multiple rebirths and renewals. Which leads me to the border videos I've released and the wider mission of Citizen Journalism Foundation – the mission is to discover other people whose principles are not for sale and who will do the right thing rather than talk about doing the right thing. I’m tired of seeing tens-of-thousands of people message me privately about how bad things are... and then they make excuses or do nothing. You see, the truth is the only thing the enemies of freedom hate more than one citizen journalist is an entire army of citizen journalists doing the work “the media” is supposed to do. The mission of Citizen Journalism Foundation is promoting these truths and providing this desperately needed transparency. I have to tell you, so far, this border investigation takes the prize as one of the most dangerous operations I’ve ever been involved with. Cartel members pointing guns at our undercover reporter. Sheriff’s deputies threatening jail-time. And, after our reporter escaped the Cartel encampment, I personally donned a bullet-proof vest and “press” badge to exfiltrate our reporter, who was on the point of blacking-out when we finally got him in the vehicle. I’ll tell you pointblank... The entire operation was a reality check for me and for our OMG team. And we’re not backing down. Uncovering the truth is too important. It’s worth the fight. It’s worth the sacrifice. If you agree, good. I need you to join me. That’s why I’m urging you to rush me your “LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution before you do anything else today. I need to hear from you within the next 48 hours so we can conduct even more undercover investigations, and fully execute our blueprint for training and equipping our army of Citizen Journalists. I’m counting on your help to expose the corruption on our southern border and in big government, big tech, big banks, big media, and big pharma. It won’t be easy. As I mentioned the retaliation I – and those citizen journalists working alongside me – will face is well-documented. Our vital mission cannot continue without your support. So, whether you can send $35 or more, please make your “LINE IN THE SAND” Emergency Contribution in the next 48 hours using the button below. | | With Sincere Thanks, | | James O'Keefe CEO, Citizen Journalism Foundation | | | James O'Keefe CEO, Citizen Journalism Foundation | | | Citizen Journalism Foundation is a 501(c)(3) organization, gifts to which are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. | | P.O. Box 1225 Merrifield, VA 22116-1225

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: President Trump: “SAVE RUDY!!!”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Democrats think they’ve found a bulletproof loophole...

Democrats think they’ve found a bulletproof loophole...
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znllc8m88jkqp2r6fg6ogk3errecqjp3bhhs1bk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or5cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
For the sake of my life, I hope to God they’re wrong...
---
...But Democrats believe they’ve finally found the bulletproof loophole to send me to prison until I’m 100 years old.
---
Because the Constitution doesn’t give the President the power to issue pardons for _state-level_ crimes, a corrupt Democrat Attorney General is forcing me to stand trial in _state_ court so that President Trump cannot save me from this grave injustice.
---
But of course President Trump isn’t just going to roll over to the Left. Since _he_ knows he cannot save me with a pardon, he’s calling on _YOU_ to join the cause to save me.
---

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zod0n2j9k5hgihk0v2jsmpng0vporgr3k39pqp1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or5cph2bs)
__
---

Back in 2021, after the Biden FBI raided my home, the media pronounced me a “ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_.”
---
**And yet, despite all odds against me, here I am – ALIVE and _FIGHTING_. We’ve won _every_ single battle up until now.**
---
_How did we win?_ The same way President Trump won the White House despite four sham arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet... thanks to _YOU_.
---
**Patriots like _you_ refused to surrender our country to a corrupt Deep State hellbent on using lawfare to overthrow our Free Republic.**
---
But now I’m in my final fight that will determine whether I spend 20 years in a prison cell or if I live as a free man.
---
That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $50,000 before week’s end for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man.
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---
Don’t just take my word for it. President Trump knows how grave this is. And now I am **_humbly_** echoing the President’s call to “save” me.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me raise the $50,000 I need to continue fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats try to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zt5b6np0ltgcltu2u8380rm27mao5tn5viek7hc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or5cph2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z78vsn0a3jmahd7jsss9i9u0e3cvr38m6ca7ps28_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z05hqeqbrikj53sb5spngo7qdiibmfkdmnr0khco_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6c3h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeoekkhmn3q8cftv0h3tq4rh1dju6t2hhcnodoa8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6c3h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoeqfg9jkk3s340li014sk74huf6b5n2gb0qrktg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6c3h2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1ncuo8okpeu6efjeiq32jj6ak5d4gtbeqe6m7k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvrcpu6oajngbr6tdj3tm8sagfbmcbn3gss4pojo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6cjh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhebi5b8vo5sk95q1grpd3k67q6g45kofn9kpss8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6cjh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1nqla2ugbe73trj7h34tc1o1tkmu4v2gsvqf44g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6cjh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zra0d5pnhilpastf7k2625co06tlfq71tg8vr8so_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6cjh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrn1oec8rqrk73cklum87366uhugj7c40uvqev30_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6cjh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za4vn35jn7tnjl6ajpu5v90v52rj2so3mpa24ufo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6cjh2bs)

| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhmbg8lpr44ilm992v06p9ldkfj3r8105qsakg28_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6cjh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsuodv3f732phmj3ss0h49g5fg8qoesval5gg0fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6cjh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpbc8c6thg2m0se7splkhgsun8nr45jumf85dsa8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or2chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvaqbmv0flvtp2126tbaoebhhaka0essb4ruff4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or2chh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7aa8qjf56tkdf18kpodop48otcksgotsfbh4v38_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or2chh2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zurv4jtssphkrt7prihfe8438ag5atae1u4jbd88_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or2chh2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpdjavd86epl3q2dog9su5cjpe5d2sv5gd8057lg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or2chh2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
