name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2kbvqadg7cio3s7dr8jlkbt6t670sm60mlmespo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7mag2js71o8cb1s5pqkeb3ktaoj1481jsn4f1l8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztlj2bpb65q06969nbin4sqgfbm4b9vfnm30204g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6c3h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znqqmi67g9a8si3npp0t90kscj75mgaq50j0kn0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or6c3h2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: The Rare Phenomenon of Citizenship
body:
I invite you to view our eight-lecture course “American Citizenship and Its Decline,” based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, The Dying Citizen.

This sponsored message from Updates for Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zk4hel76kasksvce07l63r0fbsvvkim48bhtmsu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or0sjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, I invite you to view our eight-lecture course "**[American Citizenship and Its Decline](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zaem2kk27aqbut0mb23r56lgbtosm0vtlisr7vr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or0sjh2bs)** ," based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen_.

Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.

The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present—given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.
---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z548d0b8nnl4dpbceush7rd06krl19l9dt4f8njo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or0sjh2bs)
---
| | Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and reassert control over the government.

You can receive a DVD box set of "**American Citizenship and Its Decline** " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/citizenship-dvd](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztoghqvd9hl1iou4tqkimper8b238eitj6aslhq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm8or0sjh2bs)

Best wishes,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: I invite you to view our eight-lecture course “American Citizenship and Its Decline,” based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, The Dying Citizen. This sponsored message from Updates for Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear friend, I invite you to view our eight-lecture course " ," based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, The Dying Citizen. Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen. The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present—given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government. | | | Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past. Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America. These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen. In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature. Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed. The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and reassert control over the government. You can receive a DVD box set of "American Citizenship and Its Decline " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link: Best wishes, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1oup7v1mss1rbfc6va2p2ccvq4l6npcb7amojfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zuarknmvs1ukrk8ljk3hhres0seeesf9su4ko43o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgb8d2okq8gisa7o1g51n27822udgl61rm5kgl30_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7scav70flt9mi6fu2uulbqppu2h9cli1ljergv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zr5qcnqtm0qbqi609h7mqrl019koropsdihper30_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhqd0cavnn73oirq33b9asi7hi1vd3c1lu2tqpao_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zp21n8dj5bncngeb9fhl8p6nhpm13jdh72rvpd88_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2jjuf9pcauh84alm58j9hakrtepkbfcchd3bak8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zknuah58ufbop9sfhkb5vu8irdeeve15peastjm0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3m1936goqd1o703omoct3910ea9ejsju3dl13p0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq3d6e01oebf942ldmk8nnhk4g702v2htthmu858_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmhqhd3r4t4navvn05rtak9in004foru3sjj2ce0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvmdmi4n7f5fg4ebb849sj8dfjtq2d6dfpi2oek8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2m4tgdsmgdd0vsdsp4l9948kc5mkajibe6ko1r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm4pb1c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

| |
---

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Let’s finish April strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
Help us elect common sense candidates

Friend,

**Our April End-of-Month fundraising deadline is almost here,** and your support is more important than ever.

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: As a Marine, I was taught to keep my word.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It should come as a surprise to NO ONE when we immediately moved to:

| |
---
| | | It amuses me to watch the DC press' heads explode when we actually do _something_ that we _promised we would do_ during the campaign...

**This is Vice President JD Vance.** When I joined the Marines right out of high school, they taught me to keep my word - what a novel concept in DC!

It should have come as a surprise to NO ONE when we immediately moved to:
- Close the border and slash illegal immigration
- Gut DEI propaganda in our military
- Unleash Elon to eliminate waste and fraud
- Ban men in women's sports
- End taxes on tips and social security
- Incentivize businesses to invest in America
- Reinstate deterrence on the world stage
- Deport violent criminal aliens
- And the list goes on
_**[And we're just getting started. Our partners in Congress have been in lockstep with us to deliver on President Trump's agenda too.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhv76jm08u1fkl1k6jk6ppfq6rae2l59g6tapvi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmaoj1cjh2bs "And we’re just getting started. Our partners in Congress have been in lockstep with us to deliver on President Trump's agenda too.")**_

Unfortunately, moving so swiftly and decisively comes at a cost.

The Democrat Machine and the DC press are ENRAGED at how quickly everything they've worked for is unraveling before their very eyes. They're fighting back in the only ways they know how:

**1)** Launching dishonest attacks to hurt Republicans politically, **2)** Peddling Fake News hoaxes, and **3)** Exploiting the outrage to mobilize Liberals to whip out their credit cards and donate to Democrats.

Now the Democrat Machine's bank accounts are **OVERFLOWING!** They've _already_ unloaded $50,000,000 on the heads of our most vulnerable Republicans - that's enough to destroy our House Majority **AND** hand power over to the Liberals!

That's why I'm taking matters into my own hands.

_**[I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $500,000 between now and the end of the month.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zs6i7qg2as4fbmui911ipg8ib1uhco87te37lmj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmaoj1cjh2bs "I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $500,000 between now and the end of the month.")**_

I don't want your family to overstretch but if you can kick in even a few bucks, it would really help us save our House Majority, hold the line, and keep delivering on the President's promises.

_Do you think you could help us out?_
---
| | | [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $100](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zi2mvkjp5v9j1c9b2c6d2urmucqomk6iltg4s5v8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmaoj1cjh2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $100")
---
| | | [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $50](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdkd1nmend9pbm0mk8tfdfdbipp6uuhq69f46lt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmaoj1cjh2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $50")
---
| | | [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $25](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3bfcn8ocgdjurrq3doeht70plvmuc63h1pneeh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmaoj1cjh2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $25")
---
| | | [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $10](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkivfam4uuejhp2u9mhq0oodcc9auvogebl27i28_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmaoj1cjh2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $10")
---
I am proud of what we've accomplished together just in the first few months in office.

And I can promise you this:

**We 're not taking our foot off the gas. Not for a second.**

But our ability to keep control of the House for our President's ENTIRE TERM hinges on the investments we make today - not next year, not closer to Election Day. Today.

That's why I'm partnering with Leader Scalise right here and right now.

_**[We're both personally asking for your support. Are you in?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf8dl2446olbicp5cui2v9p7ekq0etolqstncvr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmaoj1cjh2bs "We’re both personally asking for your support. Are you in?")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance

---

---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmvrn1p1m5d852151k2sa1i5bt8f997jhlj8463g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmaoj1cjh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: HOUSE GOP COMMUNICATION [via Team Scalise]
subject: Dana White OBLITERATES the Fake News narrative of President Trump:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
“The Mainstream Media likes to push the narrative that he doesn't care about anyone but himself. I absolutely know that's not the truth...”

| |
---
| | | **The legend himself, Dana White, OBLITERATES the Fake News narrative of President Trump:**

---
_"I know President Trump is a proven leader,_a fearless leader_ ...

And I know President Trump is a fighter. I've been saying this since 2015. Now, look at what's happened over the last 10 years. We have all seen it with our own eyes. I'm in the tough guy business, and this man is the _toughest, most resilient human being_ that I have ever met in my life.

The Mainstream Media likes to push the narrative that he doesn't care about anyone but himself. I absolutely know that's not the truth, because I've been friends with this guy for 25 years. And I know _he wants what's best for the American People._ "_
---

**We 're relieved you opened this email.**

Warriors like Dana White put everything on the line to publicly support our President, campaign alongside him, and even speak at the RNC. It's only fair that we do too. We won't lie to you - everything we've fought for is at stake.

The Liberal Mob is trying every dirty trick in the book to demonize President Trump in the Media and destroy our Republican Trifecta. And they just set their sights on our Conservative House Majority.

House Democrats just stockpiled **$37 MILLION**. National Democrats just authorized a **$20 MILLION** slush fund to elect Liberal activists. Progressive Democrats are shattering fundraising records, raking in **$21+ MILLION**.

They'll try to bury us. Just like they tried to bury President Trump.

But we can't back down. Not now. Not ever.

_**[We're asking you to be a MAGA warrior - like Dana - and help us fight back against the Liberal Mob. Will you step up and pitch in a few bucks?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbb2hbns8vlcfuqv6244aq5f08j2km9f006d8rko_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmaoj1cth2bs "We’re asking you to be a MAGA warrior – like Dana – and help us fight back against the Liberal Mob. Will you step up and pitch in a few bucks?")**_
---
| | | [PITCH IN NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeqljjqa2r25aic0bmcs30ohadueifn97pvirqeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmaoj1cth2bs "PITCH IN NOW")
---
This is the single most important thing you can do to support the MAGA movement.

Thank you for standing with us,

House GOP
_(Sent via Team Scalise)_

---
| |

---

---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6gkqd3ltolfa1altf97kq00cbs20bcl6ege6hio_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmaoj1cth2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

The new procedures apply to a wide range of projects, including coal, uranium and critical minerals. The announcement comes less than [...]...Click to read more

# **[Ex-Rep. George Santos gets maximum penalty for federal fraud charges](http://trk.libertyledger.-4Dw)**
---
Former Rep. George Santos (R-N.Y.) was sentenced to 87 months in prison on Friday for federal charges of aggravated identity theft and wire fraud related to his 2022 campaign. The prison sentence of more than seven years was the maximum that was sought by prosecutors, who presented evidence that the 36-year-old had stolen money as well as committed identity theft while spending lavishly on vacations and designer clothing. 'I allowed ambition to cloud my judgement, leading me to make decisions that were unethical and guilty.'Santos appeared remorseful in court and wept as he apologized for his actions, according to a CNN report.

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: The Rare Phenomenon of Citizenship
body:
I invite you to view our eight-lecture course “American Citizenship and Its Decline,” based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, The Dying Citizen.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great American Upsate is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvtp9kktk8buqed7sabi94cp9fnp1ofdkgpkbnfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, I invite you to view our eight-lecture course "**[American Citizenship and Its Decline](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znl7up1jmjoakie3bnqe382k02h0jg6sqaondosg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cjh2bs)** ," based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen_.

Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.

The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present—given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za25gvg5ctv0j1u2rv12ka2rkglh4fkaccb7qc38_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cjh2bs)
---
| | Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and reassert control over the government.

You can receive a DVD box set of "**American Citizenship and Its Decline** " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/citizenship-dvd](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7785lqmu7kuubkudkmdfnfc6avrdb67prrkm978_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cjh2bs)

Best wishes,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zngdu4hiptn6ssipu4veihv3al511ofv1j2hkqco_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjklo72d1hekr76dtiesp7ad1hegqracjkmoq37djjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob6c5im9pb246h22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvqnchd8gc9vs00qh21pb6vaopi0t4fdn9e5mn50_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cjh2bs)_

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
God led me to share my story with the world – warts and all.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znsks488fg92obi6t83p7tlq0nulqfhbhv0qakvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cdh2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3tqrptckn0v3nd4k4h1buvvotegtsj0g5i70gko_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cdh2bs "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg0gg02o3h5hi4l8pt9m59ds12uuvog78o8ic090_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cdh2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za3hn0t7m2sp13f8jk374ru6gaprkoaifo1f8fig_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cdh2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu95s82403roln5rq99gqas7gbh0oualulq35dmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cdh2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6amf1qeo6gvbj40uvgjgm7ajlh3r2se30v39h1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cdh2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbvnbi1ofc1cvrqmcntangpk8rf8ir769lvres98_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cdh2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbhi5t7vl7kcenradkg592ok0mvkpqlv5q077uog_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cdh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbnis6nqrvl6mlonpjfge2js3fqqbov0dalkk9g8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cdh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsvvep7csmbtm7ekh5b68vr12u9mmab697lhvu70_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm6p34cdh2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---

---

5/27: [St. Croix County Membership Meeting](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ckdhyhl-didthutlhu-it/) ** **Upcoming WisGOP Events** **Past County Events** **3rd District Congressional Caucus**
Yesterday, nearly 200 delegates and guests gathered in Osseo for the 3rd District Caucus. Chairman Hannah Testin and Vice Chairman Ryan Huebsch were elected to a 2-year term by unanimous consent. Volunteers and county party leaders were recognized for their efforts over the past year, and awards were given to recognize some of the district's most exceptional grassroots activists. Congratulations to the award winners! **Columbia County**
What a great turnout for Columbia County's Lincoln Day dinner! They had a lot of good speakers and would like to thank Jon Plumer for being our MC. They also heard from an array of amazing speakers, including State Representative Barb Dittrich, US Congressman Glenn Grothman, Dodge County Sheriff Dale Schmidt (subbing for Columbia County Sheriff Roger Brandner), Wisconsin GOP chair Brian Schiming and Wisconsin State Treasurer John Lieber. **Dodge County**
Republicans in Dodge County were joined by some amazing guest speakers for their annual Lincoln Day Dinner! **Dunn CountyThe **
Republican Party of Dunn County Lincoln Day Dinner featured their new Chairman, Mike Werner, and special guests Bill Brewer of Moms for Liberty, State Rep Rob Kreibich, State Rep David Armstrong, State Senator Jesse James, Dunn County Sheriff Kevin Bygd, and Wisconsin College Republicans Chairman Nick Jacobs. **Grant County**
Congratulations to the Republican Party of Grant County for being awarded the 2024 Top County Party at the 3rd District Republican Caucus. This award was hard earned by all of our members and volunteers by increasing our Republican votes year after year. **Green County **
The Green County Republican Party held their monthly meeting on April 12th to a large crowd with guest Speaker John Pudner, President of Wisconsin Faith & Freedom Coalition, and State Director, Spencer LaVerde. **Monroe County **
Monroe County Board Chairman Cedric Schnitzler led a discussion on the State of Monroe County at their April 3rd Conservative Breakfast. Attendees included three additional county board supervisors and REP. Nancy VanderMeer [70th Assembly District]. **Sauk County**
The Executive Team of the Sauk County Republican Party was present at the 2nd Congressional District Caucus to represent their fellow Sauk Republicans. **Sheboygan County**
The Sheboygan Teens for Life, along with RPSC Chair Michal Pierce stood for life last weekend. They were joined by Representative Lindee Brill. **St. Croix County**
Saint Croix County Republicans launched their Battle Program to brainstorm ways they can be most effective in upcoming elections. **Taylor County**
The Republican Party of Taylor County was joined by over ninety guests at their Lincoln Day Dinner and heard from some of Wisconsin's finest, including Congressman Tom Tiffany and Party Executive, Will Martin. [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ckdhyhl-didthutlhu-ii/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ckdhyhl-didthutlhu-id/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ckdhyhl-didthutlhu-ih/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ckdhyhl-didthutlhu-ik/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-ckdhyhl-didthutlhu-dl/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-ckdhyhl-didthutlhu-dr/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-ckdhyhl-l-dy)
---|---|---

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: As a Marine, I was taught to keep my word.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It should come as a surprise to NO ONE when we immediately moved to:

| |
---
| | | It amuses me to watch the DC press' heads explode when we actually do _something_ that we _promised we would do_ during the campaign...

**This is Vice President JD Vance.** When I joined the Marines right out of high school, they taught me to keep my word - what a novel concept in DC!

It should have come as a surprise to NO ONE when we immediately moved to:
- Close the border and slash illegal immigration
- Gut DEI propaganda in our military
- Unleash Elon to eliminate waste and fraud
- Ban men in women's sports
- End taxes on tips and social security
- Incentivize businesses to invest in America
- Reinstate deterrence on the world stage
- Deport violent criminal aliens
- And the list goes on
_**[And we're just getting started. Our partners in Congress have been in lockstep with us to deliver on President Trump's agenda too.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsrhn5ijiiidf3th4ctlj1okvd4tki7b20nseh00_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmeo32clh2bs "And we’re just getting started. Our partners in Congress have been in lockstep with us to deliver on President Trump's agenda too.")**_

Unfortunately, moving so swiftly and decisively comes at a cost.

The Democrat Machine and the DC press are ENRAGED at how quickly everything they've worked for is unraveling before their very eyes. They're fighting back in the only ways they know how:

**1)** Launching dishonest attacks to hurt Republicans politically, **2)** Peddling Fake News hoaxes, and **3)** Exploiting the outrage to mobilize Liberals to whip out their credit cards and donate to Democrats.

Now the Democrat Machine's bank accounts are **OVERFLOWING!** They've _already_ unloaded $50,000,000 on the heads of our most vulnerable Republicans - that's enough to destroy our House Majority **AND** hand power over to the Liberals!

That's why I'm taking matters into my own hands.

_**[I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $500,000 between now and the end of the month.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsm84jahko6aosu5vr5nrhnjqf3qtk5jd4udiheg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmeo32clh2bs "I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $500,000 between now and the end of the month.")**_

I don't want your family to overstretch but if you can kick in even a few bucks, it would really help us save our House Majority, hold the line, and keep delivering on the President's promises.

_Do you think you could help us out?_
---
| | | [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu03d306k14h8tlo5igbl5ais19ke47bel9agjgo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmeo32clh2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $100")
---
| | | [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkjdom0k444om29vp3p1buob7rrdkng4bm1ojg5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmeo32clh2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $50")
---
| | | [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcf5dj3rt386vh0k5geejndbgqktskqmlcuo1pbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmeo32clh2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $25")
---
| | | [PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $10](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbi29j5ko3o42428voreaau0t2vmta1faqun76q0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmeo32clh2bs "PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $10")
---
I am proud of what we've accomplished together just in the first few months in office.

And I can promise you this:

**We 're not taking our foot off the gas. Not for a second.**

But our ability to keep control of the House for our President's ENTIRE TERM hinges on the investments we make today - not next year, not closer to Election Day. Today.

That's why I'm partnering with Leader Scalise right here and right now.

_**[We're both personally asking for your support. Are you in?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu0p1610nm7r5pu8o5s15k9r30kdfre5amr2hhro_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmeo32clh2bs "We’re both personally asking for your support. Are you in?")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z208km95646svbpnv9n1h6l4qcma48sc2k74tb10_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmeo32clh2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

---

---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ghrdf9da367188c55gq2bc635t8vlf5h35ljp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhmeo32clh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: America First Alerts
subject: Elon is on life support, and things just got a lot worse.
disclaimer_text: paid for by America First Fund, P
body:
Elon said it best: “What’s better than saying ‘trust me’? Just full transparency. That’s what we are doing with DOGE.”

| | | | [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4d0uh7nnoe7m73d8k4hjihds6hnhkhndtagaps8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm1o75c1h2bs)
---
|
---
# **_BREAKING_**

###

### Elon said it best: “What’s better than saying ‘trust me’? Just full transparency. That’s what we are doing with DOGE.”

### Elon’s not asking for blind faith.

###

### He’s delivering receipts. Real transparency. Real accountability.

### And now the Deep State is in full-blown PANIC MODE.

### DOGE is exposing what they’ve tried to bury for years: Waste, Corruption, and Deep-Rooted Control by Unelected Bureaucrats.

### Now the Deep State is out for REVENGE.

###

### Not just against Trump. Not just against Elon. AGAINST YOU!

### The Radical Left is hellbent on eliminating DOGE and silencing the one man with a platform big enough to finally expose the corrupt deep state and their FILTHY antics.

### Why?

###

### Because DOGE is pulling back the curtain and Elon is showing the American people exactly how the deep state works—and who it's really working for.
###
Democrats are openly calling for violence in the streets. Against Trump lovers. Against Elon. Against YOU.

### They know transparency means the end of their power—and they’re willing to burn it all down to stop it.

### This is the line in the sand.

###

### And DOGE is the Radical Left’s #1 Target.

### If you support President Trump... if you believe in exposing the truth... now is the moment to show it.

****
###

# **_GO ON THE RECORD: STAND WITH ELON & DOGE_**
###

[ADD YOUR NAME HERE!](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjbmnmj4baks2ce6ml0o8u86bikh1lqqja81m9e0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdhm1o75c1h2bs)

name: Troy Downing (MT-2)
subject: One quick question on the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
The border wall isn’t finished. It’s up to us to get the job done.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._bW9uZXlfcGxlZGdlPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQ1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQyNl9PVS1QSC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MzIwOTctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MjZfT1UtUEguMTEwMTE3X3QxNjMyMDk3LTI4OTkifQ/h3GGJMxZa15wyzmnQU8Ndw)
---
Peter, The facts are simple: The wall isn’t done. Biden stopped it. And President Trump is ready to finish the job.We’re closer than ever to completing the southern border wall, **but we can’t slow down now.** Every day the wall remains unfinished, we risk the entry of drug cartels and violent criminals into our country.The choice is clear: _**Open borders or law and order.**_**[**Do you support completing the border wall and securing our southern border? If so, please add your name to finish building the wall:**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._bW9uZXlfcGxlZGdlPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQ1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQyNl9PVS1QSC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MzIwOTctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MjZfT1UtUEguMTEwMTE3X3QxNjMyMDk3LTI4OTkifQ/TtfCWuSPL13cx9E4ybGJqg)**
---

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: I’m running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
Now, Democrats want me GONE.

| | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0llua26d75snpo6cch3fbuhu3747bevavp4i40g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdjm0or6cph2bs)
---
Friend - Thank you for opening this email. It may be hard to believe, but under 30% of conservatives who get messages from me even bother to open them!

Numbers like that make it tough for conservatives like me because we rely on texts, emails, letters, and phone calls to keep in touch with supporters. So, I just want to start by saying thanks so much for reading this!

You may not know me, but my name is Winsome Earle-Sears.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbec06ac8c01v0agonjt4cmm1b7k9eqjkkg2b8q0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdjm0or6cph2bs)
---
_U.S. Marine Corporal Winsome Earle-Sears_
---
I served our nation in the US Marine Corps as an electrician & a diesel mechanic. I kept my brothers & sisters on the move and equipped to DEFEND our nation from terrorists & communists. It was during my service that I learned what real leadership and sacrifice are. _**I am forever grateful that I had the privilege to serve and defend our nation, Friend.**_

There's a saying: _Once a Marine, always a Marine._ Every Marine shares the same spirit of duty and service that inspired me to join--to defend our neighbors and our nation. That's why, today, I'm still serving my country.

But now, I'm fighting for my friends' and neighbors' freedoms as a civilian. In 2021, I decided to run for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia because I saw that our nation needed a strong Christian, someone who has served this great country, to step up and LEAD!

**And after a historic and hard-fought battle, my team and I won by LESS THAN 1.6% of the vote!!** Now, Democrats want me _GONE_. It doesn't matter that I'm a patriotic Marine, a strong Christian, and a mom & grandma; _the Left can 't stand me because I am a proud and unapologetic conservative!_

Now I'm running for Governor, and polls show this race could be _EVEN CLOSER_! I know my team, and I have a tough battle ahead of us. We're putting everything we've got into defending our values and showing the Left that they can't buy this election; losing simply is not an option, Friend.

_**[Today, I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart to send in any amount you can to support me in this CRUCIAL battle!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdu39uu4dn6di2j1gvropu8nl03dn8n6qmlrmb7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdjm0or6cph2bs)**_

---
[ **DONATE $50**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr1efrgocukrjvr3e1itsm8eit9o77r0jpg4j5vg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdjm0or6cph2bs)
---
[ **DONATE $25**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo8q270ti02c6eb54pca10eusm41ms9enf96kmg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdjm0or6cph2bs)
---
[ **SEND IN A DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ffsj297utt76s5hc55m346qntrk2ejlld9sop0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdjm0or6cph2bs)
---
I'm running a campaign that is _FOR_ the people and _BY_ the people. Liberal billionaires & Hollywood elites aren't bankrolling me; I'm counting on grassroots patriots like you to help me win! **And _the fact is_ , if we don't have the support of every conservative reading this email, I have no idea how my team and I are going to keep up with the _millions_ and _MILLIONS_ of dollars the Democrats have stacked against us, Friend!**

So please do not sit on the sidelines - make a donation to support me today, Friend!
---
[ **CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb41iea3mvbg25kk2kjho6bvms9mcodb20ppeda8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdjm0or6cph2bs)

Winsome Earle-Sears
_US Marine Corporal_

Immigrant.
Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zql6drqn2vtrr2hl9nf9b74vjm6ask1ev3tsi6ro_rp22sh2s8i6eob5cdjm0or6cph2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.

name: Vivek R.
subject: They said it was a suicide mission.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
They called him nuts until he uttered that iconic phrase heard round the world:

They said it was a suicide mission.
They called him nuts until he uttered that iconic phrase heard round the world:
**_" One small step for man, one giant leap for mankind"_**
Neil Armstrong - a fearless, humble guy from Ohio - planted the American flag on the moon.[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._8YP3kPJgl_v6WnO64hglA)And just 66 years before that?
Another Ohio gentleman, Orville Wright, who was a bike mechanic with no college degree, set out to defy gravity.
Everyone laughed at him - the government, experts, even his friends...
Until the wheels left the ground - and mankind took to the skies.[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._KZ_8eclGW62jnaLGkdFHA)[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-h7IsPB2g)[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._rSQkEKI47C6jlhRA)[This is Vivek Ramaswamy. That fearlessness and boldness in America's DNA is what I'm trying to revive with my campaign for Governor.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-WUefVN66w)
Democrats have long suffocated that ambitious spirit... shackled it with red tape, bureaucracy, and woke programming that pits Americans against each other.
I believe Ohio can lead the way for the rest of the country - again.
Not with more bureaucracy, but with more boldness.
We don't need permission to be great. We just need the courage to launch - and never look back.
This is bigger than politics. It's about self-confidence, shared purpose, and American exceptionalism.[I'm betting on us. Join me >>
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-ZEsng)[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._JYWA)**[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._r4Zdq8hrGVQ)****Vivek Ramaswamy** Candidate for Governor of Ohio| | |
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave
Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201

[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’s entertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5URrEPNirJMQ9AO2Mh_IEA~~/AARclBA~/4osymeC-9oK92hH_sGdKrTE221GvKfLYjPLiu6dwakP1q_ya6ImOxzdfKwRl_EId-fjPBEHmcT4u6cDKo92zSZIZFMIRXZmwpNolJQAlsP3Xg0BDlaIRhN98LvzAcqQ_oWyWTo1kXd01l2o8eWxlyjjGviQouZZnXPqoJriR-vnVhnvCwY2ukw_zTsxM2i_toeyxOhi2FMdpLS4lCKA34Srj84MT2OifXzn0jMT9-cE72P3_3yvRPLJcqNxgxVdfJVB-pQq0eei5cCw5ndLpjyIbVGNnWta-iPuCPNPxMP_IVNU3QkS9-f2Y34pwVzdF)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5URrEPNirJMQ9AO2Mh_IEA~~/AARclBA~/4osymeC-9oK92hH_sGdKrTE221GvKfLYjPLiu6dwakP1q_ya6ImOxzdfKwRl_EId-fjPBEHmcT4u6cDKo92zSZIZFMIRXZmwpNolJQAlsP3Xg0BDlaIRhN98LvzAcqQ_oWyWTo1kXd01l2o8eWxlyjjGviQouZZnXPqoJriR-vnVhnvCwY2ukw_zTsxM2i_toeyxOhi2FMdpLS4lCKA34Srj84MT2OifXzn0jMT9-cE72P3_3yvRPLJcqNxgxVdfJVB-pQq0eei5cCw5ndLpjyIbVGNnWta-iPuCPNPxMP_IVNU3QkS9-f2Y34pwVzdF)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. ## FBI Arrests Wisconsin Judge
A Wisconsin county judge was arrested and [charged with two felonies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQhuGrgc7IGLChcHEaupx2S2TwGCZrbOSfeHP3q0S5g61HejXP93Vbbgotuv2_OkEm4xcHJVpICcJiVlQhQEzxnvUOl78gmuwgLIyygdCeML5ohfa59LWWBoBBV4NsRT9w3k68qw_J1KrHcYWuF-M4gVEg9Lgas62DGKjgNcpXjfaMt5Ry2jYjF3SinRB8GtpuolVPQWPyobl7dOkAY5_-AaHZ_FlbeaR0xar7V7G5YnMppTH-hztfXveKzS9QxWazIvloyIm2qPwNQDafXXqSt48cyjl1EJ135YjathxBE7_GFPKW0O0EN_g06iD1VdBajFxUPd1Phfb9UPrTig_JfgMAAP__iTqJxw) by the FBI Friday, accused of helping an illegal immigrant evade arrest by federal agents. According to a 13-page complaint, Milwaukee County Circuit Judge [Hannah Dugan](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO3CAUheGnwd0dAbbxuHAxm5W7TZEUKS0WLvbdYLAAL5q3jzyvkPpIR_r-Px_LhyZPYf2pd5yKi0vAmj2Wgmlxn6RTwlzy12lXPOKB2Z0B0yK57IF3INViNfnn0jV2cogS2wYnMXS9UmJUbbNNox0_79yN96G3XTeK_q4FKiEGjkZqFA1N1xvvpBKcKy5udzXwkbfDoMZetCNnHUdLJabbV6RQNnT-Gb8x3UzcGz9tpRyZtQ8mZybnWuttz-HamJwxwJmZnC8Uk7NJtCOT806-6vMvIph4hvIEQ8mcVODlhE2HoDew56oDmE2nFS1UKhtIcOhjIMxAAcggGJ2vR53g8RDvP9yvN9bO0ZBl7fvb1RVr_o3paNJkj0reU1YD6_i6a_IvQfmv7N-T_BcAAP__bjiXUQ) hid Mexican national Eduardo Flores-Ruiz, who faces three misdemeanor battery charges, inside the courthouse after his April 18 pretrial conference. She is alleged to have "[intentionally misdirected](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ8Gd7YwYIgLim3cZdstLX4OzokwWEBi5e1Xju4b3O6TRprRN__u691gxLT9NTvoFvKa4KwRWoOyBoumFKitPl9-gyMfUMMrQVkZZVNPRc_k6g3Gzyo6rwMAA96BHpWYpBxnybuHnm6GWUa5H5WzNyusDzOMzk5BKW_53KG-2qhgcqRU0nG4SUVnypWS8zTymRJBwWPLZXhmTO0BIX7yG8rg8t5F_WjtqIT_IWwhbDnPc3C2XhZXTthyIWFLsNj_2PQnVpdTxdR_xfpsaysv1zCnHvcdt2K-7EwFwpauaH-cGCNWqYig224wftfbry57a_Y_AAD__1ZGglc) federal agents” and helped Flores-Ruiz exit the building where he was arrested after a brief foot chase. Dugan appeared in federal court Friday without making public comments. Her [next court appearance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOwyAURE9jd1gYMISCYht32XZLi5iP_SMCFuB4c_uVo9xg6zcazZuf63S1GDAu3_YBpvo0RThKgFohT_6GNmcotdx3t8CWNih-j5AnRtlAqCBMTs5ieE2idcYDMOAtmF6JQcpeS96upndUDVpZz_Wl50LxgQ3yoqXwbhaDEC2as40KJntKJe27i1RUU66U1EPPNW0EBYc15e6eMNYVfHilJ-RuTo82mLXWrTT8q2Fjw8bjODqffk-Lkzds3EvDRn9D8nEhB5Y5xYKRvLWIDQEWjAspK5B0KzXvcwX3yRM8sQ3EBoRIStrzDIUU-2qzcduBIWCRqhF0eVgM71H1X08-DfsLAAD__-whidI) is scheduled for May 15.
## Pope Francis to be Buried Today
The Vatican has confirmed that over [160 delegations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DvO4zAMBODT2J0CWk-rULFNun_bLQ09KIeBYhuSkiC3XzhX-EuCwGC--fez_HgqtK1__QNdz_uy4bsV7B3rkgP5WrH1dn-mFY_9wJafG9aFA1cMJON6SZ7KZ5FjchmRoxjRTUYqrSerxXhz1phoQSWVU04hyphz4nYGlW2Q3uNI7kwDyfUEoGG6zNqABWGMtmoSFgYJmKjv9XLfaes3zOWzv7Be4v4Yi7v1frRB_Bn4deBXf5yA83UetVMsOPArdV8-7OU7Rb-xU8K-El9YonWj7ithY2GOHHQCgUIJFWZEEaY5Sa61CTOIsbp0vKkUatoMEtaHp_Lt0X813svx_wEAAP__YliCrw), including President Trump and 53 other heads of state, including 12 reigning sovereigns, will attend Pope Francis’ funeral today. Pope Francis, who died Monday, lay in public view for several days this week as more than 250,000 mourners, church officials, and political leaders paid their final respects. His coffin was sealed Friday in preparation for [today’s service](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCnMV3Qem3WoXDxN3T52yuRwQtx5GBkO-Hy9ifuFa4baaRPmvm6jTcXYtjW_-7Jti5p3PgokWvlPC5TcDlzqeXx8ivvaeeyvDbOIwJ2F9AXpNG7ED-jbrxdmJFVw1Ya3RHJnlRztwrBGQ0dK-fIm2n2rL2UPJlZdzRRE-ypgUaSAASyvZKBHpQx1HdS9SA0sA815faRwlbvvMRPenNu5_Rsor3Xuheh_gkcBA7HcbTTNJ-dwOEcI3BwuYY58hlnvV7zR31Lg6nJ1u9HiDEUMkLD-nQh_qr1T1e8Lf4EAAD__-4LcU4) in St. Peter’s Square and burial in a basilica outside the Vatican’s walls. Cardinal Giovanni Battista Re, dean of the College of Cardinals, will celebrate the funeral Mass for Pope Francis. The funeral ceremony at the Vatican is scheduled to begin at 10 a.m. local time (4 a.m. Eastern, 1 a.m. Pacific). ## California Becomes World's 4th-Largest Economy
California now ranks as the [world’s fourth-largest economy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCnwVusH3CwGRi6eEvXjhaGn4T0t7GAxHKfvnJfodtJJ33S3ddtutlIcb1_2gVNDWlacS-EtWKewhxtzlhqeb78Hbe0YQmvFfMkQFwv0F2EmryNdExd401AFCgbNLzvrkpxrWTzMCqAHhAFB3TD7FxwmktttZAeB6d9E82pQScUB1DA20H1oEH2vdJXLjWwDtDHmnL7THGtDwx0pDfm1qWlIfOodStMfjAxMjHu-97Oszs7JsZzDBOjzTU6wjM6Ogb4oW9OR2qy8dseiWJRPevgvthIf2r91xVvI34DAAD__3oEck8), surpassing Japan, according to international and domestic trackers. California’s gross domestic product reached $4.1 trillion in 2024, surpassing Japan’s $4.01 trillion and ranking behind only the U.S., China, and Germany. Data showed that if California were its own country, its 6% GDP growth rate in 2024 would surpass the U.S. (5.3%), China (2.6%), and Germany (2.9%), making it the [world’s fastest-growing](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2SrCAUBOCn0QyLP0EDgpuYzU03tBAPemYRLGDGnbffmq19g827v-rqj9t8sxgwbv_tAab6NEe4SoBaIc9-QZszlFruj3WDM51Q_CNCnjnlPaGScDWvFsNrlu1qPAAH0YJhWvZKsVGJdjcDFap3vVsApIOejRqGAYRWixZsWFSL5q1RyRWjVFHWDUrTkQqt1dgzMdJGUlixptzdE8a6gw-v9ITcuXS0wey1nqUR_xo-NXy6rqvz6Wt5FIxQyjvT8Alciul4NXxyNqBPOaIlb6PaTyjkbk8byQIuHUCulMNaiKw7CTZvUCr5rbfZrOeFIWBRupF0OyyGnxX1T9c9Df8OAAD__wgKhRw) major economy.

name: History Facts
subject: The loudest sound in history
body:
On May 20, 1883, Krakatoa, a volcano on Rakata Island in Indonesia, erupted with a force never seen — or heard — on Earth. Some 1,300 miles away, residents of islands in the Bay of Bengal reported hearing a series of blasts “resembling those of artillery.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc69ofl6lbcr094z6loeiub4xz6kpv1szdy47p1s51uq567bvnb5ib3x89k9u681w44xv10ir2lbuen4mzl1bcsroa0sow1a9931hw2cwoyxwvw23nxiup3pkm8o461n2uxplmayq73fyt9kqx5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbm7i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [ The loudest known sound was the eruption of the Krakatoa volcano.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbm7i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbm7i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbm7i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| O n May 20, 1883, Krakatoa, a volcano on Rakata Island in Indonesia, erupted with a force never seen — or heard — on Earth. Some 1,300 miles away, residents of islands in the Bay of Bengal [reported hearing](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbm7i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) a series of blasts “resembling those of artillery.” Even farther away, reports from islands in the western Indian Ocean recorded a “distant roar of heavy guns.” As the speed of sound is around 767 miles per hour, Krakatoa’s loud awakening took four hours to reach the distant island of Rodrigues (near Mauritius) roughly 3,000 miles away — and it _still_ delivered sounds as loud as a gun blast.
---
At an estimated 310 decibels, the eruption of Krakatoa is the loudest sound ever recorded in human history. In fact, Krakatoa was so __ loud that for those in close proximity, the sound of the eruption wasn’t a sound at all. That’s because at 194 decibels, acoustic vibration transforms into a shock wave of a sonic boom, and the Krakatoa shock wave was so massive, it circled Earth four times before finally dissipating. For a full five days, weather stations around the world experienced spikes in pressure every 34 hours — approximately how long it takes for sound to circumnavigate the globe. The [Krakatoa eruption ](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbm7i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)was one of the most powerful in history, due to a buildup of pressure in the magma chamber. It delivered the equivalent force of a 200-megaton bomb — four times as powerful as the largest-ever thermonuclear explosion, Tsar Bomba, which produced the loudest human-made sound in history.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbm7i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbm7i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## A massive volcanic eruption in 1815 created a “year without summer.”
Krakatoa wasn’t the only globe-spanning eruption that took place in Indonesia in the 19th century. In April 1815, Mount Tambora, located on Sumbawa Island, exploded and spewed ash some 36 miles into the air, reaching the stratosphere. As this ash, made of sulfur dioxide, circled the globe, it combined with water and formed sulfuric acid, which had the unfortunate side effect of preventing some of the sun’s rays from reaching Earth. This plummeted global temperatures by up to 7 degrees Fahrenheit, and caused climate abnormalities in the West that led to what’s known as “[the year without summer](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbm7i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).” In the U.S., New England’s summer was so unseasonably cold that rivers and lakes as far south as Pennsylvania remained frozen even in July.

clean_body: On May 20, 1883, Krakatoa, a volcano on Rakata Island in Indonesia, erupted with a force never seen — or heard — on Earth. Some 1,300 miles away, residents of islands in the Bay of Bengal reported hearing a series of blasts “resembling those of artillery. | O n May 20, 1883, Krakatoa, a volcano on Rakata Island in Indonesia, erupted with a force never seen — or heard — on Earth. Some 1,300 miles away, residents of islands in the Bay of Bengal a series of blasts “resembling those of artillery.” Even farther away, reports from islands in the western Indian Ocean recorded a “distant roar of heavy guns.” As the speed of sound is around 767 miles per hour, Krakatoa’s loud awakening took four hours to reach the distant island of Rodrigues (near Mauritius) roughly 3,000 miles away — and it still delivered sounds as loud as a gun blast. At an estimated 310 decibels, the eruption of Krakatoa is the loudest sound ever recorded in human history. In fact, Krakatoa was so loud that for those in close proximity, the sound of the eruption wasn’t a sound at all. That’s because at 194 decibels, acoustic vibration transforms into a shock wave of a sonic boom, and the Krakatoa shock wave was so massive, it circled Earth four times before finally dissipating. For a full five days, weather stations around the world experienced spikes in pressure every 34 hours — approximately how long it takes for sound to circumnavigate the globe. The one of the most powerful in history, due to a buildup of pressure in the magma chamber. It delivered the equivalent force of a 200-megaton bomb — four times as powerful as the largest-ever thermonuclear explosion, Tsar Bomba, which produced the loudest human-made sound in history. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . | Together with | | ---|---|--- Thank you for supporting our sponsors! They help us keep History Facts free. By the Numbers | | Islands that make up Indonesia (about 6,000 of which are inhabited) 18,110 | | Krakatoa’s height (in feet) above sea level 2,667 | Krakatoa’s height (in feet) above sea level 2,667 | | Year the Soviet Union detonated the Tsar Bomba 1961 | | Estimated number of active volcanoes worldwide 1,350 | Estimated number of active volcanoes worldwide 1,350 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- A massive volcanic eruption in 1815 created a “year without summer.” Krakatoa wasn’t the only globe-spanning eruption that took place in Indonesia in the 19th century. In April 1815, Mount Tambora, located on Sumbawa Island, exploded and spewed ash some 36 miles into the air, reaching the stratosphere. As this ash, made of sulfur dioxide, circled the globe, it combined with water and formed sulfuric acid, which had the unfortunate side effect of preventing some of the sun’s rays from reaching Earth. This plummeted global temperatures by up to 7 degrees Fahrenheit, and caused climate abnormalities in the West that led to what’s known as “.” In the U.S., New England’s summer was so unseasonably cold that rivers and lakes as far south as Pennsylvania remained frozen even in July. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-3LyHXUSewrXZ_RtPeGTaQ~~/AARclBA~/k47d9TA49f7m8FT_G5Rr2K5Jhm3ZChoWsGCrTA9Wd6P8Khnqdwld4EU08lbh4P8Kc3WVASOT3qhKz2mUtWznv7QhLBm79kmqHEL_VrpmesBLAg0UNdVdKEGHSHeBlScbNfZW6lIkMj2Z6pw7TSUOPw3PDcu4slKySqbsg9QrR8KsqdPV7DylVvS3xDlqOkhv-FoRXlhX52e18k0CCkjozj8wXflpAMXmtURuPJ65mIoaDRfSM30Ty81kNLP0HmCHfwp_etj9-Ige6T690oMDzQifp2xLWLqgOlXQ4IL_UelzLjpRCXOS42yUx9bcQGosnBFzy-xnDyJCqzCAAaid9g~~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-3LyHXUSewrXZ_RtPeGTaQ~~/AARclBA~/k47d9TA49f7m8FT_G5Rr2K5Jhm3ZChoWsGCrTA9Wd6P8Khnqdwld4EU08lbh4P8Kc3WVASOT3qhKz2mUtWznv7QhLBm79kmqHEL_VrpmesBLAg0UNdVdKEGHSHeBlScbNfZW6lIkMj2Z6pw7TSUOPw3PDcu4slKySqbsg9QrR8KsqdPV7DylVvS3xDlqOkhv-FoRXlhX52e18k0CCkjozj8wXflpAMXmtURuPJ65mIoaDRfSM30Ty81kNLP0HmCHfwp_etj9-Ige6T690oMDzQifp2xLWLqgOlXQ4IL_UelzLjpRCXOS42yUx9bcQGosnBFzy-xnDyJCqzCAAaid9g~~) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-3LyHXUSewrXZ_RtPeGTaQ~~/AARclBA~/k47d9TA49f7m8FT_G5Rr2K5Jhm3ZChoWsGCrTA9Wd6P8Khnqdwld4EU08lbh4P8Kc3WVASOT3qhKz2mUtWznv7QhLBm79kmqHEL_VrpmesBLAg0UNdVdKEGHSHeBlScbNfZW6lIkMj2Z6pw7TSUOPw3PDcu4slKySqbsg9QrR8KsqdPV7DylVvS3xDlqOkhv-FoRXlhX52e18k0CCkjozj8wXflpAMXmtURuPJ65mIoaDRfSM30Ty81kNLP0HmCHfwp_etj9-Ige6T690oMDzQifp2xLWLqgOlXQ4IL_UelzLjpRCXOS42yUx9bcQGosnBFzy-xnDyJCqzCAAaid9g~~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-3LyHXUSewrXZ_RtPeGTaQ~~/AARclBA~/k47d9TA49f7m8FT_G5Rr2K5Jhm3ZChoWsGCrTA9Wd6P8Khnqdwld4EU08lbh4P8Kc3WVASOT3qhKz2mUtWznv7QhLBm79kmqHEL_VrpmesBLAg0UNdVdKEGHSHeBlScbNfZW6lIkMj2Z6pw7TSUOPw3PDcu4slKySqbsg9QrR8KsqdPV7DylVvS3xDlqOkhv-FoRXlhX52e18k0CCkjozj8wXflpAMXmtURuPJ65mIoaDRfSM30Ty81kNLP0HmCHfwp_etj9-Ige6T690oMDzQifp2xLWLqgOlXQ4IL_UelzLjpRCXOS42yUx9bcQGosnBFzy-xnDyJCqzCAAaid9g~~)**

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Rare Virga Bomb, Tax-Free Supplies and Autonomous Trucks
body:
A rare wind gust, known as a virga bomb, blasted through West Texas this week at [111 mph](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvyoyAUh59GOxw4IIaCYpt02XZLh8tR2UVxgITk7XfMK_z732W-789jfpgQw7H-Njvq-l7SfGArEWvFPGeT8RXyamzabTXvJSOW53nGGSiMhAoCcvYmxM8seq8t9Yr1qNkkRilHGGW_aQqg2MKdAiqthUVQL_nknOLceAu8D_oaowIkY5SOMAAD7-k0SqPczSrVCYo-1JSHumHFtylL_KQX5sGlvY96q_UsHf_Vwb2De2ttuBAa4r8r0MH92yEtHJ6sz1LJbv6mTLZnzsGZA0lGl7InZTMXNXoCVPIbu_VZ-7OFGEORUyfoupsQv6f1Z6peGv4HAAD__1RlfuM), shattering previous records in the area.

# Saturday, April 26, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1933, comedian and actress [Carol Burnett](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFurDAQgOHTmG6RPdjmUbh4iUS3aVOiMR7AksHIzC7L7aPNFdL_-or_-z7cMaa4zV-4kuPXlIeNziMRM5WhYKFnLDP6vHrG11SIjse-pwEkmJvUN7BDwJiuQVfBeRk6VZFTrTbWGjC2WtzkvbcNNu1oVdeoRkvSnhoCA6PXeqyie2NSg1VKSgM1KAhBtsZiN_7zXSe0pBA5l5oXYnrhMaUrP6nUY16r5Bbm_RDNfwG9gP48z9qXyLhtccR3IqD3Mc8F9-US0H9iyen28SgbMVfFhf2MKcXDtkLLecWYfl3-242ng58AAAD__9b0dPo) was born in San Antonio. She became one of the first women to host her own variety show, _The Carol Burnett Show_ , which aired on CBS from 1967 to 1979. We're all over Texas weather in today's edition. Stay safe out there, especially if you feel an impending [virga bomb](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL_OnDAQxJ8GukW2MeZcuEhz3Zc2JVrby2HF_IlZ4O7tIz7lDdKttDOj-c2vr-ELU07L6yfO5Pg9rsNC156JmcpQsNCZygv9OnvG91iI9mPb8qCE6kBoUGaImPJn0HV0XkQra3Ky150xnepMPTkZpdZImghtlMYaan0vAllqUYxyrJO7w4RWRkohOtUoqWIUfWfQhoe3ttKCYuK1NDwR0xv3MX_Wk0oT1rnObmLe9qr9UalnpZ7XdTXB79I2fFbqiYVTyHQ_CHmicl8TMqQdEL7h4KYDOql8eErLC34v6wXo14OBJ4JjSX8Ogn_-W7hwpZ6dkCCsbmPbPyB434O2hPCwo4HghZU4xjaGvi4ublfKOe2mr7R4zZjyd3X-v8FPp_4GAAD__5FalSo) in the air!
