## Rare Virga Bomb Shatters Wind Record
A rare wind gust, known as a virga bomb, blasted through West Texas this week at [111 mph](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvyoyAUh59GOxw4IIaCYpt02XZLh8tR2UVxgITk7XfMK_z732W-789jfpgQw7H-Njvq-l7SfGArEWvFPGeT8RXyamzabTXvJSOW53nGGSiMhAoCcvYmxM8seq8t9Yr1qNkkRilHGGW_aQqg2MKdAiqthUVQL_nknOLceAu8D_oaowIkY5SOMAAD7-k0SqPczSrVCYo-1JSHumHFtylL_KQX5sGlvY96q_UsHf_Vwb2De2ttuBAa4r8r0MH92yEtHJ6sz1LJbv6mTLZnzsGZA0lGl7InZTMXNXoCVPIbu_VZ-7OFGEORUyfoupsQv6f1Z6peGv4HAAD__1RlfuM), shattering previous records in the area. A [virga bomb](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL_OnDAQxJ8GukW2MeZcuEhz3Zc2JVrby2HF_IlZ4O7tIz7lDdKttDOj-c2vr-ELU07L6yfO5Pg9rsNC156JmcpQsNCZygv9OnvG91iI9mPb8qCE6kBoUGaImPJn0HV0XkQra3Ky150xnepMPTkZpdZImghtlMYaan0vAllqUYxyrJO7w4RWRkohOtUoqWIUfWfQhoe3ttKCYuK1NDwR0xv3MX_Wk0oT1rnObmLe9qr9UalnpZ7XdTXB79I2fFbqiYVTyHQ_CHmicl8TMqQdEL7h4KYDOql8eErLC34v6wXo14OBJ4JjSX8Ogn_-W7hwpZ6dkCCsbmPbPyB434O2hPCwo4HghZU4xjaGvi4ublfKOe2mr7R4zZjyd3X-v8FPp_4GAAD__5FalSo) takes place when heavy rainfall evaporates before hitting the ground, rapidly cooling the air and causing wind to plunge downward at high speeds. The wind gust, recorded at Midland International Air and Space Port, was equivalent to the force of a Category 3 hurricane and caused severe local property damage. Previous local records were 93 mph in June 2007 and 82 mph in July 1987.
## Tornadoes, Hail Rip Through Texas
Severe weather brought tornadoes, hail, and flooding to Texas Thursday night and into Friday. More than [10 tornadoes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO8yAQhJ8Gd45gY_BPQfE37nLtlWgN6xgJBwv2nOTtT0ke4brRzOgbab4v_oIpp9v1Czdy_FiKv9G9ZWKm6itWOlK94ly2mfGxVKL2s-_ZgwTdy6EH4yOm_PRDF90so1UdOTUO2hgN2nSrQ6NGPZM2Z0sBAgQF0oaFFMWgQUGX3AsmBzBKSanhBApilKM2aMO_2VoxSIqJSz3xSkwPbEt-loPqKZSty25l3ps4_xcwCZjuhLx-MgFT41K39hJ0UCUB05EiFQHTG9R_7P5T61dMuedSbxgLta66uN9TzqmZUQzyumHK703-21OHg98AAAD__0pJf3Y) were reported in the state as storms wreaked havoc across the region, affecting Oklahoma and Nebraska as well. [Baseball-sized hail](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQRp8GOiMz2AYKF9vQZdst0RgPMJL5ke1Ask9_lbzCrT99R0fn32N8IAfel7-4kc2v-Rh3ulOgnCmOESNdHBd0x-YyvuZIlJ7nGUaQoIVUAszokcN7VKW3Tvq-LsnWrdLGaNCmXK100pCe9UykGqXQNVPdUic7NIY66Uu2H5hUYOpaSg0V1OC9bLXBfupc3xdKkud8xCqvlOmFaQ7v46JYTcdWBrvmfKai-VPAUMBw33eVD4_vz1rAcLGno4DhexQrZ3FzXkWiiyKJmzCvFAXvU3h63hfhMJHDEETi_-TFihwENF0DqpO6U7KM1p83h8DJtIWSy4Ycvib5d_0uCz8BAAD__w6ThbU) slammed cities in Northwest Texas with car windshields taking the brunt of the damage, while Corsicana saw nearly four inches of rain Thursday, flooding roadways. A [respite](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSmzAQhJ9GdPKIswSmUJGG7k-bkjnQYTQRkud0NvbbZ_ArpN79dnb3z8_0gzHFfP-NO3l5r2XKdNREIsQTI9Mr8h3nss-C75WJ6vPxSBMYcNpYDd0UMKbPZJvgZxOGtiHf9tZ1nQPXNZt316HFKzp7xX64LTTcBuv6G6Iz1oYemujPMGOha1tjHFyghRBM7zoclts8DMoaClEKX2QjoTfWNX3Ki_iylL1JfhN5VHX9pWBUMB7HcVnmeq44dQXjF1EwvmKgomAM_NFLySFKLLnqtbDeSxVdVp0Ly6a_gF45BvzomdbCpJcN80Knp0rhvWomeXLWmd6iD6K_CsaGfXgcMaVYu15Zc98xpm9J-b9rXx7-BQAA__-pC5DA) is in the forecast over the weekend, with a chance of storms returning next week.
## Dallas, Houston Parks Win High Rankings
Two Texas public spaces landed on _USA Today_ ’s list of the 10 [best city parks](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCnMR1ovTEmFC7-hi5_eyVa8JJYZ2JkbxJ4-xP3CtfOjL5ivm7jjUIMz_t_WtnJvqTxyZ8SWYTzmCnzO-Q7TWmdhPYlM5fXtsURAdsaTI129BTiMZrKuwl8ryt2ujOttS22tnq4Tl_B6nlBsNbQrL2ZjNe2v4CBM6qCOzEwaLUGaLFBjd5D11rq5-vU98oA-yApN_Jg4Z3KEo_05tzMaa2ie4hsRV3-KRwUDhomLtK8CknydJwbhQN9KPuicDjLeg5y1Bvlb4VDlZ3fPiHGUGynDNxXCvFXlr_98Xb4EwAA__9JGnOb) in the country. Discovery Green in downtown Houston came in at No. 6, offering 12 acres full of interactive water features suited for the Houston heat. Right on Discovery Green’s heels, Dallas’ Klyde Warren Park took the No. 7 spot, spanning five acres and sitting on top of an old, sunken freeway. You can see the full [top 10 here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCnMR1ovTEmFC7-hi5_eyVa8JJYZ2JkbxJ4-xP3CtfOjL5ivm7jjUIMz_t_WtnJvqTxyZ8SWYTzmCnzO-Q7TWmdhPYlM5fXtsURAdsaTI129BTiMZrKuwl8ryt2ujOttS22tnq4Tl_B6nlBsNbQrL2ZjNe2v4CBM6qCOzEwaLUGaLFBjd5D11rq5-vU98oA-yApN_Jg4Z3KEo_05tzMaa2ie4hsRV3-KRwUDhomLtK8CknydJwbhQN9KPuicDjLeg5y1Bvlb4VDlZ3fPiHGUGynDNxXCvFXlr_98Xb4EwAA__9JGnOb), which has highest honors going to Bonnet Springs Park in Lakeland, Florida.

clean_body: A rare wind gust, known as a virga bomb, blasted through West Texas this week at , shattering previous records in the area. | | | | | | Saturday, April 26, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1933, comedian and actress was born in San Antonio. She became one of the first women to host her own variety show, The Carol Burnett Show , which aired on CBS from 1967 to 1979. We're all over Texas weather in today's edition. Stay safe out there, especially if you feel an impending in the air! Today’s sponsor is . As a Christian, are you feeling overwhelmed by headlines? Stay informed with the news while remaining focused on Christ with . Abilene 🌩️ 80/66° | Amarillo ⛈️ 70/57° | Austin 🌩️ 87/69° | Brownsville ⛅ 87/75° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 84/74° | DFW 🌩️ 83/67° | El Paso ☀️ 91/59° | Houston ⛅ 84/70° | Laredo 🌦️ 92/73° | Lubbock ⛈️ 74/63° | Midland 🌩️ 81/68° | San Antonio 🌩️ 87/70° | Tyler ⛈️ 85/67° | Waco ☁️ 84/66° | Rare Virga Bomb Shatters Wind Record A rare wind gust, known as a virga bomb, blasted through West Texas this week at , shattering previous records in the area. A takes place when heavy rainfall evaporates before hitting the ground, rapidly cooling the air and causing wind to plunge downward at high speeds. The wind gust, recorded at Midland International Air and Space Port, was equivalent to the force of a Category 3 hurricane and caused severe local property damage. Previous local records were 93 mph in June 2007 and 82 mph in July 1987. Tornadoes, Hail Rip Through Texas Severe weather brought tornadoes, hail, and flooding to Texas Thursday night and into Friday. More than were reported in the state as storms wreaked havoc across the region, affecting Oklahoma and Nebraska as well. slammed cities in Northwest Texas with car windshields taking the brunt of the damage, while Corsicana saw nearly four inches of rain Thursday, flooding roadways. A is in the forecast over the weekend, with a chance of storms returning next week. Dallas, Houston Parks Win High Rankings Two Texas public spaces landed on USA Today ’s list of the 10 in the country. Discovery Green in downtown Houston came in at No. 6, offering 12 acres full of interactive water features suited for the Houston heat. Right on Discovery Green’s heels, Dallas’ Klyde Warren Park took the No. 7 spot, spanning five acres and sitting on top of an old, sunken freeway. You can see the full , which has highest honors going to Bonnet Springs Park in Lakeland, Florida. The Flyover is just like The Texas Flyover, except it covers news from all 50 states. | Flying together with our sponsor Your home for politically-neutral, Christ-first news Tired of feeling like you have to pick a side just to stay informed? Whether you’re in Dallas or out where the bluebonnets bloom, helps you engage with the news––without the bias, outrage, or anxiety. , they deliver quick, entertaining news summaries paired with short biblical reminders to keep you rooted in Christ, not the chaos. Instead of fueling division, the news becomes a tool to strengthen your faith and spark loving action in response. Over 1 million readers are already on board, including folks from every corner of the Lone Star State, and staying informed with Christ-first, anger-free, and even kinda funny news. The initial designs sparked a year long debate in the community. () ➤ Chambers County: Signage for the wildlife refuge renamed in memory of 12-year-old Jocelyn Nungaray was unveiled during a ceremony Thursday. Nungaray was killed by two illegal immigrants last June. body:

**_Hey ,_** I just brought this weapon back to the market. It sold out (within 48 hours) for 5 main reasons:
* **Blinding Brightness** – 5 LEDs push out over **2200 lumens
**
* **Built for Defense** – Spiked crown to break glass or debilitate attacker

* **Hands-Free Power** – Magnetic grip + indestructible clip for headlamp use

* **Tough as Nails** – 5X thicker Tank Plate Alloy housing

* **Multi-Mode Versatility** – 8 light modes, including SOS & red flash

I am excited to announce something new... There's a brand new color variant (and it's my personal favorite). **These two inch weapons are now 50% off for a limited time...** [SEE IF THERE ARE ANY LEFT HERE:](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21310/6374453/49fd0458b0a942a69932c9c5adcf71710518ba0a/582f5f40a56e5563a90f2b754d6b80dc6b85efa6)

name: Lesley Davis
subject: The Cultural Tide Is Turning
body:
** Maybe We’re Not Losing the Culture — Maybe We’re Starting to Win It Back
------------------------------------------------------------

For a long time, it felt like the left owned the culture in America. Faith was mocked, tradition sidelined, and if you dared to talk about God or morality in a public setting, you were dismissed as backward or out of touch.

But something is changing. And it’s not just in politics. It’s in the culture — the part we were told we lost for good.

Case in point: American Idol’s recent “night of worship.” On Easter Sunday, one of the biggest shows in pop culture history opened with a song praising Jesus, featured multiple worship performances, and even had Carrie Underwood singing about her faith in front of millions. The whole night felt more like church than a talent competition — and it wasn’t niche or corny. It was beautiful. It was bold. And it struck a nerve.

This is what cultural realignment looks like.

** The Leftward Drift Has Hit a Wall 🚧
------------------------------------------------------------

For years, American culture marched steadily leftward. Entertainment, academia, big business — all seemed captured by progressive ideology. Christian values were relegated to the sidelines. Traditional families were sneered at. The faith that built this country was treated as a private eccentricity, best kept quiet in polite society.

But that top-down pressure never fully reflected the values of everyday Americans. And now, after years of being told to keep quiet, people are finding their voices again. It’s not just political. It’s cultural. It’s spiritual. And it’s long overdue.

What we saw on American Idol wasn’t just entertainment. It was a signal. Americans are hungry for more than the moral confusion that has dominated the culture for too long. They’re tired of being told that faith doesn’t belong in the public square.

That night wasn’t angry or combative — it was joyful, reverent, and real. And it reminded people that worship isn’t just for Sunday mornings or private Facebook groups. It belongs right where people are — even on prime-time television.

This is why the cultural shift matters. We’re not just defending against bad ideas anymore. We’re creating good ones. We’re building culture again — and it’s resonating.

** The Realignment Is Bigger Than Politics 🗳️
------------------------------------------------------------

Some people think this “realignment” is just about politics — about voters moving from left to right, or coalitions reshuffling. But that’s only part of the story. What we’re seeing is something deeper: a rediscovery of the values that sustain a nation.

Hard work. Family. Faith. Community. Patriotism. These aren’t relics of the past. They’re foundations. And for too long, they’ve been treated as obstacles to progress rather than anchors in a storm.

Now, regular people — not celebrities or politicians — are reclaiming them. They’re starting classical schools. They’re homeschooling in massive numbers. They’re launching small businesses rooted in faith. They’re sharing scripture on TikTok and filling stadiums to worship. And yes, they’re watching American Idol with tears in their eyes because it’s finally speaking to something deeper than celebrity.

** Young People Are Leaning In 🙋♂️
------------------------------------------------------------
Here’s something the media doesn’t want to admit: this isn’t just an old-person movement. A surprising number of young Americans — especially young men — are waking up to the emptiness of modern culture and looking for something more meaningful. They’re turning to faith. They’re embracing tradition. We’ve seen videos where hundreds or thousands of students at college campuses across the country are saying they can’t do it alone and are being baptized in any body of water they can find.

For years, we were told the next generation would be more liberal, more secular, more “progressive.” But that forecast is starting to look more like wishful thinking than reality.

** This Is a Cultural Moment — Let’s Not Miss It ⏳
------------------------------------------------------------
So what do we do with all this?

We keep going.

We support artists and shows that aren’t afraid to honor faith and family. We build institutions — schools, media outlets, churches, businesses — that reflect our values. We raise our kids to love truth and beauty, not just chase likes and trends. And we stop assuming we’re losing the culture, because we’re not.

If anything, we’re starting to win it back.

No, this doesn’t mean we’ll win every battle. There’s still hostility. There’s still mockery. But there’s also a growing awareness — even among those outside our circles — that the old scripts aren’t working. People want more. And we have something to offer.

The Easter episode of American Idol didn’t solve everything. But it reminded us what’s possible. That the sacred still moves hearts. That truth still speaks. And that maybe — just maybe — the cultural tide is turning.

We’re not here to burn the culture down. We’re here to redeem it.

And that work is just getting started.

Let's keep going!

Please check out previous stories here (https://msadvocacygroup.substack.com) .

============================================================

You can ** update your preferences (https://gmail.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=38e7573a4604819e3af8c7b86&id=340f7406c8&e=6f9b7d8fd0&c=bc16758d15)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://gmail.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=38e7573a4604819e3af8c7b86&id=340f7406c8&t=b&e=6f9b7d8fd0&c=bc16758d15)

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Act Blue - The Take Down is Coming
body:
6 years in the making - we finally have action

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=11445659af)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice.”
Martin Luther King Jr.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| **Before we dive in, I want to take a moment to thank the true Connecticut patriots who stood shoulder to shoulder with me throughout this six-year journey—one that has brought us to the brink of real accountability and change.**
This victory is not mine alone. It belongs to every person who believed in the importance of exposing this issue and fought to bring it into the light.
To **Chris Coyle** , Chairman of the Pomfret RTC—your commitment from day one has been nothing short of heroic. I could not have asked for a better partner in this mission.To **Mary Ann Turner** , our tireless State Party Vice Chair, thank you for your unwavering support.To **Jackie Homan** of the _Connecticut Sentinel_ , thank you for your fearless reporting and journalistic integrity.To Anne **Manusky** and the CTRA, your persistence kept the flame burning.To **Leora Levy** , RNC Chairwoman—thank you for opening doors in D.C. that helped elevate this cause to the national stage.And to **Gary Byron** , whose **megaphone** gave this issue a voice, and kept it echoing across Connecticut—thank you.
Achievements like these are never the work of one person. They are the product of unity, resolve, and belief in something bigger than ourselves.
So I ask you, my fellow Americans, as we stand on the precipice of justice...
**Are you tired of winning yet?**

---
| [Link to Daily Signal Article](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=481052e8f6&e=8763c56857)
---
| **Trump to Order Investigation Into ActBlue for Potentially Illegal Fundraising Methods****Elizabeth Troutman Mitchell | April 24, 2025**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=a7205187fd&e=8763c56857)
|
---
| **News Flash | Act Blue Takedown**
President Donald Trump will sign a presidential memorandum Thursday launching an **investigation into ActBlue for potentially illegal methods of fundraising for Democrats,**
The Daily Signal has learned.
The memo directs Attorney General Pam Bondi to investigate and take appropriate action concerning allegations regarding the use of online fundraising platforms to make “straw” or “dummy” contributions and to make foreign contributions to U.S. political candidates and committees.
**ActBlue is currently under congressional investigation for alleged laundering of foreign money.**
Federal Election Commission records show that in recent elections, some elderly Americans made thousands of small donations to Democrat fundraising political committees through ActBlue, The Daily Signal previously reported.
Individuals may have made numerous donations through ActBlue without their consent or knowledge that their names, addresses, and money were being used for these donations, Rep. Claudia Tenney, R-N.Y., co-chair of the Election Integrity Caucus, told The Daily Signal.
The presidential memorandum notes that a congressional investigation revealed significant fraud schemes using ActBlue and, over a 30-day period during the 2024 election cycle, hundreds of ActBlue donations from foreign IP addresses using prepaid cards, despite it being illegal for foreign nationals to contribute to U.S. elections.
ActBlue came under fire on Oct. 29 because of its donor-verification policies. In a letter that day to ActBlue, **House Administration Committee Chairman Bryan Steil, R-Wis., said foreign actors from Iran, Russia, Venezuela, and China could use the platform to launder illicit money for use in U.S. political campaigns.**
The Democratic fundraising platform admitted in 2023 to Steil that it didn’t require contributors to use a card verification value, or CVV, to donate on its website with a credit card. Those security codes are meant to ensure that the person making a purchase physically possesses the credit card. The memo instructs Bondi to report the results of the investigation to Trump through the Counsel to the President.
ActBlue may have raked in millions through fraudulent donations, according to the testimonies of elderly Americans who said federal election records do not reflect their giving, The Daily Signal has reported.
**Eighteen registered Democrats in Connecticut, all over the age of 70, appear to have donated $1.9 million to Democratic causes, including ActBlue, through hundreds of thousands of small donations from 2016 to 2024, according to a review of Federal Election Commission filings by Dominic Rapini, cybersecurity company CEO and a former Connecticut Republican candidate for office.**
Curious about the donation patterns, **Rapini tracked down some of the Connecticut residents and asked them if they really did make thousands of small donations, sometimes multiple in a day, through ActBlue.**
Several of the supposed donors told Rapini they did not make any of the reported donations, nor did they know anything about how their names were being used, Rapini told The Daily Signal.
ActBlue did not immediately respond to The Daily Signal’s request for comment about the forthcoming investigation.
ActBlue CEO and President Regina Wallace-Jones sent an email to Democrats on Wednesday warning about rumors of the executive order.
“The current strategy of distraction and exhaustion is effective. We see this across the country and are not immune to this ourselves,” her email said, according to Punchbowl News. “The flow-on effect from the initial innuendo of the EO caused many in the ecosystem anxiety and distress.”

---
|
# ... And I gave AG Tong a Chance but AG Bondi is doing his job for him
---
|
---

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Is Your Lawmaker Driving Mississippi’s Success?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msfreedomindex?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **Mississippi is rising. ****Economic output in our state grew more in the past five years than it did over the previous fifteen.**
---
|
---
_Mississippi rising...._
| Over the past five years, our state’s economic output has surged by $41.4 billion, growing from $116.1 billion in 2019 to $157.5 billion in 2024 (Federal Reserve Bank of St Louis data).

**This growth didn’t happen by chance.** This momentum has been fueled by pro-growth policies such as 2021 labor market deregulation, low-cost energy, and 2022 tax reforms, which began to journey towards income tax elimination.

**These victories for pro-growth policies were driven by principled conservative leaders who fought for change against fierce opposition from leftist lawmakers wedded to the status quo.** MCPP recently celebrated some of those that have championed pro-growth policies.
---
|
---
---
| _Mississippi Freedom Awards 2025_
---
| **But what about _your_ local lawmaker?** Are they supporting Mississippi’s pro-growth policies, or are they holding us back?

**Find out using the new Mississippi Freedom Index!**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=85659575bd&e=5703353baa)
---
[_Click on the image above to check your lawmaker's record._](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=81d3b91ccd&e=5703353baa)
| This tool reveals how your representative voted on key pro-growth policies, their campaign finance contributions, and lets you message them directly.

**Any lawmaker that opposed these four pro-growth policies isn’t a conservative in our opinion. **
---
|
---
_Where did your local lawmaker stand on the four flagship growth policies in our state? _
| **Despite having a massive conservative majority in Mississippi, our state often fails to implement basic conservative policies, such as school choice, because there is a lack of accountability.**

Solid conservative bills keep vanishing—“dying in committee”—with no explanation and no record of votes. Lawmakers that don’t want to deliver pro-growth policies have been able to make a few evasive comments on Supertalk and escape any consequences.

**With this new tool ordinary people across the state can check up on what their representative actually did – or failed to do.**

_Any lawmaker that does not like the way we’ve rated them is free to contact us. They can post their remarks, or if they are willing to publicly come out to support policies that they might not actually have voted for, we are willing to change how we’ve rated them! _

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=cf2ec63549&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| P.S. Visit [mspolicy.org](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=08471d786b&e=5703353baa) to learn more about our mission to advance pro-growth policies in Mississippi!
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=0d2cab6893) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=0d2cab6893).

name: [Quick Update via New Dems!!!]
subject: Are you able to spare $1?

subject: re: Elizabeth Warren DROPS THE HAMMER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Trump wants to force her silence
| Elizabeth Warren just wrote a SCATHING op-ed for Fox News slamming Trump’s attacks on Social Security: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89444?t=6&akid=19642%2E878179%2ElMjq6S) **The MAGA mob is FUMING — Trump will do anything to force her silence!**

[**We need 500 local Democrats to stand with Warren in her fight: Donate $3 to add your signature to our thank you card! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89444?t=7&akid=19642%2E878179%2ElMjq6S) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89444?t=8&akid=19642%2E878179%2ElMjq6S)
---
TO: Senator Elizabeth Warren
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Sen. Warren,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge to save Social Security!**

Donald Trump and Elon Musk are TERRIFIED of strong Democrats like you — that’s why you’re at the top of their revenge list.

Please know that millions of Americans have your back. I REFUSE to stand idly by and let my hard-earned Social Security be stolen by MAGA billionaires!

**We know Trump and Musk will _lie, break the law,_ and do _everything possible_ to destroy Social Security — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do!**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89444?t=9&akid=19642%2E878179%2ElMjq6S) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89444?t=10&akid=19642%2E878179%2ElMjq6S)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19642%2E878179%2ElMjq6S). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19642%2E878179%2ElMjq6S).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19642%2E878179%2ElMjq6S) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19642%2E878179%2ElMjq6S). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19642%2E878179%2ElMjq6S)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19642%2E878179%2ElMjq6S)

Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. Trump and Elon are trying to break Social Security.

We are currently witnessing an orchestrated effort by the Trump administration to dismantle this critical program by peddling a false narrative of widespread fraud without the evidence to back it up.

They are lying about Social Security fraud. Why? Because they want to cut your benefits, slow down services, and lay off workers. They are playing games with millions of people’s livelihoods in order to privatize something workers have already earned.

You read that right: **This is simply privatization propaganda.**

Trump is putting Americans’ hard-earned benefits at risk, and we have got to fight back.

Together,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. name: Democrats.org
subject: We’re investing more than $1 million a month in state parties:
body:
---
Derek, we know you get a lot of donation requests from campaigns and organizations like ours. But if you have a minute, we’d like to explain exactly what we’ll do with your $3 contribution if you pitch in to the DNC today. Here we go: The DNC and Association of State Democratic Committees recently announced a historic "organize everywhere, win anywhere” strategy – a four-year agreement to deliver more resources than ever before to Democratic state and territory parties. _Each state party_ will receive a baseline of $17,500 a month, a $5,000 per month increase over the last agreement, and Republican-controlled states will receive an additional investment of $5,000 a month through the DNC’s Red State Fund, putting their total at $22,500 every month. Every state party will benefit: [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250426_3266_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3266_22930333_2xrRXU&akid=3266%2E22930333%2E2xrRXU) **The combined investments total a monthly transfer of more than $1 million from the DNC to state parties — the committee’s largest investment into Democratic state parties in history.** Strategic investments like these don’t just matter in presidential or statewide races. They have a powerful **multiplier effect** _(nested opportunities, as we like to call it)_ for Democrats down the ballot, too — which is absolutely essential as we work to elect more leaders who will check Trump’s power. These investments will allow state parties to build critical infrastructure and hire more staff, strengthen their data and tech operations, strengthen their on-the-ground organizing programs, and better prepare for upcoming election cycles — not just in the months ahead, but in the years to come. [**When you chip in $3 to support the DNC, your contribution goes directly toward funding work like this. Can we count on you to make a $3 donation now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250426_3266_fr&refcode2=3266_22930333_2xrRXU&akid=3266%2E22930333%2E2xrRXU) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250426_3266_fr&refcode2=3266_22930333_2xrRXU&akid=3266%2E22930333%2E2xrRXU)**

---

| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20250426_3266_fr&refcode2=3266_22930333_2xrRXU&akid=3266%2E22930333%2E2xrRXU)**

| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20250426_3266_fr&refcode2=3266_22930333_2xrRXU&akid=3266%2E22930333%2E2xrRXU)**

****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250426_3266_fr&refcode2=3266_22930333_2xrRXU&akid=3266%2E22930333%2E2xrRXU)**

Thank you so much for reading through — and for being a part of this fight.
The Democrats

body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/BIbfDCnsum-LHc6XFH-2KOKi1rWwDLMJR5-WYEZe7364czD4EmjXVPHYUFDenQjgckyOXB36EzFqdlpRNkSg0n2OU115z7ay2BLDV4A6hi_Ku8LkHfrx2EfrFplWSnZRwFspaCj7TQT3L9PvzNqC6Qf4hKMcJR9dlOalplYzdzJBKmjFC0PpEi3U6kYlo8j8P3y6qSqd0cILAt63IZAl1HD2H5uxctI3HN0ifjgkwVI4hB-V7ORUNsmUj_RW17jJUeaG4HA/rqlgZvFvb-gCMA0j-FWTn_-8Q3QSTG_h/8)

| |
## The Hidden Taxes of Regulation Make the Case for DOGE
The government doesn’t just directly charge Americans in taxes—it also imposes a hidden tax that makes everything more expensive, according to a new report. The federal government doesn’t just pass laws in Congress. Each year, many of the 438 federal agencies—nominally under the president’s control through the executive branch—publish tens of thousands of pages in [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/rwi3efYpMFrpC1ouuj0bQJpRhswxCeafhhZngZPmZqrsj5_pYKm6XLJumXjkJ_Tb5ZJDdvbyDKFSL0IUgUc2hEzl7vtsXBkvuP9ag2f-4cl8buO7_f1lY8iVi43qSsNh52C3uZRkg_fBNkLu_89dEEfPZdvKfHwAzVgj4StG2nWdnQz2IS_mH_x1VluHA-DrpnZkls0KGhRpOWJGfAEgM2RCQ69axSszhuGta2T5BZHHk9imyj8Xvtsx2t_LqVXpB7lB9t5TdpEnxWqyScoMVSaF9vwws_6a8CD7f-uTyx98wpkJn-B3JX14SMwtM_WwSk9ZdFk9Lu49_cAQCgc/1JspcLYT4DpJJJHdCnoWrSz7lEySYGO6/8)
---
| |
## Jeffrey Epstein Sexual Abuse Accuser Virginia Giuffre Has Died by Suicide at Age 41 – RedState
Anyone who’s followed the Jeffrey Epstein sexual abuse/sex trafficking saga will be familiar with the name Virginia Giuffre, one of the best known victim-survivors of Epstein’s criminal enterprise with cohort Ghislaine Maxwell. As my colleague Jennifer Van Laar wrote in February, Attorney General Pam Bondi made a partial release of the FBI’s files on [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Pua8Nfu5DypZNgSm77kmbiKDDbTIvAUZYx5lSu8eA0HXzY3BtUTPh5nJzq-E7Vzvs_kqCHuNGDB3DMiUgB9c51fARaONJHV4UyXmw92T-hmfhwlT6s9dsKTVtSyTmz8_rImkhfjUn0Wx5bFEIzzg2iJQHaezMtCnr7z9s9m7fr2mWedEOynoKJVc7BI9Qj9zXdWtm5ZOhhOs3JjsHikXdk8h5-HqM0sJlsx15gkv5fplao0XDrYdFMfI3fzz73l8-_v_eB_s5OpqunpgmmmiC38Vil3CAYk1-Jk9tJuZzYlJ-YMGAW0Wem6-HMIXX0skPUynkF_P67mQhncuEtWvil0Uz9AytimKL0z-Q9l6gGpb0ZaaLtkaeoK6EKFodEXQJJRJQPo/XmcxCNhCnRTa-ZX-oAk-wYI0iWajvx8L/8)
---
| |
## The Evening Docket – Montana Saves the Day – RedState
Friday was a slightly less eventful day in the courts (compared with Thursday), but there were still some rulings of note. I made a point to tweet them out as I encountered them — I thought that might make it a little easier to keep track of them. We’ll give that a try and [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/KTIgF47N7-sMG14q7Y9UjxM_VDTVsfnCFf8VJPVAdNQaCImLvehelDyE5rpGZjm9sW0ZWMMLyzDB2gPUL5YEc9NTOuQEQcnTBSfM54CGMrbs7CFdxsqE-QrYRStVh988z62grgl7BG97FCmxTzv8a1VCfjngD3uaJPjF0A2RffyrxoIbHkMpNCsWCheWAKewh6IvpFV5FSBnyZjFwL7h4ooEWPBMrmfugq9rj4qo98iL_xg5elhxYurLsq5MCZC428tepY3qoCJGDjU_Scaw7r4FkF8ajIHsKc7IulGnJy2ynsbKws3M440paQnAGz84ky0mIZipWt3UnA/8I1RVLLmWlvVc9rP6rbt1VQRwzYY5mGy/8)
---
| |
## Patel Levels Dems Over Judge’s Arrest With One Photo; Even CNN Admits They Have a Problem – RedState
Democrats were losing their minds on Friday over the arrest of Milwaukee Count Circuit Judge Hannah Dugan. Dugan has now been charged with “obstructing or impeding proceeding before a department or agency of the United States,” and “concealing an individual to prevent his discovery and arrest.” Having already made the [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/gda4YdHlWMVBjnaJVEgKZUN_yr7343wgYi3As8q9EdwEYHXcNXwwijSnSc70l6as6JZh-HvWwkF3LyQ1VlsNByrgHZpobFpR8-i27y6QYqt-y2Rdy5pzW0Sf3ZU-b7SEy5QyKbG1eZ5PetLQZcRIpvPVLLxoF-HDo1lNAVIiNrqB0tnqkcHaz43ESPEQkdnQxXmIKQ70B99uEhzMbovErYZeVRAFGdh22YdZ975p1FBntwYBXY3eWN2JezYs__i5IinvoYLvu1x7VQgPqku_M6D34Nz6oiNTw9xPrC1V4aQAZnGv9--v2rx-sMx6CCn5_zTwDoLK6U_EfuVnSx9jaqn4PTqrs9hsIGWqR7QEMDbM1zwtZUWSpzmXKxQOJ73kIIR0d0X8rvYy/4kyc53FXO3ByESjxy9ELTqXGe7n7h3Z_/8)
---
| |

Peter, did you see this message?

The Trump administration has continued to enact significant changes to U.S. foreign policy over the past week, including Trump stating that Russia not “taking the whole country” of Ukraine is a “pretty big concession” for the attempted peace deal.

As our email from earlier this week (forwarded below) showed: women rarely have a seat at the table as men across the world are failing to achieve peace. Our current government, powered by toxic masculinity, is ultimately working to escalate tension through trade wars and cuts to programs that promote inclusion and human rights.

International data shows that **when women are involved in peace agreements, peace is 35% more likely to last 15+ years.** On the flip side, war disproportionately impacts women – often in radical and unimaginably dangerous ways. Trade wars and a global recession will be no different. It is undeniable that we need more women in government on the defensive lines blocking the Trump administration’s efforts to destroy our economy and our standing on the global stage.

[**We’ve seen the way the women in our government have played an outsized role in pushing back against the Trump agenda. -President Trump escalated the ongoing trade war with China even further by announcing new tariffs on Chinese-owned ships docking in the U.S.

-Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is under fire after the public learned of yet another Signal chat in which details of the Yemen attack were sent to his wife, his brother, his personal attorney and many others.

-The Trump administration suspended all military aid to Ukraine and Marco Rubio told reporters, “If it is not possible to end the war in Ukraine, we need to move on,” as he departed meetings in Paris.

And here’s the thing: **According to international data, when women are involved in peace agreements, peace is 35% more likely to last 15+ years.** On the flipside, war disproportionately impacts women – often in radical and unimaginably dangerous ways. A trade war and global recession will be no different.

The news coming out of Washington has been a stark reminder that we need more pragmatic women in our government. This isn’t just a symbolic point about the vast benefits of DEI or representation (though that point cannot be overstated). It’s a valid concern on behalf of anyone in the world who isn’t a white man, **as these are the people making the decisions about our lives, our safety, and our futures.**

At Her Bold Move, we understand our responsibility in this moment. We know that our best defense against the dangerous (and yes, truly toxic masculinity) of the Trump administration is to elect MORE WOMEN to the U.S. government. **It is critical to our pursuit of national security and to getting as close to world peace as possible.**

[**Thanks to Trump and the unqualified loyalists he has brought into our government, our democracy, our economy, and our national security remain as fragile as ever. But brave women continue to serve as much-needed checks and balances, blocking potential damage at every turn. Help us elect more of them to office in 2025 and 2026 by pitching in $20.25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106549575/541878546/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250428fwd_N_CB_90DO_5_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3M2U1N2E4LWE0MjItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-CF4m-nInrslWj0lMNb88H0cpQRx4pHopaCbxyyA2f8=)

Together,

Erica Henry

name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Demand that Attorney General Pam Bondi be Disbarred
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Attorney General Pam Bondi be Disbarred](https://default.salsalabs.org/T808e725e-6326-408c-8de5-d4e27faa0173/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T871e13de-6181-428a-b37f-103d5412fa1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Attorney General Pam Bondi is the highest law enforcement official in America. And yet she seems to have no problem [ignoring basic Constitutional and legal principles](https://default.salsalabs.org/T012e8aa9-c64a-4ca9-9966-2ba08a2d8e65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and using selective enforcement and threats for political benefit. [**Which is why she should be disbarred and sanctioned by legal regulators, and prevented from practicing law.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1eb71b9b-6f93-421a-bcda-3911f1cfd0fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Bondi is ignoring orders from courts, and even [arresting judges](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e03d5ff-608d-4ef1-8872-f876279a76f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) as a means of intimidation. She is [selectively](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52493abe-e442-4448-a8a9-f9c692586f45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) going after a Democratic technology firm critical to Democratic candidate fundraising -- without any evidence. In short, she is doing the bidding of Donald Trump, who has clearly shown he couldn't give a hoot about the law, when she should be working for the country. Lawyers are expected to follow certain minimal, basic standards, or they lose the privilege to practice law. And with Bondi, it's not even a close call. [**Add your name: Demand that AG Pam Bondi be disbarred >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a5daa51-2e9f-415d-aee3-63b5fcc38fac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08e87a88-3b59-43f8-8551-380bbd0ec9db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: New Hampshire ≠ Illinois
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
Have you heard?
| | | | [](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---

Derek,
The New Hampshire Democrat Party just made it crystal clear where they want to take our state — and it’s not a place any of us want to go.
They’re bringing in Illinois Governor J.B. Pritzker to headline their big event. That’s right — the governor of a state known for crushing taxes, soaring crime, and people fleeing by the thousands is coming here to tell us how to run New Hampshire.
We know what Illinois looks like under Democrat control:
❌ Higher taxes
❌ Rampant crime
❌ Broken budgets
❌ Families and businesses leaving
That’s the Pritzker model — and that’s the model New Hampshire Democrats are embracing.
Here in New Hampshire, we do things differently:
✅ We keep taxes low
✅ We keep our communities safe
✅ We protect our freedoms
✅ We make it possible for families and businesses to thrive
We cannot let New Hampshire be dragged down the same failed path as Illinois. [Can you donate $5 or $10 today to make sure we have the resources to win?](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
I’m fighting everyday to protect what makes New Hampshire strong — [but I can’t do it without you.](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
[Together, we’ll keep New Hampshire the best place in America to live, work, and raise a family](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) — **and we’ll make sure that our future looks nothing like the failures of Illinois.**
Let’s get to work.
Onward,
**Rep. Joe Sweeney**
Chairman, Granite Solutions

[Donate Today](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
| | | Paid for by Granite Solutions. Rep. Joe Sweeney, Chairman. www.GraniteSolutions.org
https://snh.nucleusemail.com/amplify/subscriptions/unsubscribe?hids=ncedzhyAu0wlls

With the DCCC raising record setting amounts of money, the House Majority PAC targeting me, and a new Democrat opponent in the race, knowing where I stand is more important than ever.

**Fair Fight Action is a national leader in the fight to ensure voting rights and to protect democracy.**
With your support, this team has continued to mitigate the effects of voter suppression, run cutting-edge and culturally competent voter education programs, and stop legislation that would restrict the freedom to vote.
Last year, when disinformation and changing rules threatened to prevent people from getting to the polls, Fair Fight Action developed a sophisticated, groundbreaking voter protection chatbot to provide accessible, multilingual voting information.
Earlier this month, when Georgia lawmakers were trying to ram through yet more voter suppression legislation, Fair Fight Action raised the alarm, rallied Georgians, and helped stop those anti-voter measures from passing into law.
And now that the U.S. Senate is our last chance to block the so-called SAVE Act, a stunning assault on voter rights that could disenfranchise millions of people through a modern poll tax, Fair Fight Action has reached out to over 200,000 Americans urging them to contact their senators and demand a no vote.
[**This model — of organizing and outreach, of education and advocacy — has delivered results and will continue to ensure progress, but the Fair Fight Action team counts on grassroots support from people like you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106552639/541883421/-99196721?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250426_f_StaceyAbramsEOMNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTJlMzg5YS1hNjIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmSdQHlMMci5IOcLCqDc5kfMARRcQ0qihtGe6k_aM4s=)
Together, we can push back against the shameless voter suppression plans being proposed across the country, which would push us in the direction of Jim Crow, when the freedom to vote was not a freedom for all.
Together, we can stop anti-voter attacks — including mass voter purges and restrictions on early voting — from spreading across the country.
And together, we can take back our democracy from the oligarchs and their minions.
[**Your donation can help Fair Fight Action mobilize at a moment’s notice, and the threats to free and fair elections couldn’t be more urgent. Please make a donation today to fight for our rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106552641/541883424/-99196721?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250426_f_StaceyAbramsEOMNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTJlMzg5YS1hNjIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmSdQHlMMci5IOcLCqDc5kfMARRcQ0qihtGe6k_aM4s=)

Stacey Abrams

body:
With free and fair elections being undermined on multiple fronts, there’s never been a more urgent time to pitch in.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106553903/541886589/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4OWU0M2MwLWE2MjItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_y_8NrQ7DXJBHuzUyDFdSO6lsgAhsfjmEFPIEieG8E8=&emci=0ca6998a-0622-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=789e43c0-a622-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Recently, the GOP-controlled House of Representatives passed the SAVE Act — an extreme anti-voter bill that would make it significantly harder, if not _outright impossible,_ for millions of eligible voters to register to vote and have their voices heard. **This is one of the biggest threats to voting rights we’ve seen in a generation. And it isn’t an isolated incident: it’s part of a broader far-right agenda to silence voters — **through laws that make it harder to vote, maps that make it impossible for communities to elect candidates of their choosing, and outright attempts to steal elections (like what’s happening in North Carolina’s state supreme court race right now). **The fair maps movement is fighting back — and we need your help.** [**Rush a donation of $30 or more now to help defeat anti-voter attacks and power our nationwide fight for a truly representative democracy. With voting rights being undermined on multiple fronts, there’s never been a more urgent time to pitch in.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106553912/541886592/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_SAVEActUpdate_email_20250426-NDRC-Tier1-SAVEActUpdate-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250426-NDRC-Tier1-SAVEActUpdate-NOR_&utm_campaign=SAVEActUpdate&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4OWU0M2MwLWE2MjItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_y_8NrQ7DXJBHuzUyDFdSO6lsgAhsfjmEFPIEieG8E8=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The SAVE Act isn’t about saving anything — it’s about stripping away rights by:
* ❌ Requiring all eligible Americans to provide proof of citizenship by presenting a passport or birth certificate when registering to vote
* ❌ Upending online voter registration (a practice in 42 states!)
* ❌ Making it impossible for Americans to register to vote by mail
* ❌ Putting an end to voter registration drives nationwide

The positive-sounding name is a not-so-sly attempt to sugarcoat the idea of making it harder for millions of eligible Americans to cast their votes. We aren’t falling for it, Peter. And we’re pushing back against the MAGA attempts to dismantle democracy.
**The NDRC is leading the fight for fair representation through fair maps — electing Democracy Defenders, stopping gerrymandering, and exposing and preventing threats to free and fair elections.**
[**Now, we need you with us. clean_body: With free and fair elections being undermined on multiple fronts, there’s never been a more urgent time to pitch in. | Peter, Recently, the GOP-controlled House of Representatives passed the SAVE Act — an extreme anti-voter bill that would make it significantly harder, if not outright impossible, for millions of eligible voters to register to vote and have their voices heard. This is one of the biggest threats to voting rights we’ve seen in a generation. And it isn’t an isolated incident: it’s part of a broader far-right agenda to silence voters — through laws that make it harder to vote, maps that make it impossible for communities to elect candidates of their choosing, and outright attempts to steal elections (like what’s happening in North Carolina’s state supreme court race right now). The fair maps movement is fighting back — and we need your help. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The SAVE Act isn’t about saving anything — it’s about stripping away rights by: ❌ Requiring all eligible Americans to provide proof of citizenship by presenting a passport or birth certificate when registering to vote ❌ Upending online voter registration (a practice in 42 states!) ❌ Making it impossible for Americans to register to vote by mail ❌ Putting an end to voter registration drives nationwide The positive-sounding name is a not-so-sly attempt to sugarcoat the idea of making it harder for millions of eligible Americans to cast their votes. We aren’t falling for it, Peter. And we’re pushing back against the MAGA attempts to dismantle democracy. The NDRC is leading the fight for fair representation through fair maps — electing Democracy Defenders, stopping gerrymandering, and exposing and preventing threats to free and fair elections. = — Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj20467cctvlhh93r9feynwbkg54ov4zr84ue8f3a24u8h518wktyui03jk1kc5l7lnbk8q470j4z54eyd8ft&__stmp=svbwhm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbwhm&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jyhpqbu9ojqsvlvxty9nom542qwwczq6kkgum5ua5atva2z3ccv4hlrwpwu9chdt650zh9i2o3neo1lyzujsqzzz7zlzhgnktkbsmiq1lgvuoo9e2ywq9g6wu12knh9ldiksssc7nw11mesprrj9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbwhm&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbwhm&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbwhm&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbwhm&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jyhpqbu9ojqsvlvxty9nom5ssmsicmylopzrpxvb2pwr3osaa21fetpj9y0cnqozrp9xw90cu80gyfksxo5g7da6bf7ubikxnsgwlvadtst9i4i3mqt8n3vude376fzhvpe50g9dkun1m9k673t3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbwhm&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svbwhm&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
Donald Trump Jr. just warned that Democrats are still attacking President Trump through lawfare and abuse of our court system |
---

Fellow Conservative, you need to know two things about me.

Donald Trump Jr. just warned that Democrats are still attacking President Trump through lawfare and abuse of our court system, desperately trying to derail his bold MAGA vision for America: [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=539c773f9fc241ef84780f1da648e850&_e=2-QvuFUImZaBTQK-XYPJghjGYytgdJGK98IOjIZ3qVqPMbrr-wk20t7B0VRW7TzT8GS-JUo8ot9EklYVPLGuC2WLLbZ9EYa_PuzhtLuIsVsaI12Hi89Qb5Ish4yuotSERCb0gH5boZq058fNAIS2idrrCcoZIHmYGldlpWd5oPGy-V1E21bdaMTCd9aksCqkLRdDrQm-i-Ph_cGm3xdfIphih2rLq1VBreyweyHWrVlhHpjowKYwxu0O-jX_03DG6wt1i93VyXQxMaK7vPWG2nXoHlyf_Hyl0rlm2JF38J-jYI9JOFxnfQU1FHjjiTUEoIVT7iCY2k72I5AzvKMe61aBoYqiMJw0ymFlmAWRfBYwgZGK1e9DRI3EWVTEB3ed)
**I 100% agree with Don Jr.** -- this is a blatant assault on our democracy and the will of the American people who elected President Trump to lead us forward.

Right now, our narrow House Majority is acting as the major bulwark against the Left’s insanity. That’s why they’re posting historic fundraising numbers to take out Republicans like me and end our Majority.

I know standing shoulder-to-shoulder with President Trump makes me the Left’s top target, [**that’s why it’s so important to know you’re in my corner.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=539c773f9fc241ef84780f1da648e850&_e=2-QvuFUImZaBTQK-XYPJghjGYytgdJGK98IOjIZ3qVqPMbrr-wk20t7B0VRW7TzT8GS-JUo8ot9EklYVPLGuC2WLLbZ9EYa_PuzhtLuIsVsaI12Hi89Qb5Ish4yuotSERCb0gH5boZq058fNAIS2idrrCcoZIHmYGldlpWd5oPGy-V1E21bdaMTCd9aksCqkLRdDrQm-i-Ph_cGm3xdfIphih2rLq1VBreyweyHWrVmph41h47SLjJ0pQhC7YGYeytaMQX6B8PbIQ5vofzHNkhmEY7TQwlG-eGUUbKwdM0ftK7bDd_mVJAOduRfVdZCSaoWB91uP5vi6a8XhENbWj5sj6kW4iE5ysN9RxvWdFkNCPjs7cdswq5y7_hDX7fdS)

Democrats are going to throw everything they have at me. [**The only way I can fight back is with the support of loyal MAGA Conservatives like you. Right now, our narrow House Majority is acting as the major bulwark against the Left’s insanity. That’s why they’re posting historic fundraising numbers to take out Republicans like me and end our Majority. I know standing shoulder-to-shoulder with President Trump makes me the Left’s top target, Democrats are going to throw everything they have at me. The work President Trump and Republicans have done in the first 100 days has been unprecedented. body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/VAPDZ8q_eJB9X_LFltE02diE5bAib-c56hJKHnfMvrnWQsn6aiIZvCVmMpgbDk7t7n0XY8POGT4qIWpJ-sKV7QnBdcSwYGcrBQsUJLSxkphZHxFjytZSuCeFa0-CZmNgB4CQkMpHGoTzZW_6bp4X52juUcjkmHUXg7v83aG-0q1C0TAbmfOfD1S8OXbGCrYGNghdKzlKgeIkZSLjOl3qXxJlDzQsPvVZJ7LKPsFgtv6AWuq-AusA3oYvTuY12Ieb6FAcAIvgLH2LHAAc9oBJ1gYDlFlDbKVjnA8vw1qfW0P0B19o4Y3O1akDx8ZdmqwxMmD0G53j_VLh0xfPgA-z3DLkbv4ttZEbIFZ8EJbhm9kmX-6sZFYnVneIbQc6QxzRkxIT7Y15wbVIxiicEemwx0qD88cMncUcTnB3gmXBc1rgMwUtxxBQjJzyANm9DOyPjBuwyjfHx0U7nkxDpD49KpHhHJGJVfSW10Cto6hACw/yd3WywncvbbhLtEYWzgKuGWt1j-9ay3-/8 "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/3WfaOz249FO4I4ZcYu8QcaXm4yQomZhQnQAgtMW9LnxmDbLWj8xsh0TneZdk6hdHnO71JYYSpAyFNuPZ6LKxEKgjFgKbl8dyrBf96Ih4TK2HfbKyu9-wIlk_hr6W15Ox2LIXOolB8RRipd1IzzSTo7mRCfaZ7hjts-zw-8WVtRLNeXOzbd8jABA35hkjpTs_SuPCLNpO8OQDw6RhC_4-Vt5Gowb6yxsZjOeiD97YgxtoUL172juo12WHTZAWFJlw0-P-vqxL59EHuqDsj7QbMl0sMgSdUbDyOUSmRCre5aEu6gunuEdtOiSE1kT1TuwApw-BNe_IDzWbQNwclSRLJwRC1i00ie7uxkQlI63g0MBYt9nc6Ow49-ZqeBeC4KO55e8MUYon0pkfhv-b8fte6mbgszilFfs1gS-v_3n9S_B7q8aULVMuAd4GF-B2K6e0d0iH1xS57ivXcWo1Fg6fX70jxkI6E4pjJUinbE5IJQ/279AnYOgqA9nuZ9i2EAOtuak0Iyi9d_5/8 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/YamPi0Av7dVQK9XOegjUQvU8ta4vBLa4d6bgOyNF4P_2cpogqy0BaDyxl7czvb_EaEnB8QTtbtsTSAU4JkDE2UrV9gzJ1rd_lcjTu4rORK3dlX_0EYGrHumuCslruqvg9mQk6q8HQ0DkpcmRC259S9W2C_cJouHQvsNlBKpJBz2jjwkA6vyeSnOzKL90SjIdKfLPH59Nzf0xGvjtAndyePJUIo9TdUR7h1YlWgDHh4dwNCS9-Ok0pahgrED8mv8pjZB_nY-ddwPL-Uh7-OJx8ibPg6ch-t5VKtR4-Q80UiupQ06lVDO-MexydrFc_ghzfKpAV6-Us7FC3DVUcRSA561utdb_JnLv7K9LUfu3kxokANnQchq7fdsHhZTCuI4aGqIPvmjmhImc0S7BD0ezeJWYnU0xz2-ozacHhFumGvaNwtVh8S2atAE_q7Js5v16eHixl9WMAC81goQobebo8P8-vK7sJihQSzm5YgwMRg/dU04mk6TyhXlcQn6Jme-R5BCOohTegj7/8 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/FRoAfqEJ0YljfFswKwpU3fguuYflnLeSxYdbEwP1_3JwuuUE6TJ5XmEoKkTapIPErT3ONh7QxPhJ8-5ey8-ThX2ocGoEJ4rcDPuy6DtaOF5wQwFm0raHdlJwRv2RAwt5ahuvz8esgHdJRLn_dOUDC-IFEcETKIGnO9ooB0rPtYxCoEJU_-gRHahRFNyhQtuuuy2Io3aQ-U1COUWnjO1kqeH8Emu2LUIySIyj3qFdKB8bNdGrvnCnd7WEf0orKt_AKamyz5zqt-lWExrM9cjl83j0juzKFNMILMwPhHJ9ztFPSgzM5JozeABJHqSsoUpkiw-_2vXYOhwz6R_oQqWKRiemGqs5sgNc9Vn6BvJ_aL_Vxce9dQ4jelCWv9RplvqOxQl-a9KAt08CqWTTaQarE2qwFN6CQg7qzgf7zF3s9Jif_Q5dkHItWFMOQQV-6hlb5AtNrPWhPmKI24LY2eGL-ibm7ig7IV3-LPTeqWwTsQ/YKx3fKgbOxkHsssIKhhAlmGBBJa6M9ie/8 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_

I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. name: Nancy Mace
subject: I didn’t just read the Woman at the Well story—I lived it.

body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/xCEkesQs6ouUKmGRWRBXBlt5XGEWicLrinGIIo7D1IWFaMst8g6FOkFOk4AAMz_sK4pwwzSbYQuN3dYIZZ_kNPKBQHUiFi-D-klQn5rXw-D-XIKuWZ15TUXTEh-mQy0S4BEe7BrZC8gT2F2R0ha_JKZ_IEgOxsZ2WAY45NPVKMIfhGSeiSmZwkCObt4MfJC0YhNEKos6s0u0MHcvVeiK_QKQ_jAiGUkpmpwEv6zQSkrU4FnFbBdKWlSZ2HBze7vhPY4FZPukA_8jKLNcQZJgb5yf0_EuzG2XWEtrUQfiqhpviWXdbZyb6A-V5c1x-S_8xjEJ7D_-GNkc0nj8hqZFxNcYxJbtKGGpfmL7pDiwFt3NbcIRS7XqlfpVa3tCNkqyIGOInHBLj6ucp_yFwIycfu3jNPa8C0VwJpM5T1sfJtduIbzpmv8tO_zvvwbmSxTvK8b4_eF6vHd8bA1NzNYKFqdmdFeRH8hakLpxjm5-ibYLVQrLVSR7CqfvqA/3vRHK_XWcZOYWjdqny03bQiX-VfPUht0/8)

_**There’s an old story in Scripture — maybe you know it.**_ A broken woman. Alone. Ashamed. Cast out. She came to the well at noon, hoping no one would see her. **But Jesus _did_ see her.** He didn’t shame her. He didn’t cancel her. He offered her living water. She was stunned. Jesus said: “If you knew who I was, you would’ve asked me for a drink. And I would’ve given you living water.” **That story hits me deep — because I was that woman.** _[I’ve been told I wasn’t good enough. ](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/iTxZuq6_l480uCaBewjSJWuvVZZ3jhVyjpuHdrbb2z4pY3iSet2bMx0xMl3pDFX6utt0IMRbjqZ0imtElsNO6-Q5w5lOsWslje-40HoeFq_q7a95ksnkw_7Epq17ytB_TuWSIsILwQ0lfcxVZspZHpfr3OUOuKwkDWQKwQ1B9qp8jfAbdi40FFqk07IOLhfO5cfFtxveOFm4AoRprzf4xelvM1x-W4kdyr4AW3axIrBjwOLoyFpuPFrhf-D6wIUn9D5aJTdpXCCbyY8ky8UM-S5RNvbZ6n-SmDt0NAjGttksUvFeTKhh9d-4p41V_ybLb4G64fdDCGeeo5z9q7JsPmWtVkA-PNQF2_Kd7HVpcuqCuFPClVphbIZCV_FdoN1cC6hcodzZke0ldcxgacGK8yNCigOMQOEypB70dadOuVTXl447AT97NjMhC6ljy4Lb7ulUbGSoBYhkX5puCK2giNDUOl7FR4stqou9gdoVFX18s_Vjkvg8KdhbOw/316PhRG452AJozCfcpbA1IH5DqbynECC/8)_ But God doesn’t need perfection, He uses the broken to carry out His perfect plan. _**At 17, I dropped out of high school.**_ My parents gave me two choices: Go back to school — or get a job. So I got to work... at Waffle House. Graveyard shifts. Spatula in hand. It was humbling. It was hard. But it wasn’t the end of my story. Because 25 years later, that high school dropout became the **first woman to graduate from The Citadel** , and the **first Republican woman elected to Congress from South Carolina.** And I didn’t do it alone — **God carried me**. [He carried me through trauma, heartbreak, single motherhood, public failure, and private grief.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/ieMEYpdYq9unzJCj8YmGT6rSTHZ6YHhxGD-41i4FPkZnyBVrMxFm1WGiGFpdbGyRAyg3Mt7YGwDhDUxXbRoSo-MyY0glsDONOPfWv77PULUzHBEfM6p1KA0YqWfXJ1GlRfp0LFtZBSJu1D0NElMqfviGrPKR3ZXqEWnTVmsXW4uEq3TJZlEl7NIy_TjRElcJa_0Fg8V15HWwVMq3pFlA2I_zdVOW4REXtHq7A59Venxl8YlKIfVexdfB9aV5JhRFLJ2fJLJ0TX0hBpjlN29QyPq4DzMErYHBcwhWk6wwnd1Hzg0N7wNLSFJ0iJyz3cYEXn_BU89UU5lFISc9KdMp1YV2TlxPoXGuaBEIFWxNEAw0MqQ-s6XPdY-VMkK_kGH-p4CI7VjYMDM-Secf8jTfWIdeLYqtOWt8CoMLdMEUcLz1s-K-qxItCWYYKuxb2CxhoH21tawa0u1O3ALz4OONZiaLYOT3f8RML_4liBILqcqLEVoClGtmnwMMVg/VwFSBg6GIhbJxoQCWm-5D2kD7b38QIEa/8) He carried me when I was assaulted. When I was raped. When I was diagnosed with PTSD. When I moved four times to keep my children safe. When the world called me unworthy — **God called me redeemed**. clean_body: | | | | | There’s an old story in Scripture — maybe you know it. A broken woman. Alone. Ashamed. Cast out. She came to the well at noon, hoping no one would see her. But Jesus did see her. He didn’t shame her. He didn’t cancel her. He offered her living water. She was stunned. Jesus said: “If you knew who I was, you would’ve asked me for a drink. And I would’ve given you living water.” That story hits me deep — because I was that woman. But God doesn’t need perfection, He uses the broken to carry out His perfect plan. At 17, I dropped out of high school. My parents gave me two choices: Go back to school — or get a job. So I got to work... at Waffle House. Graveyard shifts. Spatula in hand. It was humbling. It was hard. But it wasn’t the end of my story. Because 25 years later, that high school dropout became the first woman to graduate from The Citadel , and the first Republican woman elected to Congress from South Carolina. And I didn’t do it alone — God carried me. He carried me when I was assaulted. When I was raped. When I was diagnosed with PTSD. When I moved four times to keep my children safe. When the world called me unworthy — God called me redeemed. When the Left tried to silence me — God gave me a voice. When I had nothing left to give — God filled me with living water. I know what it means to be broken. And I know what it means to be rebuilt by grace. This is more than politics. It’s a spiritual battle. A fight for our churches , our daughters , our freedom — and our souls. And I won’t sit back while spineless politicians sell out our country for fame and favor. If you believe in grace , in truth , and in second chances — I’m asking you to stand with me right now. | [👉 [STAND WITH NANCY MACE »]]() Because there are millions of women out there still waiting at the well.Let’s show them: God still sees them. And America still has fighters who won’t back down.—Nancy Mace P.S. I know what it feels like to be overlooked. Ignored. Counted out. But I also know what it feels like to be used by God for a mission far bigger than myself. If you're ready to join me — I’d be honored to fight alongside you.
