name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: UPDATES: Bernie’s mission for us, taking the fight to Oligarchs’ doorstep, key elections & MORE!
disclaimer_text:
paid
for by us of course and cuts to programs millions of us rely on
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

HEADLINES: Bernie’s Mission for Us | Taking the Fight to Oligarchs |
Confronting GOP Congressmen | Town Hall w/ Ro Khanna | Save Public
Media | Key Elections & Victories | Dem Party Survey Results |

& MORE!

★ ★ ★

TURNING ENERGY INTO ACTION

[1]Bernie saying we are going to make Our Revolution with joy. We're
going to sing and dance our way to victory against hatred and
divisiveness.

36,000 in Los Angeles. 20,000 in Salt Lake. Bernie and AOC are
packing stadiums across the country and leading the way. But, this is
more than a show of strength — it’s a call to action.

Bernie is calling on us to use this energy to build power from the
bottom up. Our Revolution is organizing the movement to resist
Trump’s authoritarianism and elect progressives at all levels of
government.

Read about our election victories and endorsements below, and
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1011&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]donate to help us fulfill Bernie’s mission.

[3]Bernie and AOC standing together, text calling to join the citizen
action team

The Trump Regime is unleashing vicious attacks on crucial social
programs, vulnerable communities, our democracy, and the planet. It
can feel overwhelming, but we are not powerless — and we are not
alone.

Our 2025 Plan is to mobilize a Citizen Army of grassroots activists
to fight back against Trump and the Oligarchs, seize the reins of the
Democratic Party from the corporate elite, and elect the next
generation of leaders in key down-ballot races across the country.
Read about how we’re carrying out our work below!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24421?t=1012&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]JOIN THE CITIZEN ACTION TEAM

★ ★ ★

[5]Poster: Stop Trump and the Oligarchs

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25479?t=1013&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]Grab a yard sign to show your opposition to Trump, Elon Musk, and
the Oligarchs who think they can subvert our democracy. We are not
alone and we will not be silent.

★ ★ ★

[7]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs

★ ★ ★

TAKING THE FIGHT TO THE OLIGARCHS

From massive Hands Off protests to record-breaking Bernie rallies —
our movement is rising up nationwide to say NO to Trump and
Oligarchy.

Momentum is building, and Our Revolution is bringing the fight right
to the oligarchs’ doorstep. The night before Tax Day, Our Revolution
activists paid a visit to the Tax Man: Trump’s Treasury Secretary
Scott Bessent.

[8]Projections of ''Defund Oligarchy'' onto Scott Bessent's mansion

We showed up at Bessent’s $12 million dollar mansion in Washington
D.C. and lit up a projector calling to Defund Oligarchs. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25480?t=1014&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]WATCH THE
VIDEO HERE.

Trump put a literal oligarch in charge of the IRS and he's on a
mission to deliver MASSIVE tax cuts to his fellow billionaires — paid
for by us of course and cuts to programs millions of us rely on.

Scott Bessent is a former hedge fund executive and Wall Street
insider now running the U.S. Treasury. He is decidedly on the side of
the oligarchs, saying concerns about oligarchy are just "class envy"
during his confirmation hearing.

[10]List of the evidence of how Scott Bessent is on the side of the
oligarchs

He also opposes raising the federal minimum wage, claiming it would
“distort markets” and is pushing for fewer corporate regulations —
giving billionaires even more unchecked influence.

Our Mission in this moment: Fight Oligarchy. We are planning many
more of these actions targeting billionaires and oligarchs subverting
our democracy. Join our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25481?t=1015&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]Citizen Action Team to get involved!

★ ★ ★

NO MEDICAID CUTS FOR WEALTHY TAX CUTS

Trump and his billionaire backers are trying to push through a budget
that would slash Medicaid in order to pay for massive tax cuts for
the wealthy.

We’re keeping the heat on GOP Reps, with our Citizen Action Team
members confronting many of them in the halls of Congress. For
example, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25482?t=1016&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]David Schweikert, who has 150,000 constituents who rely
on Medicaid, and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25483?t=1017&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]Rob Bresnahan, who has more than 250,000 — a
quarter of his constituents!

Vulnerable Republicans are getting nervous – and our direct
organizing paired with Bernie’s rallies in key red districts turned
up the heat even more, pushing 12 to publicly announce they will not
support the Medicaid cuts as part of Trump’s plan to hand trillions
in tax breaks to billionaires.

★ ★ ★

As Republicans gut vital services, attack our democracy, and serve
the billionaire class, GOP figures hide from constituents — refusing
to hold real town halls or answer the tough questions.

We’re done waiting. It’s time to show up. On Monday, we joined
Congressman Ro Khanna for a town hall in Whitehouse, NJ — the
district of Rep. Tom Kean Jr. — to send a clear message that our
democracy belongs to us.

Trump and his lackeys think they can dismantle our government and
subvert our systems to serve the Oligarchy at our expense. They’re
wrong. We’re fighting back to ensure our economy and technology work
for the people, not just the billionaires.

★ ★ ★

The massive protests and rallies aren’t just about venting
frustrations. We’re mobilizing behind Bernie, AOC, and other leaders
- not just to push back - but to set out a powerful vision of what
we’re fighting FOR.

Higher wages, worker rights, equal justice, good jobs,
anti-corruption, real democracy, healthcare, education, housing and
more. This is what the people support, and we’re building up
leadership who will fight to deliver.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24424?t=1018&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]GET THE GRASSROOTS ARMY STICKER

★ ★ ★

PROTECTING PUBLIC MEDIA

Trump is demanding Republicans defund public media like NPR and PBS —
and Congress will vote in just 11 days!

Our Revolution has been working tirelessly with our partners Free
Press and ACLU, union workers at NABET-CWA and others to raise the
pressure on Congress to reject this push and protect public media.

This is about safeguarding the very foundations of an informed,
educated, and empowered public.

That’s why we’re mobilizing thousands to flood Congress with calls,
hosting media-grabbing demonstrations, and activating our Citizen
Action Team across the country to fight back.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25357?t=1019&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]Add your name today: Tell Speaker Johnson and Congress that we
won't let Trump silence NPR and PBS.

★ ★ ★

[16]Take Back The Party

★ ★ ★

POWER-BUILDING IN ST. LOUIS!

Three of our candidates just won board of alder seats in St. Louis,
Missouri — where we got out the vote to build on the progressive
governing majority our movement has helped elect in recent cycles!

* In Ward 1, Anne Schweitzer is a champion for raising wages, clean
water, better housing, safety and more.

* In Ward 7, Alisha Sonnier is dedicated to youth and family
empowerment, equitable development, and housing as a human right.

* In Ward 3, Shane Cohn is a tireless advocate for our
neighborhoods, youth, and public resources.

Our progressive bloc in St. Louis - led by Board of Alders President
and Our Revolution Board Member Megan Green - have already
successfully pushed initiatives for labor, wages, direct democracy,
universal basic income and more. Let’s keep it going!

★ ★ ★

Congratulations to Barbara Lee — the next mayor of Oakland, CA!

Barbara was the first black woman in Northern California elected to
Congress, and she is a lifelong fighter for peace, poor and working
people, reproductive rights and so much more.

“Barbara Lee’s victory didn’t come from high-priced consultants or
billionaire donors. It came from decades of service, community trust,
and organizing with and for the people of Oakland,” said Joseph
Geevarghese, Executive Director of Our Revolution.

“That’s what builds movements. That’s what wins elections. And that’s
what our politics needs more of right now. The Democratic Party
should be looking to her example as a roadmap for how to win by
investing in people, not pandering to power.”

Our Revolution was proud to stand in her corner, mobilizing tens of
thousands by call and text as our local group OR East Bay knocked
doors on the ground in Oakland.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1020&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]CHIP IN TO OUR GOTV OPERATION

★ ★ ★

EARLY VOTING KICKS OFF IN TEXAS

Polls are open across Texas, and Our Revolution is mobilizing voters
for key down-ballot races ahead of Election Day May 3rd!

We’re proud to support grassroots leaders who are organizing in their
communities, not cozying up to corporate donors.

First up — Laura Cadena is running for City Council in Dallas. She
served in City Hall for eight years and understands how local
government can work hand-in-hand with the community.

From cost of living and affordable housing to climate action and
sustainability, Laura is a champion on the issues that matter most.

★ ★ ★

Also in Dallas, Adam Bazaldua is running for re-election to city
council in District 7.

Adam chaired the Dallas Green Alliance before being elected in 2019.
He has served on committees for the environment, workforce education,
and economic development, and has brought bold leadership to City
Hall as Deputy Mayor Pro Tem.

★ ★ ★

In Fort Worth, Chris Nettles is up for re-election to City Council in
District 8.

Chris knows that local government must meet the needs of Fort Worth’s
growing population. He is working to expand public transportation,
increase affordable housing, grow good-paying jobs, and help the
houseless population in Fort Worth.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1021&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]DONATE TO FUND OUR ELECTION WORK

★ ★ ★

In San Antonio, we’re supporting Councilwoman Teri Castillo for
re-election!

A community organizer and fierce advocate for housing, climate, and
public investment, Teri has delivered historic wins for District 5
and continues to lead with urgency and integrity.

★ ★ ★

[19]Elect Candidates

★ ★ ★

We surveyed more than 4,500 active Our Revolution supporters, and the
results show growing frustration with the Democratic Party
establishment.

As Bernie said: “If we waited on them to defeat Trumpism and move our
country forward, we'd be waiting forever. So it is up to us.”

There is clear momentum to transform the party from within—by
electing bold, grassroots challengers who will reject corporate PAC
money and take the fight directly to Trump and his enablers. Read the
breakdown in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25485?t=1022&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]Common Dreams.

“The voters we organize with are sounding the alarm: they want
fighters, not placeholders,” said Joseph Geevarghese, Our Revolution
executive director.

“If the party establishment continues to sleepwalk through this
crisis, they’ll be replaced by a new generation of leaders who aren’t
afraid to take on the fight of our lives.”

The message is clear. People are done waiting while the stakes get
higher every day. Here is what some of you told us about how you’re
feeling about the party and the political landscape:

* “We need leaders who will fight — not just tweet.”
* “I want to hear daily opposition to Trump’s agenda.”
* “Quit being wimps.”
* “Schumer and Jeffries need to step aside.”
* “We’re running out of time.”

A recent [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25486?t=1023&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]Harvard poll confirms what we’re hearing: 72% of
Democrats support ditching the cautious, centrist approach and
confronting the MAGA right with bold, progressive leadership.

If we’re going to meet the urgency of this moment, we can't wait for
the political class to catch up. We have no choice but to build power
— and transform the Democratic Party from the inside out. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1024&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]Chip in
to help power this effort!

★ ★ ★

A resource for you and your future

As we look forward to the future of Our Revolution, we invite you to
plan for your own future through our partnership with FreeWill.

Using their online estate planning tool, you can create a will or
revocable living trust 100% for free and protect the people,
communities, and causes you care about. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25487?t=1025&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]Create your free plan
here.

★ ★ ★

[24]Action Center

★ ★ ★

As Bernie and AOC draw massive crowds along their Fight Oligarchy
Tour, Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is organizing thousands of
activists to turn this energy into action in D.C. and across the
country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19903?t=1026&akid=8332%2E5885482%2ESG7Se6 ]When you pick up this new vintage Bernie hat (and other great NEW
merch!) in the Our Revolution store, you’re helping to power our
actions and pressure campaigns to block the worst of the Trump

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: Bernie’s Mission for Us | Taking the Fight to Oligarchs | Confronting GOP Congressmen | Town Hall w/ Ro Khanna | Save Public Media | Key Elections & Victories | Dem Party Survey Results | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ TURNING ENERGY INTO ACTION [1]Bernie saying we are going to make Our Revolution with joy. We're going to sing and dance our way to victory against hatred and divisiveness. 36,000 in Los Angeles. 20,000 in Salt Lake. Bernie and AOC are packing stadiums across the country and leading the way. But, this is more than a show of strength — it’s a call to action. Bernie is calling on us to use this energy to build power from the bottom up. Our Revolution is organizing the movement to resist Trump’s authoritarianism and elect progressives at all levels of government. Read about our election victories and endorsements below, and [ ]donate to help us fulfill Bernie’s mission. [3]Bernie and AOC standing together, text calling to join the citizen action team The Trump Regime is unleashing vicious attacks on crucial social programs, vulnerable communities, our democracy, and the planet. It can feel overwhelming, but we are not powerless — and we are not alone. Our 2025 Plan is to mobilize a Citizen Army of grassroots activists to fight back against Trump and the Oligarchs, seize the reins of the Democratic Party from the corporate elite, and elect the next generation of leaders in key down-ballot races across the country. Read about how we’re carrying out our work below! [ ]JOIN THE CITIZEN ACTION TEAM ★ ★ ★ [5]Poster: Stop Trump and the Oligarchs [ ]Grab a yard sign to show your opposition to Trump, Elon Musk, and the Oligarchs who think they can subvert our democracy. We are not alone and we will not be silent. ★ ★ ★ [7]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs ★ ★ ★ TAKING THE FIGHT TO THE OLIGARCHS From massive Hands Off protests to record-breaking Bernie rallies — our movement is rising up nationwide to say NO to Trump and Oligarchy. Momentum is building, and Our Revolution is bringing the fight right to the oligarchs’ doorstep. The night before Tax Day, Our Revolution activists paid a visit to the Tax Man: Trump’s Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent. [8]Projections of ''Defund Oligarchy'' onto Scott Bessent's mansion We showed up at Bessent’s $12 million dollar mansion in Washington D.C. and lit up a projector calling to Defund Oligarchs. [ ]WATCH THE VIDEO HERE. Trump put a literal oligarch in charge of the IRS and he's on a mission to deliver MASSIVE tax cuts to his fellow billionaires — paid for by us of course and cuts to programs millions of us rely on. Scott Bessent is a former hedge fund executive and Wall Street insider now running the U.S. Treasury. He is decidedly on the side of the oligarchs, saying concerns about oligarchy are just "class envy" during his confirmation hearing. [10]List of the evidence of how Scott Bessent is on the side of the oligarchs He also opposes raising the federal minimum wage, claiming it would “distort markets” and is pushing for fewer corporate regulations — giving billionaires even more unchecked influence. Our Mission in this moment: Fight Oligarchy. We are planning many more of these actions targeting billionaires and oligarchs subverting our democracy. Join our [ ]Citizen Action Team to get involved! ★ ★ ★ NO MEDICAID CUTS FOR WEALTHY TAX CUTS Trump and his billionaire backers are trying to push through a budget that would slash Medicaid in order to pay for massive tax cuts for the wealthy. We’re keeping the heat on GOP Reps, with our Citizen Action Team members confronting many of them in the halls of Congress. For example, [ ]David Schweikert, who has 150,000 constituents who rely on Medicaid, and [ ]Rob Bresnahan, who has more than 250,000 — a quarter of his constituents! Vulnerable Republicans are getting nervous – and our direct organizing paired with Bernie’s rallies in key red districts turned up the heat even more, pushing 12 to publicly announce they will not support the Medicaid cuts as part of Trump’s plan to hand trillions in tax breaks to billionaires. ★ ★ ★ As Republicans gut vital services, attack our democracy, and serve the billionaire class, GOP figures hide from constituents — refusing to hold real town halls or answer the tough questions. We’re done waiting. It’s time to show up. On Monday, we joined Congressman Ro Khanna for a town hall in Whitehouse, NJ — the district of Rep. Tom Kean Jr. — to send a clear message that our democracy belongs to us. Trump and his lackeys think they can dismantle our government and subvert our systems to serve the Oligarchy at our expense. They’re wrong. We’re fighting back to ensure our economy and technology work for the people, not just the billionaires. ★ ★ ★ The massive protests and rallies aren’t just about venting frustrations. We’re mobilizing behind Bernie, AOC, and other leaders - not just to push back - but to set out a powerful vision of what we’re fighting FOR. Higher wages, worker rights, equal justice, good jobs, anti-corruption, real democracy, healthcare, education, housing and more. This is what the people support, and we’re building up leadership who will fight to deliver. [ ]GET THE GRASSROOTS ARMY STICKER ★ ★ ★ PROTECTING PUBLIC MEDIA Trump is demanding Republicans defund public media like NPR and PBS — and Congress will vote in just 11 days! Our Revolution has been working tirelessly with our partners Free Press and ACLU, union workers at NABET-CWA and others to raise the pressure on Congress to reject this push and protect public media. This is about safeguarding the very foundations of an informed, educated, and empowered public. That’s why we’re mobilizing thousands to flood Congress with calls, hosting media-grabbing demonstrations, and activating our Citizen Action Team across the country to fight back. [ ]Add your name today: Tell Speaker Johnson and Congress that we won't let Trump silence NPR and PBS. ★ ★ ★ [16]Take Back The Party ★ ★ ★ POWER-BUILDING IN ST. LOUIS! Three of our candidates just won board of alder seats in St. Louis, Missouri — where we got out the vote to build on the progressive governing majority our movement has helped elect in recent cycles! In Ward 1, Anne Schweitzer is a champion for raising wages, clean water, better housing, safety and more. In Ward 7, Alisha Sonnier is dedicated to youth and family empowerment, equitable development, and housing as a human right. In Ward 3, Shane Cohn is a tireless advocate for our neighborhoods, youth, and public resources. Our progressive bloc in St. Louis - led by Board of Alders President and Our Revolution Board Member Megan Green - have already successfully pushed initiatives for labor, wages, direct democracy, universal basic income and more. Let’s keep it going! ★ ★ ★ Congratulations to Barbara Lee — the next mayor of Oakland, CA! Barbara was the first black woman in Northern California elected to Congress, and she is a lifelong fighter for peace, poor and working people, reproductive rights and so much more. “Barbara Lee’s victory didn’t come from high-priced consultants or billionaire donors. It came from decades of service, community trust, and organizing with and for the people of Oakland,” said Joseph Geevarghese, Executive Director of Our Revolution. “That’s what builds movements. That’s what wins elections. And that’s what our politics needs more of right now. The Democratic Party should be looking to her example as a roadmap for how to win by investing in people, not pandering to power.” Our Revolution was proud to stand in her corner, mobilizing tens of thousands by call and text as our local group OR East Bay knocked doors on the ground in Oakland. [ ]CHIP IN TO OUR GOTV OPERATION ★ ★ ★ EARLY VOTING KICKS OFF IN TEXAS Polls are open across Texas, and Our Revolution is mobilizing voters for key down-ballot races ahead of Election Day May 3rd! We’re proud to support grassroots leaders who are organizing in their communities, not cozying up to corporate donors. First up — Laura Cadena is running for City Council in Dallas. She served in City Hall for eight years and understands how local government can work hand-in-hand with the community. From cost of living and affordable housing to climate action and sustainability, Laura is a champion on the issues that matter most. ★ ★ ★ Also in Dallas, Adam Bazaldua is running for re-election to city council in District 7. Adam chaired the Dallas Green Alliance before being elected in 2019. He has served on committees for the environment, workforce education, and economic development, and has brought bold leadership to City Hall as Deputy Mayor Pro Tem. ★ ★ ★ In Fort Worth, Chris Nettles is up for re-election to City Council in District 8. Chris knows that local government must meet the needs of Fort Worth’s growing population. He is working to expand public transportation, increase affordable housing, grow good-paying jobs, and help the houseless population in Fort Worth. [ ]DONATE TO FUND OUR ELECTION WORK ★ ★ ★ In San Antonio, we’re supporting Councilwoman Teri Castillo for re-election! A community organizer and fierce advocate for housing, climate, and public investment, Teri has delivered historic wins for District 5 and continues to lead with urgency and integrity. ★ ★ ★ [19]Elect Candidates ★ ★ ★ We surveyed more than 4,500 active Our Revolution supporters, and the results show growing frustration with the Democratic Party establishment. As Bernie said: “If we waited on them to defeat Trumpism and move our country forward, we'd be waiting forever. So it is up to us.” There is clear momentum to transform the party from within—by electing bold, grassroots challengers who will reject corporate PAC money and take the fight directly to Trump and his enablers. Read the breakdown in [ ]Common Dreams. “The voters we organize with are sounding the alarm: they want fighters, not placeholders,” said Joseph Geevarghese, Our Revolution executive director. “If the party establishment continues to sleepwalk through this crisis, they’ll be replaced by a new generation of leaders who aren’t afraid to take on the fight of our lives.” The message is clear. People are done waiting while the stakes get higher every day. Here is what some of you told us about how you’re feeling about the party and the political landscape: “We need leaders who will fight — not just tweet.” “I want to hear daily opposition to Trump’s agenda.” “Quit being wimps.” “Schumer and Jeffries need to step aside.” “We’re running out of time.” A recent [ ]Harvard poll confirms what we’re hearing: 72% of Democrats support ditching the cautious, centrist approach and confronting the MAGA right with bold, progressive leadership. If we’re going to meet the urgency of this moment, we can't wait for the political class to catch up. We have no choice but to build power — and transform the Democratic Party from the inside out. [ ]Chip in to help power this effort! ★ ★ ★ A resource for you and your future As we look forward to the future of Our Revolution, we invite you to plan for your own future through our partnership with FreeWill. Using their online estate planning tool, you can create a will or revocable living trust 100% for free and protect the people, communities, and causes you care about. [ ]Create your free plan here. ★ ★ ★ [24]Action Center ★ ★ ★ As Bernie and AOC draw massive crowds along their Fight Oligarchy Tour, Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is organizing thousands of activists to turn this energy into action in D.C. and across the country. [ ]When you pick up this new vintage Bernie hat (and other great NEW merch!) in the Our Revolution store, you’re helping to power our actions and pressure campaigns to block the worst of the Trump agenda. Thank you. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is 57,000 activists strong and growing! We’re taking action in the streets and in the halls of power to stop the worst of the Trump regime and fight for our values. Our grassroots army is mobilizing and mounting pressure campaigns to protect Medicaid, Social Security, the Postal Service, public media, the EPA, worker rights, and so much more. There’s something everyone can do to help, big or small. [ ]Sign up to be part of the Citizen Action Team, and we’ll loop you in on our next meeting! ★ ★ ★ [27]Thank you to all who Donate & Volunteer [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: New Hampshire ≠ Illinois
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
Have you heard?
| | | | [](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---

Derek,
The New Hampshire Democrat Party just made it crystal clear where they want to take our state — and it’s not a place any of us want to go.
They’re bringing in Illinois Governor J.B. Pritzker to headline their big event. That’s right — the governor of a state known for crushing taxes, soaring crime, and people fleeing by the thousands is coming here to tell us how to run New Hampshire.
We know what Illinois looks like under Democrat control:
❌ Higher taxes
❌ Rampant crime
❌ Broken budgets
❌ Families and businesses leaving
That’s the Pritzker model — and that’s the model New Hampshire Democrats are embracing.
Here in New Hampshire, we do things differently:
✅ We keep taxes low
✅ We keep our communities safe
✅ We protect our freedoms
✅ We make it possible for families and businesses to thrive
We cannot let New Hampshire be dragged down the same failed path as Illinois. [Can you donate $5 or $10 today to make sure we have the resources to win?](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
I’m fighting everyday to protect what makes New Hampshire strong — [but I can’t do it without you.](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
[Together, we’ll keep New Hampshire the best place in America to live, work, and raise a family](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) — **and we’ll make sure that our future looks nothing like the failures of Illinois.**
Let’s get to work.
Onward,
**Rep. Joe Sweeney**
Chairman, Granite Solutions

[Donate Today](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
| | | Paid for by Granite Solutions. Rep. Joe Sweeney, Chairman. www.GraniteSolutions.org
https://snh.nucleusemail.com/amplify/subscriptions/unsubscribe?hids=ncbpgFabIDn8ls
---

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Fighting for Michigan is the honor of a lifetime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|

Team, When I ran for governor in 2018, **I promised Michiganders that I would _always_ work with anyone to get things done and fight like hell to deliver real progress for them and their families.** I visited all 83 counties to speak with hardworking people about their concerns, what they were looking for in their governor, and my plans to protect their fundamental freedoms, make meaningful progress for working families, and so much more. **I’m proud to say we’ve kept those promises.** While other states have attacked fundamental freedoms, we’re expanding them. While other states have left working families behind, we’ve put them at the center of everything we do. And while other states have gone down the path of extremism, we’ve made Michigan the best place in the country to live, work, and start a family. In Michigan, we’re making sure that the American dream doesn’t fall out of reach for families by creating good-paying jobs, saving Michiganders billions of dollars in taxes, lowering costs, making housing more affordable, investing in our children’s education, and fixing the damn roads! **[I’m not just _talking_ about results. I’m delivering them. clean_body: | Team, When I ran for governor in 2018, I promised Michiganders that I would always work with anyone to get things done and fight like hell to deliver real progress for them and their families. I visited all 83 counties to speak with hardworking people about their concerns, what they were looking for in their governor, and my plans to protect their fundamental freedoms, make meaningful progress for working families, and so much more. I’m proud to say we’ve kept those promises. While other states have attacked fundamental freedoms, we’re expanding them. While other states have left working families behind, we’ve put them at the center of everything we do. And while other states have gone down the path of extremism, we’ve made Michigan the best place in the country to live, work, and start a family. In Michigan, we’re making sure that the American dream doesn’t fall out of reach for families by creating good-paying jobs, saving Michiganders billions of dollars in taxes, lowering costs, making housing more affordable, investing in our children’s education, and fixing the damn roads! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Our progress in Michigan is only possible because of grassroots supporters like you. Let’s keep going. — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

We have just five days left to reach our launch-month fundraising target, and we need your help to show that we have a growing, engaged support team behind Wiley’s campaign for U.S. Senate. North Carolina deserves a leader who will fight for working families, not cater to the interests of billionaires and special interest groups. name: Andy Kim
subject: A conservative-led attack on the Affordable Care Act is being heard by the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
What’s on the line? The ACA’s protections for accessing no-cost preventive services.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106559378/541899760/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUzMzgyMi1hZjIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vmQUag4xDbr85vL2in2kmubDBmWYo0WlcghIs0EkIAE=&emci=b7a13307-0422-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=cd533822-af22-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=26261389)
---

| | A conservative-led attack on the Affordable Care Act (ACA) is being heard by the Supreme Court. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106559379/541899761/-1197072038?refcode=2025-04-26-aca&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=cd533822-af22-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUzMzgyMi1hZjIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vmQUag4xDbr85vL2in2kmubDBmWYo0WlcghIs0EkIAE=) What's on the line? The ACA's protections for accessing no-cost preventive services. **From cancer screenings to blood pressure checks, the ACA is essential for millions of Americans' basic care.** I first ran for Congress to protect access to healthcare after doctors warned us that our unborn son could have serious medical complications in 2017 and my Republican member of Congress was leading the charge to take away healthcare from those with pre-existing conditions. We're lucky that he's grown into a healthy and thriving boy, but no family should worry about losing their healthcare because of a pre-existing condition or because they cannot afford it. **That's why I've fought to defend the ACA, but we must go further.** We need a pathway to ensure that every American has healthcare they can rely on at a cost they can afford. In the face of Republican threats to gut the ACA, I'm fighting tooth and nail to ensure that never happens. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

clean_body: What’s on the line? The ACA’s protections for accessing no-cost preventive services. | | | | A conservative-led attack on the Affordable Care Act (ACA) is being heard by the Supreme Court. = What's on the line? The ACA's protections for accessing no-cost preventive services. From cancer screenings to blood pressure checks, the ACA is essential for millions of Americans' basic care. I first ran for Congress to protect access to healthcare after doctors warned us that our unborn son could have serious medical complications in 2017 and my Republican member of Congress was leading the charge to take away healthcare from those with pre-existing conditions. We're lucky that he's grown into a healthy and thriving boy, but no family should worry about losing their healthcare because of a pre-existing condition or because they cannot afford it. That's why I've fought to defend the ACA, but we must go further. We need a pathway to ensure that every American has healthcare they can rely on at a cost they can afford. In the face of Republican threats to gut the ACA, I'm fighting tooth and nail to ensure that never happens. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . name: Harry Bittker, YDA Convention Credentials Committee Chair via yda.org
subject: YDA Unit Chartering
body:
Please read if you are a State and Territorial chapter leader | | | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsGRA_J6jtCqYTGf9TBARmggSPVbT9acGv-q3fuGkH5fpWKqqPlmD81G2Ja6cSXR_GQGr7irGGwY2TUsaA4tbOwnS_oVl-SCOjaRBBb7gBAOG9Z_D2-VrUhbjSbtGz2uvmTKXFvDLwhRYcRs4h08kxXIqv71NI7W4pomNLhCEMV26_sx5703s3_iLAYHzjH6hshGs-LcKFDQlPUmIP4JKhx4fUr47pOcHyLVJA8yY08OJVxDYNSQXMDwEHqUrNw5yMKqieHwzD3imbRHX-asL2xiq0R1fWF86FhOX32fVYtJgAVt7wsQy7riCCYU2kuzCM/4fz/PYUsgxLXSaevQBNDuNiM_A/h0/h001.UpT9KoQZ8YjnAaQFZ-ZT_zj-bmXhWzMw0Spe6t5U6q4)
---
---
---
Dear Young Democrats,

As you may have already seen, **rechartering information is now available on the Convention website, and the rechartering window is now open.**

In advance of this year's convention, we have created new materials that we hope will provide clearer guidance on navigating the chartering and vote apportionment process. This includes a [comprehensive guide](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW451kB1UHFkGz1cupG1HPlIbaEwEPdPJ3kp7oCg9vnLACg4QHPIon3vifVP9LUFopoc9WteYDNjcfcEw6XSLPSJlIvjkRCQea0JxZSxkNQdC3f3i48450vIbU_ZjfW653a04pEX33sJOmxlda1cfaGQjhSJP786K4OfxHOldooysY4cJ2LM8WCL7dtRyzIu_TBaoRf0O89CjWk7ypfoB4RejWr_e64ys0be-vl2uvp2H7XqQ-v-gaUTr49I-YKeDjYwwST70Q_v0Nk9xQVj-c5I8Yp-aRZfisIo0qu03auFGB0vDOhzzRwBQSjtiAlSs2w/4fz/PYUsgxLXSaevQBNDuNiM_A/h1/h001.Jt0Rh6lp8_0wxBH66ZsTQI_VdB8wlgB0WL8zHdRdyvM) to all aspects of chartering, vote apportionment & allocation, seating delegates, and other business that comes before the Credentials Committee. It also includes a one-pager outlining the types of [campaign participation](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW451kB1UHFkGz1cupG1HPlKDpcj2SSIokSDEXXpgPRbcE6ajRlRgtm0ZktERZLqsAOPWX8OIpIiZ7Y2EmO7tDgZUEtr2SOr8Zeqc28HbgkkSftpQqymamSgMlPgNZALBsn3AQvDb5QpUNEPgw5nMHOa-3VYdA3LDhagPokQj5qRWfQVCw1lGi6z4E4r2S2nA63O4RzBfWJ2B_LDdwYCba7exd6YMhSoOzec8PA25TC1P0xhOB5W31lAs5BwmMvWoXmoT5iqmN0q9fy2p3-f2_bvSyOYkubkRkroOmdoaZZcyHJJocm8lActCuy7AaPnV2Q/4fz/PYUsgxLXSaevQBNDuNiM_A/h2/h001.Z8YJOVkm6qBLp6r6K3Ou_FEwhLYSc38UEmS2a4vPJDA) materials that qualify for additional votes, as well as a guide providing greater clarity about. All of this can be found linked in the main guide or in the [master chartering folder](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW1GJm7fH52LAiTq9C8yR9M-cZB9nMnUC3P3FnDXXIgbVJK6Ky80Ts4URGy8LoUIcJD_xfdkFoPABlE69ug03WQmV-5o-2bjY3gTki6X7Yqod_Ia40XjoAFzXgA4n3X7Mqhro2r2XaNkYB37w2_5v0kmpMBQdUj8sRNnJfY5JG63Ob0QwJefielw4vVKWIXmd-VEqo7jmVgqEwo32pNTLpasbqAJXIx0amcm-KcCyxAlk12FEQI9Qp3--xn_VLTEGBU5wDFBgQw27kCe3wbcHgFYsDTZFaDTZr2TPteBJ8aQ7/4fz/PYUsgxLXSaevQBNDuNiM_A/h3/h001.CXMwA7s4N29IppHTTyD1BajA-HEB89Sx1bUaU6U4Yy0). Please let me know if you have any questions about the information in these documents or other aspects of the chartering process. (If I get enough similar types of questions early enough, I can work on improving these documents or creating new ones as needed.)
**
The deadline to submit all chartering and vote apportionment materials, along with initial delegate lists, is July 9. After that date, submitting documents will carry penalties in accordance with YDA rules. I encourage you to review the requirements now and reach out to me with any questions, rather than risk penalties at the deadline.
****
What typically takes the most time to gather?** There's a few things you should especially start thinking about now:
* **Compiling your membership list.** Vote apportionments are capped at 1/2 of a unit's membership-- so if your unit is entitled to the maximum 100 votes, you'll need a membership list of at least 200 to ensure you don't receive any penalties. (The numbers for each unit are available [in this spreadsheet](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW4n9Nv7_ma5wq4DylhVsr5vMiJ8unAp5WEBTwgphW1aVWHSbDO287ZuNi8QWUwCzd9LfZ0EqybzcHWkUPVHwfCwXX9NQw-YW1IQS8XSm6taq59p4qhGkVLSrv2wBToFkios63LQEbkIdlTYufgX7-juptA-vFl2Y8N9yoIdmpp5mRiZQKRCK99walCUJRtHV3L5GFL74vjaaP7wESwbr69sles7xmN6XtqAjq6OqwvwzVLkyqbtAvTgWQ5vJ9n7Wg3Z3OoyldVb_eJ2jz-oHpp9L5-fyrjMYTEqLEyNxuf59oFvPySyAQpLMkmDV934ozg/4fz/PYUsgxLXSaevQBNDuNiM_A/h4/h001.wzvZPSBmcnn4o-sudtMLPr0rl7U7RWwrKEgC2FAofQ8) If you don't already have a continual process for gathering membership information from your affiliated chapters, **I would recommend beginning to gather these now.** A template is linked in the Chartering Guide and/or the Master Chartering Folder above.
* **DNC Member Certification.** All units must have a certification from their DNC member. (Template linked in the chartering folder above) I would recommend reaching out to them now to get this squared away.
* **Campaign participation votes.** Submitting documentation that your unit participated in a Democratic candidate or issue campaign can earn you up to 20 additional votes. We've created a [guide](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW451kB1UHFkGz1cupG1HPlKDpcj2SSIokSDEXXpgPRbcE6ajRlRgtm0ZktERZLqsAOPWX8OIpIiZ7Y2EmO7tDgaBf00HpS0MfbrN6i2xd8sSJdDhF8QswrEWUSGww_SbJggwPZWSBPKek-uGNn3DKbdntfIQ5NwAUF3ioJjBMr1ZGl_d2a4OvdqDt2AJ_Mi54GtOlbozxpJ1SHD-Np7n66u-AXyi_gOPKJ63rExHjwneLPXggW9xneEYieYNUZYwmW0YAnnXFEqjnQJO_6OcUTc-b-Ns9BoyupHp38lQ6LxqVSOE1tX3Pskek4Rs1QU24A/4fz/PYUsgxLXSaevQBNDuNiM_A/h5/h001.pXgp-tlV2Siebz6hscHv6XkDM4-psgZudIUvsWbsJhU) that offers clearer guidance on this aspect of the process.

I encourage you all to reach out to me with any questions about the chartering process (and thank you to those of you who already have!), especially those doing this for the first time. While at first it looks like there's a lot to do, most of what we're asking for likely already exists or is easy to gather.

Looking forward to working with you all,

Harry Bittker
Chair, YDA Convention Credentials Committee
[harrybittker@gmail.com](mailto:harrybittker@gmail.com)

clean_body: Please read if you are a State and Territorial chapter leader | | | | | | Dear Young Democrats, As you may have already seen, rechartering information is now available on the Convention website, and the rechartering window is now open. In advance of this year's convention, we have created new materials that we hope will provide clearer guidance on navigating the chartering and vote apportionment process. This includes a to all aspects of chartering, vote apportionment & allocation, seating delegates, and other business that comes before the Credentials Committee. It also includes a one-pager outlining the types of materials that qualify for additional votes, as well as a guide providing greater clarity about. All of this can be found linked in the main guide or in the . Please let me know if you have any questions about the information in these documents or other aspects of the chartering process. (If I get enough similar types of questions early enough, I can work on improving these documents or creating new ones as needed.) The deadline to submit all chartering and vote apportionment materials, along with initial delegate lists, is July 9. After that date, submitting documents will carry penalties in accordance with YDA rules. I encourage you to review the requirements now and reach out to me with any questions, rather than risk penalties at the deadline. What typically takes the most time to gather? There's a few things you should especially start thinking about now: Compiling your membership list. Vote apportionments are capped at 1/2 of a unit's membership-- so if your unit is entitled to the maximum 100 votes, you'll need a membership list of at least 200 to ensure you don't receive any penalties. (The numbers for each unit are available If you don't already have a continual process for gathering membership information from your affiliated chapters, I would recommend beginning to gather these now. A template is linked in the Chartering Guide and/or the Master Chartering Folder above. DNC Member Certification. All units must have a certification from their DNC member. (Template linked in the chartering folder above) I would recommend reaching out to them now to get this squared away. Campaign participation votes. Submitting documentation that your unit participated in a Democratic candidate or issue campaign can earn you up to 20 additional votes. We've created a that offers clearer guidance on this aspect of the process. I encourage you all to reach out to me with any questions about the chartering process (and thank you to those of you who already have!), especially those doing this for the first time. While at first it looks like there's a lot to do, most of what we're asking for likely already exists or is easy to gather. Looking forward to working with you all, Harry Bittker Chair, YDA Convention Credentials Committee mailto:harrybittker@gmail.com | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats,** | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . name: Gary Sinise
subject: A final chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here... I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ac26890f3a0a4f75ae3b929e519dbeb3&_e=1gIefwHVmb6Hsl6BoQ13sHUAUl-UvCRHF15329OnYVp0uHKeZqJKc_T48I5f5IZzibX6JU-EsmuG-Kdse9Unqrcx7XMTo3d3cBPTQZyougd9h4cYmT55B26MTWn4KuMNXewJnZNTyxqZpBtczNnkBe22TRyJBxp4Zf3ulHJoVlztGlWlOXNjM3zayJEpZyTLGeSDeFz7YffymTMQ--UfTO4ap7ljHVsAah4unF-ReLB6IjbNOq5dpFBvoKf7v7BJvOScFbDU0ZKY_28KDulswAM8fd0PloGry0f0JG9Q6YvXPtQC_Dx5UHGGJQL0fEaX)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ac26890f3a0a4f75ae3b929e519dbeb3&_e=1gIefwHVmb6Hsl6BoQ13sHUAUl-UvCRHF15329OnYVp0uHKeZqJKc_T48I5f5IZzibX6JU-EsmuG-Kdse9Unqrcx7XMTo3d3cBPTQZyougd9h4cYmT55B26MTWn4KuMNXewJnZNTyxqZpBtczNnkBe22TRyJBxp4Zf3ulHJoVlxiM24YmouSoVQR1nUxELU-kI15ecGNlmRIjxP82iHyYVGYy0cysZ2pS8dbLB3ZlM5WPdzXZzZfdVx6iFarlB1T9SJVEePbVyV3L6Q-xfkF152mp-ukWTDtoli6zRXileLFK1MgVghqtpG2npyqH6GC)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ac26890f3a0a4f75ae3b929e519dbeb3&_e=1gIefwHVmb6Hsl6BoQ13sHUAUl-UvCRHF15329OnYVp0uHKeZqJKc_T48I5f5IZzibX6JU-EsmuG-Kdse9Unqrcx7XMTo3d3cBPTQZyougd9h4cYmT55B26MTWn4KuMNXewJnZNTyxqZpBtczNnkBe22TRyJBxp4Zf3ulHJoVlzfy4buZYq9Ukf_7cReTd0AXI6iOe0aaOY494M5ZgIT83W-EvnV4qOoo_pNnZ2tXs17iCDrHO2NKu6oYu2YpmI3WKtBWMFi686GowpFg5tjIj9pMRiyJ4xJ4ehOgW84WECQVwzJvi-5jVq98l-TFUQ6)
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ac26890f3a0a4f75ae3b929e519dbeb3&_e=1gIefwHVmb6Hsl6BoQ13sHUAUl-UvCRHF15329OnYVp0uHKeZqJKc_T48I5f5IZzibX6JU-EsmuG-Kdse9Unqrcx7XMTo3d3cBPTQZyougd9h4cYmT55B26MTWn4KuMNXewJnZNTyxqZpBtczNnkBe22TRyJBxp4Zf3ulHJoVlwVU-iK-xokZ0yUXmZBfFLAjJwcgE2e-h-2BziRmXCBLGl-L0kdWl8CdNO3Fw-mt-fU2XEBKIEN7vvg6Nu0YmMbU6ZJYTMhL402NEcEgeoDAW9fK3AL5BiJzv4bSj9so5sKL43G6blCkD-TYsh5vowY)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ac26890f3a0a4f75ae3b929e519dbeb3&_e=1gIefwHVmb6Hsl6BoQ13sHUAUl-UvCRHF15329OnYVp0uHKeZqJKc_T48I5f5IZzImwXnNR3w6taBUh-kg4lZeKTvBBSW6SPI4HN46hanqbtL32tXZ_gomtE0OqkSPVqv9icon74kwm5KUqzA01OGK_liWnh1VcGuQ_QT8EmQJhxfDaB77O6prh7rHp2YnXPwUvhejakqB23wZfoP5BmTDyFyn9U_TumwPeNcB-NmVjMt2q738PoV-YcvTbncsxj70LzH5yKksPSQGKYGzRH0zyWamHDcZ0q12GHxX5wl5Y%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ac26890f3a0a4f75ae3b929e519dbeb3&_e=1gIefwHVmb6Hsl6BoQ13sHUAUl-UvCRHF15329OnYVp0uHKeZqJKc_T48I5f5IZzibX6JU-EsmuG-Kdse9Unqrcx7XMTo3d3cBPTQZyougd9h4cYmT55B26MTWn4KuMNXewJnZNTyxqZpBtczNnkBe22TRyJBxp4Zf3ulHJoVlzS2L2snnnFJVTTlBErBLTR8nd1GtqrcFBuh9-B60ON8zgkA6AspZx6WCt9J_n-W3iWeLWmqpAIg68eWlSqzNESnP-8CNZysZOZeXBrMVk9QOlLVzESshF84OJACVAoHM6ZSmvT6hqocVp1_uThzJjz) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ac26890f3a0a4f75ae3b929e519dbeb3&_e=1gIefwHVmb6Hsl6BoQ13sHUAUl-UvCRHF15329OnYVp0uHKeZqJKc_T48I5f5IZzibX6JU-EsmuG-Kdse9Unqrcx7XMTo3d3cBPTQZyougd9h4cYmT55B26MTWn4KuMNXewJnZNTyxqZpBtczNnkBe22TRyJBxp4Zf3ulHJoVlx9FaC_W46DQMJ7FnqO5MpOHliM7PSMWacFhisacpaTXZ7QNB-Fl76UTP4Z1D6yvyMddnR4EXaObGed4iFlv6cq-g94fsYquo8cRJmEtM3xF3zmdIt3PoIrpY4vjhK4hgw1iNdQrxP0UL7dY1DAAyEj)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ac26890f3a0a4f75ae3b929e519dbeb3&_e=1gIefwHVmb6Hsl6BoQ13sHUAUl-UvCRHF15329OnYVp0uHKeZqJKc_T48I5f5IZzibX6JU-EsmuG-Kdse9Unqrcx7XMTo3d3cBPTQZyougd9h4cYmT55B26MTWn4KuMNXewJnZNTyxqZpBtczNnkBe22TRyJBxp4Zf3ulHJoVlznXKHETJ_9nOlHvjJpfNJ-lCYoH8hQDpxlbOXtTzpUFPJAUybSgrzEClYBiBlUIgkzOb6I0gBlNNYIxo33O2eioItZKBzzdGdxhHuywVUGByhXaR9PnlWIWRR8IQryU-PpcoKmfuXmRl2IwoRaBrxh)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade

clean_body: It’s Gary Sinise here... I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. | | | Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

THEN — People like you spoke out + took action by calling this memo against ActBlue what it really is: A blatant attack on everyday people. NOW — We have more momentum than ever. Democrats across the country are coming together to fight the Trump administration’s extreme agenda. And we absolutely cannot let this moment go to waste. We need to continue leveraging this energy into action. We need to support candidates running for office up + down the ballot. We need to keep pushing back against new attacks from the Trump administration. And we need your help to do it. So what do you say, Peter? Will you help us elect the leaders responsible for standing strong against these attacks on ActBlue and the American people by rushing a donation of $5, $15, $30, or just whatever you can today? name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: My bipartisan bill to protect your personal information
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Friend,

Whether it's an unelected billionaire like Elon Musk or the Chinese Communist Party, nobody has a right to exploit your sensitive personal data.

That's why I introduced the TELL Act, a bipartisan bill to strengthen consumer data protections and make sure Americans know if their data has been compromised by China or Chinese state-owned companies.

Data security is increasingly important in our modern world, friend. I'm proud to be leading the charge in Congress to protect your personal information and our national cybersecurity interests.

Thank you, friend, for supporting me in that work.

Chip in → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250426_mk_TELL_b1]— Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Come on now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
These are pretty basic concepts.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2531%2E4032634%2EsjSWmw)
---
How old were you when you learned about the three branches of government? Checks and balances? The separation of powers? These are pretty basic concepts. And they still apply to the United States government. Because we still have a Constitution, and the president is still not a king, no matter how much Donald Trump would love to wave a magic wand and make it so. Look, I used to teach law, but no one needs an advanced degree to know that when Congress passes a law, the president needs to enforce it. When the judicial branch gives an order, the president needs to act. But Trump seems to hope that if he bluffs hard enough — if he pretends he’s already got supreme authority — we’ll all bow down to him. Come on now. I will keep fighting back as Trump claims powers he simply does not have, including trying to pull funding for programs and agencies Congress has mandated through law. In the courts, in Congress, and through grassroots organizing, we can continue to build strong opposition against this corrupt administration. And we have to push back whenever anyone tries to legitimize Trump’s attempted power grabs. Here’s an example: last week, I went on CNBC, where we started talking about Trump’s dumb trade war. I laid out my plan — which the Senate will have to vote on, through something called a "privileged motion" — to undo Trump’s “emergency” authority to play his red-light-green-light game with tariffs. One of the CNBC hosts claimed that Congressional action “ultimately doesn’t matter” because Trump “has the authority ultimately.” Excuse me? Of course the law matters — it’s the law. Trump wouldn’t have his “emergency” trade war authority if Congress decided to take it away. I kept explaining how it’s Congress’ job to write the laws and decide which money goes where. How it’s the president’s job to enforce those laws and spend that money where the law tells them. And how if the president fails to do that, the courts step in and enforce the law. We can’t let this narrative take hold that Trump can just do anything he wants, with no one around to check his authority. We have to push back with everything we’ve got, every chance we get. [**I’m in this fight all the way to defend our democracy, uphold the rule of law, and keep our government accountable not just to the rich and powerful but to all families. If you’re able to pitch in a donation to help keep that fight going strong, it would go a long way at this pivotal moment.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2986?t=8&akid=2531%2E4032634%2EsjSWmw)

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fffc04c-8221-43db-909c-be5ecfff08c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6a060d8-3824-4b01-8100-9f2c98b6baf8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: this one is as important as it gets. The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead. [So, before I continue, can I count on you to split a contribution to Abigail Spanberger’s campaign for Governor of Virginia?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f2dd606-3e66-47ad-99a9-7bcdb412784b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb698da50-db5a-4491-bb09-99b9a8099766/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here’s what’s got me terrified: The Cook Political Report has called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025. If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen. Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment. That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference in keeping Virginia blue and in keeping the Democrats on track for victory in 2026. [Will you contribute right now to Blue Amp Action and Abigail Spanberger to help Abigail Spanberger win this race and deliver a major victory for Democrats?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e035ffb-0d6f-4e9d-be7e-26ed2b75c6a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T643da337-cd58-483f-9f3d-09549504079f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: VoteVets
subject: If we win in Virginia, we send a powerful message.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We’ll show the GOP that America isn’t going to let them get away with gutting Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, and the VA. And, honestly, it’ll feel really good.
#
Peter:
Do you remember where Democrats had their first, major statewide victory after Trump was elected in 2016?
**Virginia.**
And do you know what state everyone’s going to be looking at on Election Day this November?
**Virginia. Again.**
If we elect Abigail Spanberger as Virginia’s Governor this year it will send a powerful message to Trump, Elon and extreme MAGA Republicans. We’ll show the GOP that America isn’t going to let them get away with gutting Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, and the VA. And, honestly, it’ll feel really good.
That win and additional wins downballot in important legislative races are not going to come easy, though. The GOP isn’t just going to give them to us. We’re going to need to fight tooth and nail for every victory. That’s why we sent Abigail a $500,000 donation early this year to help her get the job done.
But now, Republican groups are pushing back. We saw one of the first major investments from the GOP this week. It’s a six-figure campaign against several Democrats in the legislature aimed at taking back control of the Virginia State House.
**VoteVets does NOT intend to let them do it.**
[**Please, if you can, make a donation to the VoteVets Virginia Fund. Help us raise the resources it’s going to take to keep up the fight in Virginia — and when we’re celebrating our wins in November, know that you played an important role.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250426-1-120&t=1&akid=34374%2E3013755%2EiK0ygY)

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: Justice doesn’t stop at state lines, and neither does our Squad.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250426-1330-foote&t=1001&akid=1330%2E342411%2ENnq83p ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

While the far right is attacking our rights, our communities, and our
planet, the Squad is showing us what it truly means to fight back — and
win. From immigration justice to climate action, they’re taking on the
billionaire agenda head-on and making real change.

This is a slightly longer email, but we hope you’ll stick with us — what
the Squad is doing right now is urgent, inspiring, and worth your time.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250426-movement.E4IBC-&refcode=em20250426-1330&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1330%2E342411%2ENnq83p ]If that’s all you need to hear and you’re ready to help keep them in
the fight, we’re asking you to chip in now. Every dollar helps power their
work in Congress and fuels this people-powered movement.

Here’s what the Squad has taken on just this week:

Ayanna Pressley visited the ICE detention center where her constituent,
Rümeysa Öztürk, is being held after she spoke out against the genocide in
Gaza. This is one of the most frightening displays of Trump’s
authoritarianism, and Ayanna is standing with those being unjustly
persecuted:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250426-movement.E4IBC-&refcode=em20250426-1330&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1330%2E342411%2ENnq83p ][IMG]

Ilhan Omar has been calling out the Department of Homeland Security’s plan
to monitor the social media accounts of non-citizen residents to track
their statements on Palestine and Israel. Freedom of speech is a core
American right, and Ilhan is making it clear that we won’t let this
administration destroy it.

Rashida Tlaib is holding the administration’s feet to the fire over their
attempts to give a free pass to corporate polluters — especially those
spreading PFAS, or “forever chemicals,” into our environment. Rashida has
already passed amendments and secured over $1 billion for the EPA to
combat PFAS contamination – all of which is now at risk under Trump.

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez just finished another leg of her cross-country
rallies. This time she took our fight for justice to some of the reddest
areas of the country in Montana, Idaho, Utah, and California because all
Americans belong in our movement, no matter where they live. Justice
doesn’t stop at state lines, and neither does our Squad.

clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, While the far right is attacking our rights, our communities, and our planet, the Squad is showing us what it truly means to fight back — and win. From immigration justice to climate action, they’re taking on the billionaire agenda head-on and making real change. This is a slightly longer email, but we hope you’ll stick with us — what the Squad is doing right now is urgent, inspiring, and worth your time. [ ]If that’s all you need to hear and you’re ready to help keep them in the fight, we’re asking you to chip in now. Every dollar helps power their work in Congress and fuels this people-powered movement. Here’s what the Squad has taken on just this week: Ayanna Pressley visited the ICE detention center where her constituent, Rümeysa Öztürk, is being held after she spoke out against the genocide in Gaza. This is one of the most frightening displays of Trump’s authoritarianism, and Ayanna is standing with those being unjustly persecuted: [ ][IMG] Ilhan Omar has been calling out the Department of Homeland Security’s plan to monitor the social media accounts of non-citizen residents to track their statements on Palestine and Israel. Freedom of speech is a core American right, and Ilhan is making it clear that we won’t let this administration destroy it. Rashida Tlaib is holding the administration’s feet to the fire over their attempts to give a free pass to corporate polluters — especially those spreading PFAS, or “forever chemicals,” into our environment. Rashida has already passed amendments and secured over $1 billion for the EPA to combat PFAS contamination – all of which is now at risk under Trump. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez just finished another leg of her cross-country rallies. This time she took our fight for justice to some of the reddest areas of the country in Montana, Idaho, Utah, and California because all Americans belong in our movement, no matter where they live. Justice doesn’t stop at state lines, and neither does our Squad. [ ][IMG] We can’t lose sight of the bigger picture. Our Squad will never stop fighting to protect our victories from the profit-crazed billionaires running our government. [ ]Peter, our Squad needs your help to stay in this fight. Can you donate $3 or more today to help keep them in Congress, fighting for the working class? [ ]Contribute ›› In solidarity, Squad Victory HQ
