| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b5cdc8ad-957b-48b6-9e51-88a57eabfe22?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Shaun Rieley, Ph.D.**
By now the world knows that Jorge Mario Bergolio, better known as Pope Francis I, has passed on to his eternal reward. As many have **[already](https://substack.com/redirect/6e3a13c7-dfc0-430c-b94f-28746c9c7a07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [commented](https://substack.com/redirect/5f9d7611-55ac-429c-8990-997cf79cb3d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, Francis' legacy is an ambiguous one. On one hand, certain moves signaled momentous changes to the Church while on the other, those moves were always carefully couched in sufficient ambiguity to avoid overt charges of breaking with Church doctrine or tradition.

In one sense, the ambiguity is understandable given Francis' preferred emphasis: he generally wanted to be understood as moving the Church in a more "pastoral" direction, meeting people where they are and "accompanying" them in their walk. Early in his pontificate, he famously exhorted young Catholics to not be afraid to "**[make a mess](https://substack.com/redirect/058dbcd1-8ad9-4e4f-940d-b93135733a5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** ", a prompt that he **[reiterated in 2023](https://substack.com/redirect/e6329c83-8a01-4d9e-9c47-6d7c8aba557b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at World Youth Day.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qQuUzbPVJtZYeViKH1mJDt25T078KRipYk5fqq5s74A?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162157894)
And, while the story was nearly always **[more complicated](https://substack.com/redirect/4beddf4d-f42a-470a-a4cb-c1e5f30eaf29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** than much of the media preferred to report, the overall impression is one that prioritized **"[openness](https://substack.com/redirect/ff053488-b788-40b6-9a25-139b3158d953?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"** (read: friendless to modern progressive-liberal pieties) to doctrinal clarity or traditional Catholic teaching.
Of course, the Catholic (from the Greek _katholikos_ , meaning "universal") Church has always understood itself as "open" in that it is inclusive of everyone--in principle if not in fact. But the Church's pastoral mission of "openness" cannot be placed in opposition to its duty to proclaim truth. Far from jettisoning truth, any pastoral (from the Latin _pastor_ meaning "shepherd") approach _must_ maintain its reference to truth, or risk leading the sheep astray.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together With Next Thing Technologies](https://substack.com/redirect/8b816e94-604e-4018-af8e-5a249b9ddb93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **American Battery Technology Aims to Power the $2.1 Trillion Energy Revolution**
A groundbreaking American company has developed sodium-ion battery technology that could transform how we power our homes, businesses, and even our nation's critical infrastructure.
**[Next Thing Technologies](https://substack.com/redirect/8b816e94-604e-4018-af8e-5a249b9ddb93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **has created what many energy experts believe is the future of energy storage - a battery that outperforms lithium technology in three crucial ways:
* Uses materials 1,400× more abundant than increasingly scarce lithium
* Cuts costs by up to 90% compared to lithium alternatives*
* Lasts 33% longer than lithium*

This isn't just a laboratory concept. The company has already achieved commercial-caliber cells and created America's first home-ready sodium-ion battery pack.
With advisors from industry giants and a clear roadmap to market, they're targeting multiple high-growth sectors:
* Residential energy storage: $34-51 billion
* Data centers: $56.58 billion market
* Utility-scale storage: $435 billion by 2030
* EV charging: $257 billion by 2032
* Remote power systems: $206.7 billion by 2033

The total renewable energy market is expected to reach $2.1 trillion by 2032, and Next Thing Technologies aims to capture a significant portion with its American-made solution.
What makes this opportunity unique? They're the only private U.S. company developing sodium-ion batteries that's open to public investment.
For as little as $498 ($6.00 per share), you can **[join over 7,700 investors who have already contributed more than $6.1 million.](https://substack.com/redirect/8b816e94-604e-4018-af8e-5a249b9ddb93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**[This opportunity to invest in America's energy future won't last forever.](https://substack.com/redirect/8b816e94-604e-4018-af8e-5a249b9ddb93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** The company is actively preparing for its first U.S. deployment of a sodium-ion battery-powered home.
**[[LEARN MORE]](https://substack.com/redirect/8b816e94-604e-4018-af8e-5a249b9ddb93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
**(Continued)**
Furthermore, any pastoral approach must rightly read the times--after all, pastoring is an aspect of the cardinal virtue of **[prudence](https://substack.com/redirect/975c6f54-05f4-46f5-a5ea-5f17d22fcae6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ,** the function of which is to apply truth to concrete circumstances. While more "openness" and laxity may have been appropriate in a previous generation, the current generation is drowning in openness and laxness. Young people today are desperately flailing about, looking for something--anything--solid on which to stand.
As R.R. Reno compellingly argues in his book _**[The Return of the Strong Gods](https://substack.com/redirect/b8936103-f57f-4089-81b2-d9f2508a2cf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , the post-World War II project of ever-increasing openness--undermining strong attachments to family, nation, and religious commitments--has led to widespread alienation, especially among young men. There is a **[cost to making a mess](https://substack.com/redirect/d25ad017-a76b-45cf-a52a-b89586a9936f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Many young people--and especially young men--are turning to **[traditional](https://substack.com/redirect/c85d269e-0522-4df2-a69b-bb28211e3652?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [religious practices](https://substack.com/redirect/19471dc4-73f4-4181-8949-ef6a0b15c973?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and **[beliefs](https://substack.com/redirect/75988f3b-73b4-4d2f-8320-72de052665ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** both as a means to navigate the modern world and to challenge themselves to something higher than video games, porn, drugs, casual sex, and the other petty pleasures with which modern culture encourages them to satiate themselves.
What they are looking for, it seems, is a taste of something more substantial and authoritative than the shallowness and disenchantment that modern culture offers. They are looking for what conservative philosopher (and Catholic convert) Russell Kirk called the "**[permanent things](https://substack.com/redirect/9d80ba80-463e-4766-9728-08628e44a22e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** " and what Saint John Paul II called a "**[sign of contradiction](https://substack.com/redirect/ff6c4702-e7b5-409e-8854-7b1c04a81d65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** ". They are looking, in other words, not for easygoing softness but something to encourage them to improve themselves and strive for something transcendent.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qQuUzbPVJtZYeViKH1mJDt25T078KRipYk5fqq5s74A?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162157894)
Given these trends the moment is ripe for a reaffirmation of the deep sources of Church practice, the mystery of faith, the rigors of doctrine, and the call to holiness.

I was confirmed into the Catholic Church 10 years ago this past Easter, in part because I saw the cultural trends and considered the Church to be one of the few remaining bulwarks against total cultural decay and because its authority and beauty offered something robust to belong to. As the oldest institution in existence, the Catholic Church represents a crucial source of life for many cultures, including in[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/3b359e88-7cec-4a8e-b42f-d30e6e85b554?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Africa](https://substack.com/redirect/3b359e88-7cec-4a8e-b42f-d30e6e85b554?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and **[Asia](https://substack.com/redirect/48e8601a-0eb3-492b-8d20-2fbb974664d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** where the Church is rapidly growing, and it remains the **[beating heart](https://substack.com/redirect/7d5a36f3-dcf6-4b8c-8392-ebd8452ec41f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **of Western Civilization. In this sense, questions surrounding the future of the Church should be of interest to more than practicing Catholics--they have serious implications for the future of the West and the future of humanity at large.
However, I became a Catholic most of _all because I came to believe that it is_ _true_. The Church is one of the few places in the modern world that has historically been is unafraid to pronounce Truth confidently--resisting, as Pope Benedict XVI put it, **[the dictatorship of relativism](https://substack.com/redirect/e05c129b-bdcc-4b12-ba32-87577bd10da6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that the modern world has imposed.
This confidence has, unfortunately, been eroded by a lack of clarity around certain matters.
What is needed next is a pope who is able to offer unity combined with clarity of purpose, to provide a compelling vision for the future of humanity. A recovery of confidence, tradition, and beauty are the most necessary things for the next occupant of the Chair of St. Peter--these are the things that will draw in the next generation and maintain the Church in its crucial role as a bulwark of civilization and, more importantly, the source of salvation for all comers.
* * *
**About the Author:**
Shaun Rieley is Director of Educational Programs & Teaching Fellow at Hillsdale College's Washington, D.C. campus. He holds a Ph.D. in political theory and American government from the Catholic University of America.

clean_body: The church remains the beating heart of Western Civilization, and it is now at a crossroads... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? The church remains the beating heart of Western Civilization, and it is now at a crossroads... Apr 26 | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Shaun Rieley, Ph.D. By now the world knows that Jorge Mario Bergolio, better known as Pope Francis I, has passed on to his eternal reward. As many have , Francis' legacy is an ambiguous one. On one hand, certain moves signaled momentous changes to the Church while on the other, those moves were always carefully couched in sufficient ambiguity to avoid overt charges of breaking with Church doctrine or tradition. In one sense, the ambiguity is understandable given Francis' preferred emphasis: he generally wanted to be understood as moving the Church in a more "pastoral" direction, meeting people where they are and "accompanying" them in their walk. Early in his pontificate, he famously exhorted young Catholics to not be afraid to " ", a prompt that he at World Youth Day. And, while the story was nearly always than much of the media preferred to report, the overall impression is one that prioritized "" (read: friendless to modern progressive-liberal pieties) to doctrinal clarity or traditional Catholic teaching. Of course, the Catholic (from the Greek katholikos , meaning "universal") Church has always understood itself as "open" in that it is inclusive of everyone--in principle if not in fact. But the Church's pastoral mission of "openness" cannot be placed in opposition to its duty to proclaim truth. Far from jettisoning truth, any pastoral (from the Latin pastor meaning "shepherd") approach must maintain its reference to truth, or risk leading the sheep astray. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) American Battery Technology Aims to Power the $2.1 Trillion Energy Revolution A groundbreaking American company has developed sodium-ion battery technology that could transform how we power our homes, businesses, and even our nation's critical infrastructure. has created what many energy experts believe is the future of energy storage - a battery that outperforms lithium technology in three crucial ways: Uses materials 1,400× more abundant than increasingly scarce lithium Cuts costs by up to 90% compared to lithium alternatives Lasts 33% longer than lithium This isn't just a laboratory concept. The company has already achieved commercial-caliber cells and created America's first home-ready sodium-ion battery pack. With advisors from industry giants and a clear roadmap to market, they're targeting multiple high-growth sectors: Residential energy storage: $34-51 billion Data centers: $56.58 billion market Utility-scale storage: $435 billion by 2030 EV charging: $257 billion by 2032 Remote power systems: $206.7 billion by 2033 The total renewable energy market is expected to reach $2.1 trillion by 2032, and Next Thing Technologies aims to capture a significant portion with its American-made solution. What makes this opportunity unique? They're the only private U.S. company developing sodium-ion batteries that's open to public investment. For as little as $498 ($6.00 per share), you can The company is actively preparing for its first U.S. deployment of a sodium-ion battery-powered home. [[LEARN MORE]]() (Continued) Furthermore, any pastoral approach must rightly read the times--after all, pastoring is an aspect of the cardinal virtue of , the function of which is to apply truth to concrete circumstances. While more "openness" and laxity may have been appropriate in a previous generation, the current generation is drowning in openness and laxness. Young people today are desperately flailing about, looking for something--anything--solid on which to stand. As R.R. Reno compellingly argues in his book , the post-World War II project of ever-increasing openness--undermining strong attachments to family, nation, and religious commitments--has led to widespread alienation, especially among young men. There is a . Many young people--and especially young men--are turning to and both as a means to navigate the modern world and to challenge themselves to something higher than video games, porn, drugs, casual sex, and the other petty pleasures with which modern culture encourages them to satiate themselves. What they are looking for, it seems, is a taste of something more substantial and authoritative than the shallowness and disenchantment that modern culture offers. They are looking for what conservative philosopher (and Catholic convert) Russell Kirk called the " " and what Saint John Paul II called a " ". They are looking, in other words, not for easygoing softness but something to encourage them to improve themselves and strive for something transcendent. Given these trends the moment is ripe for a reaffirmation of the deep sources of Church practice, the mystery of faith, the rigors of doctrine, and the call to holiness. I was confirmed into the Catholic Church 10 years ago this past Easter, in part because I saw the cultural trends and considered the Church to be one of the few remaining bulwarks against total cultural decay and because its authority and beauty offered something robust to belong to. As the oldest institution in existence, the Catholic Church represents a crucial source of life for many cultures, including in and where the Church is rapidly growing, and it remains the of Western Civilization. In this sense, questions surrounding the future of the Church should be of interest to more than practicing Catholics--they have serious implications for the future of the West and the future of humanity at large. However, I became a Catholic most of all because I came to believe that it is true. The Church is one of the few places in the modern world that has historically been is unafraid to pronounce Truth confidently--resisting, as Pope Benedict XVI put it, that the modern world has imposed. This confidence has, unfortunately, been eroded by a lack of clarity around certain matters. What is needed next is a pope who is able to offer unity combined with clarity of purpose, to provide a compelling vision for the future of humanity. A recovery of confidence, tradition, and beauty are the most necessary things for the next occupant of the Chair of St. Peter--these are the things that will draw in the next generation and maintain the Church in its crucial role as a bulwark of civilization and, more importantly, the source of salvation for all comers. About the Author: Shaun Rieley is Director of Educational Programs & Teaching Fellow at Hillsdale College's Washington, D.C. campus. He holds a Ph.D. in political theory and American government from the Catholic University of America. PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. name: Sarah McBride
subject: I’m just getting started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Here’s what we’ve done.
#
Hi,
It’s hard to believe it’s already been just over 100 days since I was sworn in to represent Delaware in Congress.
It’s the privilege of a lifetime, and I’ve been working my heart out to defend the First State and deliver for Delawareans.
Over the last 100 days, I have:
✅ Protected **hundreds of Delaware jobs** by helping reverse reckless manufacturing cuts.
✅ Introduced two bipartisan bills to **lower costs and protect consumers.**
✅ Delivered **$360,000 back to Delawareans** in benefits they were owed — Social Security, VA, tax refunds, and more.
✅ Drove **3,000+ miles** across our state, meeting with first responders, farmers, educators, small business owners, health care providers, and Delawareans of all backgrounds.
✅ Continued to **defend Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security** from Republican attempts to gut, cut, or privatize them.
This job is about showing up, listening, rolling up your sleeves, and getting to work. That’s what I’ve done over the past 100 days. And it’s exactly what I’ll keep doing.
**But I can’t do it alone.** The reason I’ve been able to stay focused on legislating and advocating is because of grassroots supporters like you.
**We’ve made real progress — but there’s still much more to do. And I’m ready to keep going with everything I’ve got with you by my side.**[**Will you chip in to help power my work in Congress for the next 100 days and beyond?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250426-1?refcode=em20250426-1936&amount=5&refcode2=1936_21716_MZjUc0&akid=1936%2E21716%2EMZjUc0)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250426-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250426-1936&refcode2=1936_21716_MZjUc0&akid=1936%2E21716%2EMZjUc0)**
Thank you for believing in me!
Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250426-1&t=1&refcode2=1936_21716_MZjUc0&akid=1936%2E21716%2EMZjUc0)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1936%2E21716%2EMZjUc0)

name: Navigating Uncertainty (by Vikram Mansharamani)
subject: The Global Split Accelerates
body:
China works to strengthen ties in its own neighborhood

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..tLBLdjiUljWFwJQ9O9qn8ynvgT8unkf2Ev4lEGqtIMg?) for more
---
[](https://substack..vaEmqXS1iez_bVWRV5gcGKArKGunCpTrzK0L3CsTSvM?)
---
# [The Global Split Accelerates ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=162169747&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMTY5NzQ3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDU2ODM0MDgsImV4cCI6MTc0ODI3NTQwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.I_I34G7w0Ib-4sh3HjCG05ibo4zo_CFBiL-owwYd8eo)
### China works to strengthen ties in its own neighborhood
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| Apr 26
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=162169747&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMTY5NzQ3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NTY4MzQwOCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ4Mjc1NDA4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kGpM10XzxXS1MbHmST2w9qnJ-RZ3JNEwVmUJ0rIcn2M&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=162169747&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMTY5NzQ3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDU2ODM0MDgsImV4cCI6MTc0ODI3NTQwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.I_I34G7w0Ib-4sh3HjCG05ibo4zo_CFBiL-owwYd8eo&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=162169747&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMTY5NzQ3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDU2ODM0MDgsImV4cCI6MTc0ODI3NTQwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.I_I34G7w0Ib-4sh3HjCG05ibo4zo_CFBiL-owwYd8eo)
---
| | [](https://substack..PICjofk_ZtaJzixlvvt2ASaI4a5vspaqJ31Uwd7BAss?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/the-global-split-accelerates?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f13a92ff-cac2-476a-b720-7ba226a86403?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I have long been thought the world is in the process of bifurcating into two economic ecosystems, one led by America and the other by China. As is now obvious to the world, the split is accelerating as China's global ambition runs headlong into President Trump's 21st century [version](https://substack.com/redirect/0633dcd7-ed76-4943-aa8c-b14d7a282c86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the Monroe Doctrine that is best thought of as the Americas First movement. The United States is clearly focused on partnering with neighbors in the Western Hemisphere and providing notice to the Chinese and other foreign powers that North and South America are off-limits.
On the other side of the world, however, China is effectively telegraphing to America that Southeast Asia is off limits. Next month, the [46th ASEAN Summit](https://substack.com/redirect/1c0a4232-4c6a-4d8b-83c7-3ca2639e9bb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) will take place in Malaysia. In addition to the typical symbolic meetings among leaders of ASEAN's 10 member nations, some new additions suggest the bifurcation is indeed progressing faster than most of us are aware.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Z0sZ0s3X18MNxvUzAHNMcwenvjpnae7YPI2PEcS9Pp8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162169747)
Specifically, ASEAN leaders plan to meet with their counterparts from the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC), a collection of six Middle Eastern countries that have the large reservoirs of energy necessary to power ASEAN growth. Both regions are key economic hubs, Southeast Asia in manufacturing and tech, and the Gulf in energy and finance. In 2023, the GCC and ASEAN held a first-ever summit in Riyadh and next month's meeting is evidence the ties are strengthening. But how does this all tie to the [US-China War](https://substack.com/redirect/0d9f816d-4950-489a-ac6c-a91c100ba0f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?
Well, there's also a third meeting during the summit that really caught my eye. It's an ASEAN-GCC meeting that also includes....drumroll please...China.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd67ca2f-e00d-42a3-8277-6272e1cf7337?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
China is the world's largest energy importer and has long sought stronger ties with the Gulf's oil-exporting countries. They are seeking to lock in long-term supply deals and to settle more oil trades in yuan rather than dollars. And while that's been true for years, it's the ASEAN-GCC-China connection that points to a more serious collaboration...and China's attempt to de facto create an economic ecosystem from Malaysia to Beijing, and Hong Kong to Riyadh. Think of it as China's [version](https://substack.com/redirect/9422e3a0-1031-4e1e-8d25-a26bfbd34678?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the Monroe Doctrine.
China is already ASEAN's largest trading partner, and it is eager to strengthen the [China-ASEAN Free Trade Area (CAFTA)](https://substack.com/redirect/f6d6d089-351f-4761-86d5-98fa3f5895b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Regional security is also on the agenda, including cooperation on cybersecurity, transnational crime, and disaster response. Addressing disputes in the South China Sea is also a top ASEAN concern, and it hopes to finalize the South China Sea Code of Conduct by 2026.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Z0sZ0s3X18MNxvUzAHNMcwenvjpnae7YPI2PEcS9Pp8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162169747)
Nudging the U.S. out of the far Pacific and snapping the petrodollar backbone of the global financial order are key elements of China's plan to challenge the U.S. role as global superpower. Security agreements, trade deals, direct investment, cultural exchanges and Chinese language programs, the infrastructure projects of the Belt and Road Initiative (BRI), and direct investment have all been means toward this end.
Nudging the U.S. out of the far Pacific and snapping the petrodollar backbone of the global financial order are key elements of China's plan to challenge the U.S. role as global superpower.
So, how has the U.S. reacted to these moves, especially those involving ASEAN?
The Biden administration was [aggressive](https://substack.com/redirect/a6a75b53-6af5-41e8-9bf2-10573cf03d58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), seeking to strengthen ties and relations. The U.S. and ASEAN elevated their relationship into a Comprehensive Strategic Partnership, a joint maritime exercise was planned, and USAID launched a five-year partnership program. There was also a flurry of diplomatic activity, with a long line of U.S. officials visiting ASEAN countries, including then-U.S. Secretary of State Anthony Blinken; over the course of the administration, five U.S.-ASEAN Summits were held.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a6549ca1-f552-4ecd-913e-c8aaa54e5862?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Contrast this with the Trump administration's approach, which was kicked-off with tariffs that hit the region especially hard; many [countries](https://substack.com/redirect/48bb6f1a-127a-49e0-972c-986c89d39bc9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the bloc were hit with tariffs in excess of 40%. China has sought to take advantage, and Chinese President Xi Jinping recently finished a Southeast Asia [tour](https://substack.com/redirect/08cf621e-c513-4709-8d51-19223e3d5464?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), presenting China as a reliable and stable partner. Expect President Trump to take a more transactional approach, always asking, "What's in it for the U.S.?" The right answers will likely involve dollars and cents. Power and influence to counter the Chinese, while necessary, may no longer be a sufficient response to secure US engagement.
Trump's approach - eschewing foreign entanglements, staying focused on the Americas, limiting reliance on foreign goods and energy - is only going to accelerate the decades-long separation of the world into two systems. As the United States retrenches to the Western Hemisphere, America is increasing focused on keeping foreign influences out of Americas. Countries and corporate leaders alike need to recognize these developments mean they will eventually have to pick a side, especially when it comes to accepting inbound investment and the influence it.
Trade patterns will shift over time and buying from and selling to China won't follow a linear trend, but **the real choice that needs to be made is around investments and the influence granted to investors**. These choices are being made right now as corporate boardrooms in America and government leaders in Beijing decide where to invest their capital...and countries choose from whom to seek and accept investments.
As I recently shared with the CEO of one of the world's largest mining companies, it's one thing to sell China copper; it's a completely different thing to sell them the copper mine."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Z0sZ0s3X18MNxvUzAHNMcwenvjpnae7YPI2PEcS9Pp8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162169747)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=162169747&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMTY5NzQ3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDU2ODM0MDgsImV4cCI6MTc0ODI3NTQwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.I_I34G7w0Ib-4sh3HjCG05ibo4zo_CFBiL-owwYd8eo)
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=162169747&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyMTY5NzQ3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDU2ODM0MDgsImV4cCI6MTc0ODI3NTQwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.I_I34G7w0Ib-4sh3HjCG05ibo4zo_CFBiL-owwYd8eo&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/40fb9c19-f792-47cd-b0e5-68ba32dbec61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/56ec2427-7c75-4899-a383-59f9d40e00f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/fb8822bb-43de-4b8f-ab69-b3147a26fabd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/0e6e4d4d-09e6-4ead-a6ba-586769695319?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

name: Ritchie (personal)
subject: I need your help, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
As a top PA supporter, will you take a moment to fill out this Democratic Priorities Survey for me?

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106564601/541915314/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODQwNzg4MC1iNzIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DWi1J2QNwnyUix8apNs82AR5B46gYEbiIgnFB3YBglk=)
---
Peter, it’s an understatement to say that this year, the MAGA trifecta in the House, Senate, and White House has been plagued by extremism and chaos.

**But if we want to win back the House or Senate next year, there will be _a lot_ of tough decisions to make between now and then.**

Everything from affordable housing to Social Security is on the line, Peter – so we need to know what PA Democrats care about MOST as we look ahead.

[**Peter, as one of our top PA supporters, you were _hand-picked_ for this survey. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Fight back against the authoritarian takeover of our democracy
body:
With relentless attacks on our communities, this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. | | |
---
Friend, With relentless**** attacks on our healthcare, nutrition, housing, public education, and other essential services, as well as our rights to free speech and due process, this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. We need to take collective action in defense of our communities. My team and I have held **multiple Town Halls** with hundreds of attendees to come together and resist this authoritarian administration. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqubpsDfO4uxz1oPrzMZiNq7nNzeMv6994W_4hYtA5Qke7eMg4KDAZ9eW3L_mwFz_Ucqs0Q91TWkD3hieWF1cFboLXtI6vdbosvuVfRGzBY-XEHemtU_jGNSdpIST7LmRiNWSlh5HAuX4TdAc4wpjFo15we3LaWMq58tOfIT4e2fb7i7EQEvG52defmMEdJprt5Mdbleaqq3eM3v9tjfNfp9QsYEJD2df1vj0tyfR3DomvIADRBmcaBrIuCs4OgGOi4H1SxT0rDVHVFQEgo55Eh-8VK09oO1MawrAv4vyorIfq4VEMau4JZCVsaNzzv0eixttQ8wJN_-X-n3yUKgiQdzhH7om_OceK8-DWNM1lmCdeoWc4SrcIAlBon_36F_V3I4S1YpzihvhtsoUL2vSsrx/4fz/fFnFOwlcTWaNQfoMmGs9Ng/h0/h001.1GxXW4ohMuazrRAYjMWEcZduQJba8ZLPgZ7qzQO_lB0) We’re also fighting back against Congressional Republicans’ dangerous budget, which will cut $880 billion from Medicaid to pay for even more tax cuts for billionaires. This week and next, we’re sending thousands of postcards and holding **HANDS OFF Medicaid phonebanks** to connect with people in our neighboring congressional district, represented by Republican Congressman John James. We’re mobilizing his constituents because **we can protect life-saving programs like Medicaid if we can move three to four Republican members of Congress to flip their votes**. And soon we’ll be launching our **2025 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship** to train young (primarily BIPOC*) activists and leaders in community organizing, including providing stipends to participants. [**Can you rush a donation today to power our ongoing work to mobilize our communities and resist this authoritarian administration? Pitch in and support my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqubpsDfO4uxz1oPrzMZiNq7nNzeMv6994W_4hYtA5Qke6ScJXqIcfit5TprJJkIOSIWx6IvCaiedfCjpO7XmUgIqLC8wyidkrzmf1veeUwiJ8DHJ8pEmQiVz70yoLudemuxlsKv88JkPVsCIaPLEF5BnmMtJ5DPnPHnXKDA48nGGj1EHpr3o2U1QOh1I0wu2suJ1RsFKKnVQ8XhRK13Il4mEJP6vZ4vz3yV_X1wqdJCiRLugnyCBIeTixBxP3X5pfz3yxuCjJKJL271D_Qdi5CVoYHSYMGmrZ1OwUTuvTfmMS0-etsll32Ia9qT872AVVtIYqjm3G3XJ_WezG7HFxZGAiQB6z69pDqH3yZXkp4VXMZKcLZZmIN2rleHUVZkC636u-4qBi7uqKyLFzhSEUVV/4fz/fFnFOwlcTWaNQfoMmGs9Ng/h1/h001.JrfFJEQiamPhoc78MqbLkca0q4Cemm2EfcDJAu8pWuI) | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqubpsDfO4uxz1oPrzMZiNq7nNzeMv6994W_4hYtA5Qke4c_1CStv3cdZTw5RnBWWHGrVuCvhuNajTQ4MCVJLxiGDe3MqArmh7Ga4gIHj84zqSp6pKF-aLX9acBr3CPtxmpxPCpWES5NTp9JvWoGS7uSxlabmH6JnzEl-YAhXAQJ5b1P5M19wiTpnVct3YMAUZNgVFxidEM_udMWTiTVs2gF5g_gANqEDWnLRvDfknXPQr_ejFGCfoIWKA7XhQjJ94cViOhvg30Nz--OLdGuluSAeZw_JG9xB6AWVz2Ftzy8lgUivZJHQCM7Iaj2c5YMJfEmTS2svmp5SXEw6zfRAOc9eQ9NWsuTGEyb44vavpqobaMkKzmHWniFXfxcSqUfVP4vrYduP4eGTOFKE4r-_RZI/4fz/fFnFOwlcTWaNQfoMmGs9Ng/h2/h001.mcqZNTIaFszbwqG6rxJ4rSjbDvTtXMDycRgzLyexc3s)

I created my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to empower everyday people in our democracy and to train candidates to run for office who have the lived experience to represent our communities.
This month, we wrapped up **our first Rooted in Community Campaign School of 2025,** where we trained 19 progressive candidates from diverse backgrounds to run for office.
[****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqubpsDfO4uxz1oPrzMZiNq7nNzeMv6994W_4hYtA5Qke1A3P9lbLyt_-Hl5yu_cZzePne_HJprQM-afjY19vz59yBGJsiLJeuF22G07Wr-YHkESxVG1ZpsLh2V5hPy6xQAZChUnMlVJY65YmYbsBB4qdQyCe8seN5WAa0RP1lrDMRtm54R973Pd3mPaJRJ9xswiXy2_9zED_vkaEtk1Wfx9wBSVDuYuReAN3HHVDywfXmcbTszlRZw58XSz3gSg5jYTMasS6MGi8IvCrTEL_8j9s8SoIyE1fDhW1hoFv2ZB9T7pAogy2fB15FTYDQwF_RcZLjU3w9lXRI38hzsnAHavgsmNtpGY2ibro6qfXtvWoDacrfrdq89PqfkomnAetAfIMn44ZBLGdRyuYD2y29Th/4fz/fFnFOwlcTWaNQfoMmGs9Ng/h3/h001.pSB2gxrxlcV2IsyPu71mB0LNVT-isntwzy1ZKLcx6ZA)
**Too often, elected officials are millionaires who are disconnected from the everyday realities of their constituents.** Last month, Trump’s *billionaire* Commerce Secretary said that if Social Security checks didn’t go out, his mother-in-law wouldn’t complain. He also said the only people who would complain are fraudsters.
**This administration, led by the richest man in the world, Elon Musk, is completely divorced from the reality that our communities face** as we live paycheck to paycheck and work two or three jobs just to put food on our tables and keep a roof over our heads.
[**I know this is a difficult time for all of us. If you can, donate today to power the resistance needed to defend our communities from an authoritarian takeover of our democracy.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqubpsDfO4uxz1oPrzMZiNq7nNzeMv6994W_4hYtA5Qke5V5Azi78K8gjZHLd2fzs5SqtheQ4ZJ69_lxitdK2NuB3kn14qAEqhhncwSJ6CUDwNl3N_i40hZkZI4ISOb-ltqVDbBrz95CsP7PVppny-TKlWbLijww1hh_gnegkeQLwj8KYACREE9gqoK3zh9eh1VbI27HOQta7D1sBTZVnOSwuSwsTLj8hVUEElgHXd4qJSgiJThCwOyPUMlleC1KuvBooSqct_36FwVNQzyql_POEUUB-23lntbbAa5LvkU-WskzUoBmOZ5HtHGL1E_2kMxzMZtwXJ5cYe7ZGsX9X7NI8HT5bd5khvn8eKUeUXeS0yEA6RODPuEyrmtZWF4Qyizp7PkRd3v0hq8yvQh4CZXn/4fz/fFnFOwlcTWaNQfoMmGs9Ng/h4/h001.9BjRdWOr4Ol3Q8pdnbXwiL7V2K_JB0_ry0SqV7MoTOo)

clean_body: With relentless attacks on our communities, this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. | | | Friend, With relentless** attacks on our healthcare, nutrition, housing, public education, and other essential services, as well as our rights to free speech and due process, this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. We need to take collective action in defense of our communities. My team and I have held multiple Town Halls with hundreds of attendees to come together and resist this authoritarian administration. We’re also fighting back against Congressional Republicans’ dangerous budget, which will cut $880 billion from Medicaid to pay for even more tax cuts for billionaires. This week and next, we’re sending thousands of postcards and holding HANDS OFF Medicaid phonebanks to connect with people in our neighboring congressional district, represented by Republican Congressman John James. We’re mobilizing his constituents because we can protect life-saving programs like Medicaid if we can move three to four Republican members of Congress to flip their votes. And soon we’ll be launching our 2025 Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship to train young (primarily BIPOC) activists and leaders in community organizing, including providing stipends to participants. | I created my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to empower everyday people in our democracy and to train candidates to run for office who have the lived experience to represent our communities. This month, we wrapped up our first Rooted in Community Campaign School of 2025, where we trained 19 progressive candidates from diverse backgrounds to run for office. Too often, elected officials are millionaires who are disconnected from the everyday realities of their constituents. Last month, Trump’s billionaire Commerce Secretary said that if Social Security checks didn’t go out, his mother-in-law wouldn’t complain. He also said the only people who would complain are fraudsters. This administration, led by the richest man in the world, Elon Musk, is completely divorced from the reality that our communities face as we live paycheck to paycheck and work two or three jobs just to put food on our tables and keep a roof over our heads. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | With you in this fight, Rashida BIPOC means Black, Indigenous, and people of color * | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . Add your name to stop the "No Rogue Rulings Act"
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106565938/541920322/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTYzYTllNS1iODIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cL-HMswwro14YNE6vZOV6ECSjT77j79J5hfubAib4I=&emci=ce2ca39c-7b20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8963a9e5-b822-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=6787172)

| **Stop the constitutional crisis!** The “No Rogue Rulings Act” would take away the federal judiciary’s ability to curb Trump’s unconstitutional agenda. We need as many democracy defenders to tell the Senate to make sure that this bill doesn’t get passed.

[Add your name and tell the Senate: Say NO to the “No Rogue Rulings Act!”](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106565945/541920330/-1444369773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTYzYTllNS1iODIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cL-HMswwro14YNE6vZOV6ECSjT77j79J5hfubAib4I=&emci=ce2ca39c-7b20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8963a9e5-b822-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=6787172)

[I'm In: Defend Our Democracy →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106565949/541920338/-1444369773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTYzYTllNS1iODIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cL-HMswwro14YNE6vZOV6ECSjT77j79J5hfubAib4I=&emci=ce2ca39c-7b20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8963a9e5-b822-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=6787172)
Folks, we’re going to say the quiet part out loud: **Donald Trump is on an unconstitutional rampage.**
From trying to eliminate birthright citizenship to illegally disappearing legal residents, it’s clear that the Trump Administration has no regard for the rule of law.
**One of the only things that has consistently stood in the way of Trump’s dream of a total dictatorship has been the federal judiciary.**
Liberal and conservative judges alike have taken firm stances against Trump’s agenda. Federal judges were the ones who upheld birthright citizenship, halted funding freezes, and demanded that wrongfully terminated federal employees be reinstated.
_Even Trump’s allies on the Supreme Court took a stand against him illegally deporting Kilmar Abrego Garcia._
And let’s make one thing very clear: The federal judiciary is doing _exactly_ what they’re supposed to do in the face of executive overreach. Remember learning about checks and balances in school? **This is checks and balances in action.**
But just a few days ago, Trump’s allies in the House of Representatives passed the **“No Rogue Rulings Act,”** which would take away the judiciary’s power to curb his power.
[If this bill passes, we’ll be just that much closer to full-on authoritarianism. So if you believe our democracy is worth defending, add your name BEFORE MIDNIGHT to tell your senators to stop this bill in its tracks.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106565950/541920339/-1444369773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTYzYTllNS1iODIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cL-HMswwro14YNE6vZOV6ECSjT77j79J5hfubAib4I=&emci=ce2ca39c-7b20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8963a9e5-b822-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: Add your name to stop the "No Rogue Rulings Act" | | Stop the constitutional crisis! The “No Rogue Rulings Act” would take away the federal judiciary’s ability to curb Trump’s unconstitutional agenda. We need as many democracy defenders to tell the Senate to make sure that this bill doesn’t get passed. Folks, we’re going to say the quiet part out loud: Donald Trump is on an unconstitutional rampage. From trying to eliminate birthright citizenship to illegally disappearing legal residents, it’s clear that the Trump Administration has no regard for the rule of law. One of the only things that has consistently stood in the way of Trump’s dream of a total dictatorship has been the federal judiciary. Liberal and conservative judges alike have taken firm stances against Trump’s agenda. Federal judges were the ones who upheld birthright citizenship, halted funding freezes, and demanded that wrongfully terminated federal employees be reinstated. Even Trump’s allies on the Supreme Court took a stand against him illegally deporting Kilmar Abrego Garcia. And let’s make one thing very clear: The federal judiciary is doing exactly what they’re supposed to do in the face of executive overreach. Remember learning about checks and balances in school? This is checks and balances in action. But just a few days ago, Trump’s allies in the House of Representatives passed the “No Rogue Rulings Act,” which would take away the judiciary’s power to curb his power. | Thanks for making your voice heard, NextGen America | | = |

**Here’s why our upcoming special election in Minnesota should be on your watch list:**
1. Democrats hold a narrow one-seat majority in the Minnesota Senate. Winning this race would strengthen our party’s power in this battleground state.
2. Special elections create critical opportunities for Democrats to gain power over Trump’s cronies in the states.
3. If spotlight candidate Denise Slipy wins, Democrats would flip this seat blue.

clean_body: | Friend, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in = , but first let me explain why your support is so important. The Central Valley is often overlooked – but it’s the beating heart of democracy. This is where César Chávez and the UFW organized and won dignity for working people. It’s where families rise before dawn to work the fields that feed the country. And it’s where Democrats have a 5 point registration advantage , but Republicans managed to capture this seat. We can’t let that stand. Fighting back against Musk, Trump, and the billionaire class can’t just happen in safe blue districts. It has to happen in places like this – and it has to be led by the people with the most at stake. body:
Trump began targeting the way we power our campaigns. He’s directed the Department of Justice to investigate ActBlue so he can shut down our fundraising, silence your voice, and crush our ability to fight back.
#

Team — we know you can’t chip in to every email we send, and we don’t expect you to.
But there are times when making that donation is especially important. Unfortunately, today is one of those times. Please, if you have a minute, let us explain:
**FIRST:**
Mark won some of the most competitive elections in the country in 2020 and 2022 without taking a cent from corporate PACs. Millions of people donated. We’re proud of that fact, and you should be, too.

**THEN:**
Trump began targeting the way we power our campaigns. He’s directed the Department of Justice to investigate ActBlue so he can shut down our fundraising, silence your voice, and crush our ability to fight back.

**NOW:**
We can’t let Trump intimidate us. Donating through ActBlue is safe and secure, and we’ve got to raise as much as we can as quickly as we can to prepare for whatever comes next.
Please, if you understand how big a threat this is — how critical grassroots donations are to winning competitive elections around the country and turning the tide against Trump — we’re humbly asking you:
[**Make a donation to Mark Kelly’s campaign as he continues to fight back against Donald Trump and the MAGA Right.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-apr25.P7mRSa&refcode=em250426-1-500&t=1&akid=6051%2E6688874%2ETNiygf)

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106567160/541925193/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250426_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmNiN2QzMS1iYzIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZFhWvsZdsTM1uXWq_jAqBVZKuakbC0l4fG_p1kPK3Jg=)

Peter, it’s undeniable: **Pete Hegseth has got to go. ** In another shocking breach of national security, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has leaked military intel in a Signal group chat, this time on his personal cell phone. Members of Hegseth’s inner circle, including his wife, brother, and lawyer, were also included in the thread. Hegseth’s gross ineptitude is putting the lives of the brave men and women who serve our country at risk, and it’s past time for him to resign. **Our troops and our country will be safer if Hegseth leaves his position.** **[He’s got to go, and we’ve got to keep the pressure. If you agree, please sign on to demand Hegseth resign as Secretary of Defense before his mistakes cost Americans their lives.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106567162/541925195/-1889578289?contactdata=tiZh3CD8iP+7z0Vi/rHftP4kx9u56zYtj+aAjc4dQ9a/BDYc64QFfqF/DWj6uHrUE1svKNJLF1O6SlUdinRVIAWKSXkLk4SatyrqYXRwChFz7MOgKXn94d2r5mwnTlR3/A0Gw2qi5RM2fV+ayT48KkKvZlZuqwcU0kENNRt1V50=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250426_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmNiN2QzMS1iYzIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZFhWvsZdsTM1uXWq_jAqBVZKuakbC0l4fG_p1kPK3Jg=&emci=3acb7d31-bc22-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=42cb7d31-bc22-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=43402272)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106567164/541925198/-1889578289?contactdata=tiZh3CD8iP+7z0Vi/rHftP4kx9u56zYtj+aAjc4dQ9a/BDYc64QFfqF/DWj6uHrUE1svKNJLF1O6SlUdinRVIAWKSXkLk4SatyrqYXRwChFz7MOgKXn94d2r5mwnTlR3/A0Gw2qi5RM2fV+ayT48KkKvZlZuqwcU0kENNRt1V50=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250426_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmNiN2QzMS1iYzIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZFhWvsZdsTM1uXWq_jAqBVZKuakbC0l4fG_p1kPK3Jg=&emci=3acb7d31-bc22-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=42cb7d31-bc22-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=43402272)

In Congress, if I receive a special briefing, I go to a designated room in the Capitol. Before entering, I am required to leave my phone and anything that is connected to it behind in a special cubby.
That’s because personal phones _are not secure._
It doesn’t matter what app you use — for Hegseth to communicate confidential war plans on his personal device is a shocking breach of security.
**Hegseth doesn’t know what the hell he’s doing, and we’re all at risk because of it.** **[Please add your name to join me in demanding his resignation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106567170/541925202/-1889578289?contactdata=tiZh3CD8iP+7z0Vi/rHftP4kx9u56zYtj+aAjc4dQ9a/BDYc64QFfqF/DWj6uHrUE1svKNJLF1O6SlUdinRVIAWKSXkLk4SatyrqYXRwChFz7MOgKXn94d2r5mwnTlR3/A0Gw2qi5RM2fV+ayT48KkKvZlZuqwcU0kENNRt1V50=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250426_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmNiN2QzMS1iYzIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZFhWvsZdsTM1uXWq_jAqBVZKuakbC0l4fG_p1kPK3Jg=&emci=3acb7d31-bc22-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=42cb7d31-bc22-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=43402272)**

name: Team Sharice
subject: This is beyond the pale
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
LGBTQ+ folks, and especially kids, deserve acceptance and support from their government

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106567278/541925624/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODQ2M2Q2NC1iYzIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQmJo7H4puLA5Sdclis8oHvsGHMNsnEGLEZqaAGHOq4=) We have seen many examples of the Trump administration’s cruelty since the beginning of the year, but this is beyond the pale: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106567279/541925625/-1273468325?refcode=email_042625_hotline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODQ2M2Q2NC1iYzIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQmJo7H4puLA5Sdclis8oHvsGHMNsnEGLEZqaAGHOq4=&emci=f1911fb2-4821-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=98463d64-bc22-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=22117458) Listen, Sharice Davids understands that LGBTQ+ folks, and especially kids, deserve acceptance and support from their government. Instead, RFK Jr. and Donald Trump intend to rip that support away from a countless number of kids in Kansas and across the country. Make no mistake: This hotline saves lives. LGBTQ+ youth are four times more likely than their peers to attempt suicide, and the hotline itself receives an average of 2,100 contacts per day. **But without this resource, LGBTQ+ kids would be forced to endure a crisis alone.** With dangerous anti-LGBTQ+ rhetoric reaching an all-time high, we should be giving these kids the resources they need not only to live as their authentic selves, but to thrive as their authentic selves as well. Unfortunately, these cuts represent an enormous step _backward_ from that goal — and that’s why Sharice is fighting back. [_**This fight isn’t over yet. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: This is tough, but I’m not backing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106567400/541926117/-955580453?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.26_policy-record-eom_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTdjMTNhYi1iYzIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXPNwZHDWnydRz7ewW1PUcHUnTFnyAr-S7mVXnvF4PE=) It’s Kirsten. I wanted to personally reach out.

The past 96 days with Donald Trump as president and Republicans in the majority have been devastating, stressful and straight up exhausting.

But I won’t back down from a tough fight — so here’s a glimpse into what I’ve been fighting for this month in Washington:
* Elon Musk, Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are attempting to gut Medicaid — threatening access to lifesaving health care for seniors and vulnerable communities. **That’s why I’ve spoken out and denounced Republicans’ hundreds of billions of dollars in proposed cuts.**
* Social Security is on the chopping block, too. While the GOP plans to cut Social Security staff and delay services, **I’ve worked with my constituents to ensure they receive their benefits on time and introduced a bill to increase payments by $2,400 per year.**
* Trump’s reckless policies have plunged the U.S. into an economic downturn, hitting working-class Americans the hardest. **I’m proud to have introduced legislation to increase the minimum wage to $17 an hour to lessen the burden.**

My work has always been about making life easier for all Americans — not padding the wallets of the rich and powerful.

**You’ve always had my back when it matters most, so I’m counting on you now: Will you pitch in before my end-of-month deadline in just a few days and help me continue to stand strong against GOP attacks?**

Here’s the link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defeat-the-gop](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106567402/541926119/-955580453?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.26_policy-record-eom_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTdjMTNhYi1iYzIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXPNwZHDWnydRz7ewW1PUcHUnTFnyAr-S7mVXnvF4PE=)**

With so much gratitude,

Kirsten
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106567408/541926123/1865269831?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.26_policy-record-eom_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTdjMTNhYi1iYzIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXPNwZHDWnydRz7ewW1PUcHUnTFnyAr-S7mVXnvF4PE=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. [**Please, donate today to make sure my team and I can continue securing crucial progress on the issues that matter the most and help flip the Senate blue in 2026.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106567412/541926130/1865269831?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.26_policy-record-eom_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTdjMTNhYi1iYzIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXPNwZHDWnydRz7ewW1PUcHUnTFnyAr-S7mVXnvF4PE=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Campaign fundraising is down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
With Trump’s policies throwing the economy into complete chaos, it’s not just the stock market that’s down — campaign fundraising is down too.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250426-4987-footer&t=1&akid=4987%2E420207%2EONrVl5)
Peter, with Trump’s policies throwing the economy into complete chaos, it’s not just the stock market that’s down — **campaign fundraising is down too.**
This graphic shows all donations through ActBlue since September 2020, and it’s pretty clear when Trump’s tariff chaos begins:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250426?refcode=em20250426-4987&amount=3&refcode2=4987_420207_ONrVl5&akid=4987%2E420207%2EONrVl5)
With the state of the economy so uncertain, housing costs sky high, and groceries getting even more expensive, we know not everyone has the spare cash to donate to political campaigns — and that’s completely okay.
**However, if you _are_ in a position to donate right now, we’re coming up on an important end-of-month deadline, and we could use your help to reach our $39,000 goal. [So if you can, will you pitch in $3 today to support Pramila’s work for the progressive movement?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250426?refcode=em20250426-4987&amount=3&refcode2=4987_420207_ONrVl5&akid=4987%2E420207%2EONrVl5)**
Pramila doesn’t take a dime from corporations or their PACs, and she doesn’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you because Pramila is _fighting_ for working people like you.
**That means everything we’re doing depends on your support, Peter** — from the Resistance Lab to rallying with Bernie Sanders and AOC to organizing in key swing states before an election. None of it is possible without you.
That’s why we have to ask for your support in good times _and_ in uncertain times. And it’s why we’re reaching out today.
[**Peter, only if you can, will you please make a donation of $3 or whatever amount works for you today? Pramila’s counting on your help to keep up the fight for our democracy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250426?refcode=em20250426-4987&amount=3&refcode2=4987_420207_ONrVl5&akid=4987%2E420207%2EONrVl5)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250426?amount=3&refcode=em20250426-4987&refcode2=4987_420207_ONrVl5&akid=4987%2E420207%2EONrVl5)**
In solidarity,
Jayapal HQ
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250426-4987-footer&t=2&refcode2=4987_420207_ONrVl5&akid=4987%2E420207%2EONrVl5)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

subject: Help us print more palm cards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | It’s Tyler, Elizabeth’s campaign manager. (That’s me, second from right, with some of our hardworking canvassers.)
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6JT2e6-gM7kf7A7fsl5ASH1sZ_v_jerH5A-Nwp8YJ3ZfMXSly82VaMT622tWAYs1Igz5rZjbeoOC1_HGYnOiEowOwbW8LonDZdKJmaPqoyiwHir4aPViO6kKzY1HzNDquqAZKOKnbHEqGI3WInuz51kb3qUIj8Sy_s_JQ9Sl7PN6YBVY_XkvRksev6yuN80k1OU5fZbHzdoDcbLe3_7X49w0LBQhbNWcG7DMyrZmdANd/4fz/E20lHBQhQp-7PWgFbDQ5iQ/h0/h001.ES_iywebIk6wf6Lza-wJklPQpP-tJECW3uvK__6T2lw)
To deliver Trump and Musk a big defeat this November, keep the 51-49 Virginia House of Delegates blue, and help Elizabeth defeat another MAGA Republican opponent, our volunteers will knock tens of thousands of doors.
That means we need tens of thousands of walk cards to hand out.
I get it. You get a lot of emails.
But I promise - it _really_ helps.
Republican billionaires like Elon Musk are pouring MILLIONS into state-level races to build MAGA majorities that’ll do anything Donald Trump wants.
But recent victories in Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Iowa, and more states are showing that we can beat them if we raise enough to stay competitive.

clean_body: | | | It’s Tyler, Elizabeth’s campaign manager. (That’s me, second from right, with some of our hardworking canvassers.) To deliver Trump and Musk a big defeat this November, keep the 51-49 Virginia House of Delegates blue, and help Elizabeth defeat another MAGA Republican opponent, our volunteers will knock tens of thousands of doors. That means we need tens of thousands of walk cards to hand out. I get it. You get a lot of emails. But I promise - it really helps. Republican billionaires like Elon Musk are pouring MILLIONS into state-level races to build MAGA majorities that’ll do anything Donald Trump wants. But recent victories in Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Iowa, and more states are showing that we can beat them if we raise enough to stay competitive. Every $35 we raise helps us print another 100 union-made, professional-quality palm cards with Elizabeth’s biography and platform - hand-delivered to voters by our army of canvassers. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Tyler Phillips, Campaign Manager, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. The chaos in Washington and Indianapolis is hurting too many hard working Hoosier families. = We’ve seen from our trips across the state that Hoosiers are ready for real change. Together, we can deliver it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thanks, INDEMS [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Peter,
Thanks to Donald Trump’s nonstop attacks on our freedoms, our rights, and our economy, we’re at a moment of great uncertainty in our nation. **Let’s be real clear about something: we’ll only get through this if we stand strong and united against Trump’s destructive agenda. **
Traveling the country for town halls, I’ve spoken with thousands and thousands of people who are just plain fed up with being ignored. Americans are eager to join the fight against Trump, and I’m making sure they know we’re with them.
We’re coming up on our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we have about $30,000 left to raise before we hit our goal. With your support, I think we can close the gap.
[**Peter, can you send in a donation of $10, $25, $50, or whatever you are able to so we can hit our goal and keep up our energy in the fight against Trump’s MAGA agenda?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106567746/541927358/1694289148?refcode=body&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2ZhOTg1YS1iZTIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQ38C7qFq793J_Vvf6sN6EW3YHFsoOoks1g3X5YEIc4=)

body:
We can’t let unelected billionaires like Elon Musk and corporate special interests set fire to the American dream.

| Peter, Working families need a real fighter in Washington right now.

Joe is stepping up to >>

**▶️ **Protect good union jobs

**▶️ **Lower costs so that families can afford to live with dignity

**▶️ **Defend the right to a living wage

But Trump and his administration have a different plan. Their Project 2025 agenda is crystal clear: allow states to outlaw labor unions, roll back labor protections, and ignore the national minimum wage. And from what we’ve already seen, Trump is ready to follow through.

**We can’t let unelected billionaires like Elon Musk and corporate special interests set fire to the American dream. California’s 40th is one of the most competitive districts in the country.[_Together, we can win this seat, break the Republican House majority, and take our fight to Washington. But we need your support. name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Trump’s Dirty Energy First strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
The Arctic Ocean is one of our last wild frontiers — a place of rich biodiversity and home to some of our planet’s most delicate ecosystems.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106568291/541929394/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWUyNTllMi1iZjIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQpoxWuEwXPPRAL1oyspaYewZcL_7HBvtFuGtBgEEqQ=&emci=9113a47e-a022-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=25e259e2-bf22-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7731215)
---

| | The Arctic Ocean is one of our last wild frontiers — a place of rich biodiversity and home to some of our planet's most delicate ecosystems. But the region is ground zero for climate chaos — warming four times faster than the rest of the world and suffering rapid sea ice loss, ocean acidification, and widespread ecological disruption. **Trump's Dirty Energy First strategy would rip open the Arctic Ocean for oil and gas giants — sacrificing one of the most fragile places on Earth to enrich billionaire corporate polluters and put the health of our planet at even greater risk.** **Right now, communities across America and around the world are struggling with the devastating impacts of climate chaos.** We can't afford more dirty drilling. Not now. Not ever. It's past time to put the Arctic Ocean permanently off-limits from reckless oil and gas exploration, and Congress must stop the Trump Administration from auctioning off even more of the Arctic and its protected waters to the highest bidder. **That's why I introduced the Stop Arctic Ocean Drilling Act.** Scientists tell us that ending new offshore drilling could prevent up to 19 billion tons of greenhouse gas emissions, a crucial step toward hitting our climate goals and giving future generations a livable planet. This bill is a cornerstone in the fight to end our dangerous dependence on fossil fuels, avoid the worst impacts of climate chaos, and build cleaner, safer communities. We must protect our oceans, planet, and future, and this bill aims to do just that. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: My grandparents’ story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106568371/541929601/753003349?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmMjQwYi1jMDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eC5QhcPPFwRxa6g7J8mH0P2oIy-7R4gvOuyLIt2sJVM=)
Friend,

This is a different email than I usually send. I want to share part of my story with you and how it led to me fighting for working families in Congress. I hope you will read it the whole way through, but if you’re short on time I understand, and **[I hope you can chip in $3 toward my re-election campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106568373/541929630/753003349?refcode=em-4.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmMjQwYi1jMDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eC5QhcPPFwRxa6g7J8mH0P2oIy-7R4gvOuyLIt2sJVM=)**
| **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106568375/541929632/753003349?refcode=em-4.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmMjQwYi1jMDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eC5QhcPPFwRxa6g7J8mH0P2oIy-7R4gvOuyLIt2sJVM=)**
---

From a young age, I witnessed firsthand the value of a good-paying job. My grandpa was a union painter, and my grandma was a public school teacher. They made an honest working-class living for themselves, and they passed down the importance of hard work to my parents and me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106568377/541929634/753003349?refcode=em-4.26.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFmMjQwYi1jMDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eC5QhcPPFwRxa6g7J8mH0P2oIy-7R4gvOuyLIt2sJVM=)
_That’s me on the left!_
My story and upbringing is not unique for many families in Illinois, and frankly, across the country. We remember our parents and grandparents being able to live out their American Dream. And yet today, that dream feels out of reach for far too many.

Our communities thrive when the middle class is strong. But rising costs and stagnating wages are ripping the rug out from thousands of Illinoisans – who are struggling to make ends meet.

This is what has driven me for my entire career – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America, and eventually running for Congress. The challenges hardworking families face are immense, and my priority is to help them get the tools they need to succeed.

**[This fight is above petty partisan politics, but it’s made me a clear target. Keeping this seat is how I can continue delivering for IL-13, but I need your continued support to build early momentum. clean_body: | = Friend, This is a different email than I usually send. I want to share part of my story with you and how it led to me fighting for working families in Congress. I hope you will read it the whole way through, but if you’re short on time I understand, and = | = From a young age, I witnessed firsthand the value of a good-paying job. My grandpa was a union painter, and my grandma was a public school teacher. They made an honest working-class living for themselves, and they passed down the importance of hard work to my parents and me. = That’s me on the left! My story and upbringing is not unique for many families in Illinois, and frankly, across the country. We remember our parents and grandparents being able to live out their American Dream. And yet today, that dream feels out of reach for far too many. Our communities thrive when the middle class is strong. But rising costs and stagnating wages are ripping the rug out from thousands of Illinoisans – who are struggling to make ends meet. This is what has driven me for my entire career – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America, and eventually running for Congress. The challenges hardworking families face are immense, and my priority is to help them get the tools they need to succeed. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Nikki | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Peter,

It’s been nearly 100 days since this administration began. Since then, it’s been a constant barrage – government agencies gutted and thousands of jobs lost, a reckless trade and tariff war tanking our economy, and executive orders setting our democracy back years.

We must keep fighting and demand accountability whenever we can – it’s what I’m doing in Congress, and it’s what I see standing with my community taking action through rallies and demonstrations.

But I’ll be honest: While we must continue the fight right now, we need to look ahead to the all-important midterm elections next year.

**In 2026, we have the chance to go to the ballot box, make our voices heard, and hold this administration accountable by flipping the House majority blue.**

It starts with early work on the ground level, especially in close races like mine. I just flipped this seat in November, and I’m already a top GOP target.

**[That’s why today, I’m asking you to chip in just $1 toward my re-election campaign. If everyone reading this gave $1, we’d show the power of our movement and rebuild the warchest we need to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106568794/541931031/1606932672?refcode=em-4.26.25-all-a&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQxNzYzYS1jMDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P1jv-GzzxmAtqVmhjxv5BFZ64ltAlUpNplRmiS_vi4E=)**

clean_body: | = = Peter, It’s been nearly 100 days since this administration began. Since then, it’s been a constant barrage – government agencies gutted and thousands of jobs lost, a reckless trade and tariff war tanking our economy, and executive orders setting our democracy back years. We must keep fighting and demand accountability whenever we can – it’s what I’m doing in Congress, and it’s what I see standing with my community taking action through rallies and demonstrations. But I’ll be honest: While we must continue the fight right now, we need to look ahead to the all-important midterm elections next year. In 2026, we have the chance to go to the ballot box, make our voices heard, and hold this administration accountable by flipping the House majority blue. It starts with early work on the ground level, especially in close races like mine. I just flipped this seat in November, and I’m already a top GOP target. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. body:
Are you with us?
| Pete Buttigieg just brought down the hammer on Trump and his minions for breaking their promise to protect Social Security: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89471?t=6&akid=19671%2E878179%2EGRIPe6) [**JOIN OUR ANTI-TRUMP TASK FORCE: RUSH $7 BY MIDNIGHT TO SECURE YOUR SPOT AND FIGHT BACK »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89471?t=7&akid=19671%2E878179%2EGRIPe6)
* * *
**ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL:** Donald Trump swore up and down that he wouldn’t touch Social Security.

**LAST MONTH:** Trump gave Elon Musk unfettered access to YOUR Social Security number as he destroyed the agency and fired thousands of employees.

**NOW:** Trump’s handpicked Social Security Commissioner has threatened to HALT Social Security payments if Trump doesn’t get his way. WHAT?! [**Unless 22 more local Democrats join our Anti-Trump Task Force today, we’ll be DEFENSELESS against Trump’s attacks! We can’t fight back without your support: Rush $7 to add your name and stop Trump! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89471?t=8&akid=19671%2E878179%2EGRIPe6) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89472?t=9&akid=19671%2E878179%2EGRIPe6)
