The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19671%2E878179%2EGRIPe6). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19671%2E878179%2EGRIPe6).**

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Overcoming obstacles
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can’t afford to give up.
#

I know a thing or two about overcoming obstacles.
Fourteen years ago, my life was turned upside down by gun violence. I was meeting with constituents in the parking lot of a grocery store in Tucson, Arizona, when a gunman showed up to assassinate me. He shot me in the head, killed six people, and wounded 12 more.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250426-1B-b&refcode2=10341.3935704.bZgq3x&t=29&akid=10341%2E3935704%2EbZgq3x)_This is me being medevaced from the scene of the shooting._
Doctors couldn’t say whether I’d be able to walk or talk again. But my family, friends, doctors, and therapists never gave up on me. And I never gave up on myself. That’s why today I’m able to do things that once felt impossible, like riding my bike, playing the French horn, and practicing yoga.
I often think about our movement to end gun violence in the same way I think about my recovery. In both of these journeys, some days are harder than others.
There is no doubt that we have big obstacles to face. But that doesn’t mean we can give up. Not when lives are on the line.
For the last two days, the NRA has been holding their annual meeting in Atlanta. They are going to come out of this conference with a plan to turn back the clock even further on the progress we’ve achieved.
**We must show the gun lobby that we are unafraid to take on their attacks. Unafraid to protect our children. And unafraid to fight for a world free from gun violence.**
[**Our movement is at its strongest when we all work together. So today, I am asking you to join me in the fight to end gun violence by making a $3 donation to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250426-1B-b&t=30&akid=10341%2E3935704%2EbZgq3x)

Thank you so much for your support. I am so grateful to have you part of this movement.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords

name: Team Yass
subject: Yassamin is the Democrat we need right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter, **Yassamin is the kind of Democrat we need right now — one who is unafraid to speak out against injustice and stand up against this authoritarian administration.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106569452/541933435/2050198820?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250426_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTJhNjY0Yi1jMTIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xv6CKFJ29zz-xvsUbmnkueXroGAvIRC3L7cj5C_MJ6c=) After traveling to El Salvador earlier this week to pressure Donald Trump to facilitate the return of Kilmar Abrego Garcia — the Maryland father and union member who the Trump administration wrongfully deported — Yass has been speaking out as loudly as possible about this injustice. This week alone, she spoke out on _CNN, ABC News, News Nation, BBC,_ and yes, even _Fox News_ , to get the word out directly to the American people that we are facing a constitutional crisis. We cannot sit silently and allow this administration to continue to defy the _unanimous_ 9-0 Supreme Court Order to bring Mr. Garcia home. **_**[Yassamin is standing up and speaking out to make it clear that no one — not even President Trump — is above the rule of law. subject: Seth isn’t mincing words

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]
Friends,

Seth isn’t mincing words: President Trump is taking us down a dark path to autocracy. His officials are acting like the Gestapo.

He went on TV to talk about it [https://www.msnbc.com/weekends-with-alex-witt/watch/-wake-up-buddy-we-all-can-t-trust-putin-rep-moulton-to-trump-as-u-s-may-move-on-from-ukraine-237923397704] .

The kidnapping of Tufts student Rumeysa Ozturk. The deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia and defiance of court orders. The witch hunt on university campuses. This is a constitutional crisis.

We need leaders who will stand up and fight right now. This is about action versus inaction. It’s about tyranny versus democracy.

Seth is calling out the Trump administration, and he is working behind the scenes with colleagues to directly demand answers from cabinet secretaries.

There’s been a lot of talk lately about who in the Democratic ranks are putting up the fight Americans deserve. Count on Seth to keep standing up for your rights.

Please support Seth’s campaign for re-election and rush a contribution to his campaign now! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

Thank you,

Team Moulton

Friend,

I’ll be honest. I don’t like asking people for money.

You work hard to earn a living, and I don’t take it lightly when I ask you to share some of that hard-earned money with my campaign.

But as tough as it may be, I’d much rather ask _you_ than any special interests like Big Pharma or the NRA. I’d rather be powered by people who believe in our democracy, not the ones trying to buy it.

The way I see it, if we’re going to fix what’s broken in Washington, it means the people need to be front and center -- not billionaires trying to bend the rules.

That’s where you come in:

name: Powered By People
subject: They passed this bill behind closed doors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Public education is under attack in Texas:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250426.WbOnmx&refcode=ema20250426-240086&t=1001&akid=240086%2E444211%2E9FgOuo ]Headline from The Texas Tribune reading "Private school vouchers head
to Abbott's desk to become law"

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250426.WbOnmx&refcode=ema20250426-240086&t=1002&akid=240086%2E444211%2E9FgOuo ]Can you rush $3 to help Powered by People organize to
hold our legislators accountable for this?

Whether you’re a Republican, Democrat, or something else — Texans deserve
the final say over something as consequential as public school funding.
But Abbott’s Republican House refused to allow an amendment to this bill
that would put the question to the voters.

Republicans passed this bill behind closed doors — because they knew the
public would reject it.

To apply for a private school voucher, you have to prove U.S. citizenship.
This means thousands of undocumented children will be singled out and left
behind in underfunded, neglected public schools.

This proposed law is about power, profits, and politics — not what’s best
for our children. Greg Abbott and his cronies:

* Don’t believe in the common good — so they’re gutting a system built
to serve everyone.
* Can’t stand working people having power — so they’re starving
teachers’ unions.
* Never miss a payday — so they’re funneling $1 billion of public
dollars to their private education donors.

Texans deserve better — and we won’t back down. Powered by People is
organizing town halls, registering voters, and holding lawmakers
accountable across the state, but we need your help.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250426.WbOnmx&refcode=ema20250426-240086&t=1003&akid=240086%2E444211%2E9FgOuo ]Can you rush $3 to help Powered by People organize to
hold our legislators accountable for this?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250426.WbOnmx&refcode=ema20250426-240086&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=240086%2E444211%2E9FgOuo ]DONATE $3

For our kids. For our future. For Texas.

— Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=240086%2E444211%2E9FgOuo

name: Jena Griswold
subject: My roots have prepared me for this moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2504-q2-jg-eom?refcode=250426-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2504-q2-jg-eom?refcode=250426-email]
Friend,
I grew up in a working-class family in Estes Park. At times, we relied on food stamps to get by. I was the first in my family to attend a four-year college, and I worked hard every step of the way to earn my law degree and dedicate my life to public service.
I’ve never backed down from a tough fight. When Donald Trump and his MAGA allies attacked our elections, I stood up to them because Coloradans deserve leaders who will defend our freedoms.
As Secretary of State, I protected our elections and held the line against threats to our democracy, disinformation, and even death threats.
Now, I’m running to be Colorado’s next Attorney General so I can keep fighting for justice, fairness, and the Colorado way of life.
But I can’t do this alone. My campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, and we are coming up on our first end-of-month deadline as a campaign. Can you chip in to help us end April in the strongest possible position? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2504-q2-jg-eom?refcode=250426-email]
Thank you,
Jena

Even if you're not attending, this raffle is open to everyone online **until midnight on Thursday, May 1st**. **[Get your tickets now!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106570052/541935918/599179923?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0MjcwZjE3LWM0MjItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tKrFOwUYv2KnUnfjtq5gJH_7c9lI3DrKvsqQmfzaYio=&emci=dccc1e7c-1a22-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c4270f17-c422-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)** What could be more magical than sleeping under the stars in the majestic Grand Canyon? This experience includes a 3-night stay at Clear Sky Resort Grand Canyon in a Sky Dome for 2. Enjoy stargazing with telescopes, nightly s’mores and live music! Just 20 minutes from the south entrance to Grand Canyon Park, you’ll experience epic stargazing and witness spectacular sunrises and sunsets. Enjoy a stay in a Grand Canyon Sky Dome with a queen bed, large panoramic view window, A/C, a modern private bathroom with luxurious rain shower, and wifi. It’s an authentic glamping experience offering stunningly beautiful views of the Grand Canyon. Don’t miss your chance to win this once in a lifetime experience! By buying a raffle ticket today, you're not only entering to win a once in a lifetime trip, but you are supporting our work of protecting Oregon's natural legacy, electing pro-environment candidates to office, and holding our elected leaders accountable. You don't have to attend the event to win, but tickets are limited so get yours now!

**About OLCV’s Annual Celebration for the Environment** For over 25 years this event has brought together hundreds of OLCV supporters, colleagues, environmental advocates, sustainable business leaders, and elected officials for one unforgettable night. Featuring inspiring speakers, dinner and drinks, auction and paddle raise, and great company – all to benefit OLCV’s important work protecting our climate and environment. clean_body: | | | "2025 Annual Celebration for the Environment Raffle: A Grand Canyon Glamping" Hi Peter, This year for on May 2nd we're giving away this unforgettable glamping trip! Even if you're not attending, this raffle is open to everyone online until midnight on Thursday, May 1st. What could be more magical than sleeping under the stars in the majestic Grand Canyon? This experience includes a 3-night stay at Clear Sky Resort Grand Canyon in a Sky Dome for 2. Enjoy stargazing with telescopes, nightly s’mores and live music! Just 20 minutes from the south entrance to Grand Canyon Park, you’ll experience epic stargazing and witness spectacular sunrises and sunsets. Enjoy a stay in a Grand Canyon Sky Dome with a queen bed, large panoramic view window, A/C, a modern private bathroom with luxurious rain shower, and wifi. It’s an authentic glamping experience offering stunningly beautiful views of the Grand Canyon. Don’t miss your chance to win this once in a lifetime experience! By buying a raffle ticket today, you're not only entering to win a once in a lifetime trip, but you are supporting our work of protecting Oregon's natural legacy, electing pro-environment candidates to office, and holding our elected leaders accountable. You don't have to attend the event to win, but tickets are limited so get yours now! About OLCV’s Annual Celebration for the Environment For over 25 years this event has brought together hundreds of OLCV supporters, colleagues, environmental advocates, sustainable business leaders, and elected officials for one unforgettable night. Featuring inspiring speakers, dinner and drinks, auction and paddle raise, and great company – all to benefit OLCV’s important work protecting our climate and environment. For questions about the raffle or OLCV’s Annual Celebration mailto:april@olcv.org "april@olcv.org" OLCV Development Director April Christenson. | | Good luck! name: John Fetterman
subject: standing with the trans members of our military
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10059%2E434096%2EMxzLQc)
| | |
---
Hey folks, it’s John.

This might not be popular, but it’s true: Banning trans Americans from serving in the military is bullsh*t.
This isn't about being “woke.” It’s about being decent. It’s about respecting every person who courageously steps up to serve our country – *including* folks in the LGBTQ+ community.
I’m unapologetically pro-military. I’m also unapologetically pro-LGBTQ+. Those two things are NOT in conflict: Our military is stronger when it honors the dignity of all its members.
But Trump doesn’t get that. His ban on trans military service is hateful, dangerous to our national security, and flat-out wrong. So I’m calling him out – he needs to rescind it right away.
👉 If you agree, _[**will you add your name to my petition now? Let’s show our trans service members that we have their backs:**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51030?t=5&code=jtk77-su-fl&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&akid=10059%2E434096%2EMxzLQc)_
| | [Sign the Petition >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51030?t=6&code=jtk77-su-fl&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&akid=10059%2E434096%2EMxzLQc)
---
These folks are out there risking their lives for *us*. The least we can do is treat them with respect.
Thanks for being in this fight with me.

John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=jtk77-su-fl-footer&t=2&refcode2=10059_434096_MxzLQc&akid=10059%2E434096%2EMxzLQc)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=3&akid=10059%2E434096%2EMxzLQc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=10059%2E434096%2EMxzLQc)

We’re nearly 100 days into Donald Trump’s second term — and 100 days of unchecked power grabs, attacks on civil society, and open defiance of our Constitution.
This week, he crossed a dangerous new line. **Trump directed the Department of Justice to target and attack ActBlue — the online fundraising platform millions of Democrats, like you, use to participate in our elections.**
Let’s be clear: This is about silencing dissent. This is about weaponizing the federal government to dismantle Democratic infrastructure and criminalize political opposition — while choking off the small-dollar donors who fuel movements like ours.
Trump is building an imperial presidency. One that answers to no court, no Congress, and certainly not the people. He fired watchdogs, ignored court rulings, floated a third term, and turned the Department of Justice into a political hit squad.
**Now, he’s trying to silence the power of grassroots donors before the 2026 midterms even begin. Why? Because he knows that when everyday people chip in $5 or $25 at a time, we can drive change.**
**[We need to fight back harder than ever to protect our democracy. Our $40,000 end-of-month goal is within reach — and every donation right now helps stop Trump’s authoritarian agenda in its tracks. Can we count on your support?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106570221/541936491/2105508926?refcode=ea.4604976a-c422-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.4604976a-c422-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2MDQ5NzZhLWM0MjItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0cZjjviMAIzhgGKQWxUEZNiWEjJJ1bs_p5dAbvmBx4g=)**

clean_body: This is about silencing everyday people. | | = | = We’re nearly 100 days into Donald Trump’s second term — and 100 days of unchecked power grabs, attacks on civil society, and open defiance of our Constitution. This week, he crossed a dangerous new line. Trump directed the Department of Justice to target and attack ActBlue — the online fundraising platform millions of Democrats, like you, use to participate in our elections. Let’s be clear: This is about silencing dissent. This is about weaponizing the federal government to dismantle Democratic infrastructure and criminalize political opposition — while choking off the small-dollar donors who fuel movements like ours. Trump is building an imperial presidency. One that answers to no court, no Congress, and certainly not the people. He fired watchdogs, ignored court rulings, floated a third term, and turned the Department of Justice into a political hit squad. Now, he’s trying to silence the power of grassroots donors before the 2026 midterms even begin. Why? Because he knows that when everyday people chip in $5 or $25 at a time, we can drive change. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s show him our movement won’t be intimidated. Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Team Haaland
subject: [Survey] Which issues are top of mind for you right now?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Deb’s running for governor because she knows the system isn’t working for people the way it should, and that’s why your input is so important.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1572%2E400544%2EaQAp44)
There’s a lot going on right now:
The prices keep getting higher, Trump is ignoring Supreme Court orders and taking away people and jailing them in El Salvador without following the law, and Elon Musk’s DOGE continues to ransack federal agencies that New Mexicans depend on.
**With so much to keep track of, we want to know what issues are top of mind for you right now.[Will you take our short three-question survey and let us know what your priorities are right now?](https://act.debhaaland.com/survey/em_ms_dh_20250426_1_priorities/?source=em20250426-1572&akid=1572%2E400544%2EaQAp44)**
**[Take the survey »](https://act.debhaaland.com/survey/em_ms_dh_20250426_1_priorities/?source=em20250426-1572&akid=1572%2E400544%2EaQAp44)**
Deb’s running for governor because she knows the system isn’t working for people the way it should, and that’s why your input is so important.
We’ve been a grassroots-powered campaign since day one, which means your priorities are most important — not big donors or special interests.
**[So let us know what your priorities are by taking our short three-question survey right now.](https://act.debhaaland.com/survey/em_ms_dh_20250426_1_priorities/?source=em20250426-1572&akid=1572%2E400544%2EaQAp44)**
We look forward to your responses!
Team Haaland

**Our team has a proven track record of success.** We’ve trained over 6,000 women, achieving an average 70% electoral win rate and securing representation for the New American Majority at every level of government.

With Trump back in the White House, we’re ramping up our efforts to recruit and train even more Democratic women who will stand up and fight back against extremism – _but they need our help to build an even stronger firewall to defend our most fundamental rights and freedoms._

Your monthly contribution will help us continue identifying and training women candidates _365 days a year_ so we can build a robust pipeline for our alums and put them in the best position to win elections and lead their communities.

Emerge Sustainers are our dedicated group of monthly donors who provide us with a foundational level of support. Their consistent support allows us to plan ahead so that we can make early and strategic investments to maximize our impact and empower even more women to run, win, and lead. = | = Our team has a proven track record of success. We’ve trained over 6,000 women, achieving an average 70% electoral win rate and securing representation for the New American Majority at every level of government. With Trump back in the White House, we’re ramping up our efforts to recruit and train even more Democratic women who will stand up and fight back against extremism – but they need our help to build an even stronger firewall to defend our most fundamental rights and freedoms. Your monthly contribution will help us continue identifying and training women candidates 365 days a year so we can build a robust pipeline for our alums and put them in the best position to win elections and lead their communities. = | = Thank you for your continued support, Jasmine Smith Deputy Development Director * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

name: Patriot Polls
subject: Only a handful of conservatives received this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We need an immediate answer. Please respond ASAP

| | | Only a handful of conservatives received this email, and you’re one of them!

Right now, Democrats are working overtime to eliminate voter ID laws nationwide. This is a direct assault on election integrity, and we must take a stand before it’s too late.

**If they succeed, the floodgates will open for fraud, illegal voting, and corrupt elections. They want illegals, even dead voters, tipping the scales in their favor.**

We CANNOT allow this to happen. America needs patriots like you to fight back—NOW.

Time is running out. **[**Will you step up and defend fair elections by answering five (5) key questions on election integrity?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ **CLICK TO BEGIN**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-RuAppblg)
---
We’re counting on your response.

Thank you, Patriot Polls

Peter, we set a goal to raise $5,000 this month, and right now, we’re falling short.

Here’s why this matters: We’re fighting back against MAGA extremism by mobilizing Black and Latino communities to elect change-making leadership who will represent ALL Texans with true integrity.

We can’t keep up the fight without the resources, so meeting each and every one of our digital fundraising goals is mission-critical.

This is about building the future we want for ALL Texans – no matter our age, race, gender, or ZIP Code. We need grassroots donors like YOU to step up and make sure we can meet our goals and keep doing the work on the ground.

clean_body: This is a blatant assault on our democracy and the will of the American people who elected President Trump to lead us forward. | Peter, you need to know two things about me. Donald Trump Jr. just warned that Democrats are still attacking President Trump through lawfare and abuse of our court system, desperately trying to derail his bold MAGA vision for America: I 100% agree with Don Jr. -- this is a blatant assault on our democracy and the will of the American people who elected President Trump to lead us forward. Right now, our narrow House Majority is acting as the major bulwark against the Left’s insanity. That’s why they’re posting historic fundraising numbers to take out Republicans like me and end our Majority. I know standing shoulder-to-shoulder with President Trump makes me the Left’s top target, Democrats are going to throw everything they have at me. The work President Trump and Republicans have done in the first 100 days has been unprecedented. We’ve ended woke radicalism, killed the Left’s radical DEI agenda, secured our border, and made government more efficient for millions of Americans. Democrats and billionaire Leftists are outraged we killed their golden goose, and they’re abusing our courts to exact their revenge. Counter Democratic Lawfare: Defend President Trump’s agenda from baseless legal attacks. Strengthen Our Voter outreach strategy: Keep Eastern North Carolina a MAGA stronghold. * Advance America First: Support policies that secure our borders, boost our economy, and restore greatness. null: Democratic Congresswoman Haley Stevens is running to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator – and her victory is absolutely essential to flipping the Senate blue and putting the ultimate check on Donald Trump’s agenda.
That’s why Trump and his allies are determined to buy this seat for their MAGA candidate Mike Rogers. Just last year, they spent nearly $80 million in their effort to buy Michigan’s Senate seat for Rogers, and he came within 0.3% of succeeding. Now, less than a year later, he’s running _again_ to execute Trump and Elon Musk’s chaos agenda.
With Michigan promising to be one of the most competitive Senate seats of the midterm elections, Haley needs to immediately build up a people-powered movement that will help her win in Michigan and take back the Senate majority for Democrats.

Another bombshell report by [WIRED](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfBts3zDgpVXCEotv6_-NCRFO3lutaJxgMxGmhPIB84c1TV3ZkVQLogWZAIJEggh_rT1ApqpXOYPWxL9apcCENIjlBSSchHYTa27A1mVpCvP9wM3iGtHzmgkv5vzTGW2WWErNaml4xPr-rpEUnOAMnGNpXU1eOszLVL_gQUc1T8H1bL4ZzUit4oc-AXIlNIXXjxn-_TTTkUKEoUAeKqs-tM2M2KuHVzf99zvKdTyqDprl2DAHo--DU0m3HvMkDV-7Ru0Y6LCwqotUGL9fJEFvtY-2efLB-3z_RENoKiliFXGGjMfCzD2KLHUq5ciifQxew7LJKFXiIRFfczN6fm_7qO0CoSELzWK2ea4nMuaUgukjKSX8Rs4_gMipJu-Yici1FY2e9mIpOS1WvqBpVomlfA/4fz/8Jdj6LDWShOF8GkOLE55Tg/h3/h001.fO56aOM1X0BAysOpa7leyahvGCWO9C0LguHc0-gSMoQ) states that DOGE has gutted the Social Security Administration’s (SSA) public communications staff and will be shifting all public communications over to Elon Musk’s social media platform, X. During a call with SSA employees, a regional commissioner for the agency told them announcements would be made on X, saying, “This will become our communication mechanism.” _Do you trust Musk’s far-right social media platform to communicate accurate information about what Elon Musk himself has called a “Ponzi scheme?”_ [**FIGHT BACK with a donation to help us elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will defend Social Security and ensure we all have truthful access to it.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsrzvnublG4NQmalpPnemC9NNCo6VpjUku_tXBMW690v10M-8svsYtMHdyj2HrS2VLKEoDNEAm3NBCcPjdNgZ5Af34YJ2vF_UAlDV6NM5BDWu_-jlBcRnnkRUdqPKue53c7qaJxP4dc7w6XCE05K-t6RBz5_lK8eEzXupQjQkNQsCbLgxFsBiIm2Ib5iuV2jGjH6PFp0ZgLousiezyRTMSNpy-jJxBc4pbs82Slpolfd_5ZzKeo8lsfL9lgUFDWJPtKH898ZFP4nbkNtZptdSALEt43IWU0FkVMbs8mewUXb1zX3IpaV2U7lw9PiIU9tIHklOgXpbcDzga8kSkMPDHuE/4fz/8Jdj6LDWShOF8GkOLE55Tg/h4/h001.xuXJMMdB1_yZTTMkM_TRWRRFNIf5qa4zvQ8OcZ0h2Vo) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

During a call with SSA employees, a regional commissioner for the agency told them announcements would be made on X, saying, “This will become our communication mechanism.” Do you trust Musk’s far-right social media platform to communicate accurate information about what Elon Musk himself has called a “Ponzi scheme?” If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Rather than communicating traditional press releases, updates and official announcements via the Social Security website and other standard channels like email or mail, you will need an X account to get their messages. name: David Hogg
subject: They are pissed at me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Peter,

I’m always direct in these emails. Papering over bad news doesn’t help our
team win.

It is a hell of a lot harder to slow, derail, and stop Trump from crashing
the economy, disappearing people, and leading our country into ruin with a
weak Democratic Party.

With a 26% approval rating, that is where we are right now. If the
midterms were held today, we would lose.

And yeah, a few members of the old-school Democratic establishment are
pissed at me for calling us weak. They can’t understand why Leaders We
Deserve would consider primarying old, ineffective congressmen who are
asleep at the wheel during the most consequential moments in our political
history.

In today’s party politics, there’s an unwritten rule. If you win a seat,
it’s yours for life. No one serious in your party will challenge you. That
is a culture we have to break.

I am doing this so that we have a stronger party. We stand a significantly
better chance at defeating MAGA if we can build a more effective
Democratic Party that gives voters a real alternative — a vision for the
future they believe in.

The answer lies in building the party we all know we could be. A party
that restores people's faith in Democracy by using it to revive the
American Dream through lowering costs and fighting special interests. To
do that requires serious change, though.

Yes, there are incredible Democratic leaders that we already have who are
stepping up. But unfortunately there are far too many who are asleep at
the wheel and completely failing to meet the moment. That is unacceptable.

We cannot recycle the same playbook and expect different results. So last
week Leaders We Deserve launched a $20 million fund to usher in the next
generation.

1. Primarying asleep-at-the-wheel Democrats in deep blue seats. It might
seem counterintuitive to do this in blue seats, but people decide
their votes based on what they think about Democrats and Republicans
overall. The weak, ineffective, out-of-touch members of Congress are a
liability for us all.
2. Supporting young, frontline Democrats running in tight red-to-blue
races. Making sure the next generation of leaders in tough districts
have our full support, and that the old, ineffective guard doesn’t
weigh them down.

When we challenge the status quo, some incumbents will rise to the
occasion and emerge stronger, reminded of who they serve. Others will
demonstrate exactly why they need to be replaced. Either way, the party
gets stronger, and the American people win.

This $20 million initiative is ambitious. But it’s not a random number
pulled out of a hat. Based on how much these elections cost, it’s the
amount of money that we think makes a serious dent in the way people think
about the Democratic Party. It allows us not just to run in one or two
important races, but to run in several and make a genuine splash.

But here’s the catch. That $20 million only happens if we raise it
together. I’m not independently wealthy. We don’t have a cadre of secret
billionaires waiting in the wings to fund this effort. This isn’t a
lottery ticket.

This action plan for a renewed, stronger Democratic Party comes down to
each of the people reading this email doing what they can with what they
have. If we all rise to that level, we will hit this $20 million goal and
the plan will work.

I know that everyone reading this email isn’t in a position to donate.
That is okay. And I believe we can fund this effort successfully in a
truly progressive way. Here’s how:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

⇢HIGH EARNERS: If you have done well and can afford it, please consider
investing more for those who can’t. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250426-1?refcode=em20250426-2044&amount=3&refcode2=2044_587540_C86muZ&akid=2044%2E587540%2EC86muZ ]Click to donate $1,000, $500 or
$100 or as much as you can.

⇢MEDIUM EARNERS: Give what you can. What’s more important is that we’re
all in this together. If thousands of people give small amounts each
month, this plan will still work. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250426-1?refcode=em20250426-2044&amount=25&refcode2=2044_587540_C86muZ&akid=2044%2E587540%2EC86muZ ]Click to donate $25 — [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250426-1?refcode=em20250426-2044&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode2=2044_587540_C86muZ&akid=2044%2E587540%2EC86muZ ]or $5 each
month.

⇢EVERYONE ELSE: If you are not in a position to donate, that’s okay. We
each have a role to play in this plan, and yours might be to do all of the
free things you can do. Get active on social media. Tell your friends
about what we’re doing. Forward this email around. You are just as
important in this fight.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

We’ll check in periodically with you on our progress here. But I really
believe that today we’re going to make a big step in the right direction
on fundraising for the plan.

Thank you for reading, especially a long email like this one. It means a
lot to me personally to be in this work and this fight with teammates as
dedicated as you. The energy I draw from people like you is what keeps me
fighting every day. So thank you.

David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve

clean_body: Peter, I’m always direct in these emails. Papering over bad news doesn’t help our team win. It is a hell of a lot harder to slow, derail, and stop Trump from crashing the economy, disappearing people, and leading our country into ruin with a weak Democratic Party. With a 26% approval rating, that is where we are right now. If the midterms were held today, we would lose. And yeah, a few members of the old-school Democratic establishment are pissed at me for calling us weak. They can’t understand why Leaders We Deserve would consider primarying old, ineffective congressmen who are asleep at the wheel during the most consequential moments in our political history. In today’s party politics, there’s an unwritten rule. If you win a seat, it’s yours for life. No one serious in your party will challenge you. That is a culture we have to break. I am doing this so that we have a stronger party. We stand a significantly better chance at defeating MAGA if we can build a more effective Democratic Party that gives voters a real alternative — a vision for the future they believe in. The answer lies in building the party we all know we could be. A party that restores people's faith in Democracy by using it to revive the American Dream through lowering costs and fighting special interests. To do that requires serious change, though. Yes, there are incredible Democratic leaders that we already have who are stepping up. But unfortunately there are far too many who are asleep at the wheel and completely failing to meet the moment. That is unacceptable. We cannot recycle the same playbook and expect different results. So last week Leaders We Deserve launched a $20 million fund to usher in the next generation. 1. Primarying asleep-at-the-wheel Democrats in deep blue seats. It might seem counterintuitive to do this in blue seats, but people decide their votes based on what they think about Democrats and Republicans overall. The weak, ineffective, out-of-touch members of Congress are a liability for us all. 2. Supporting young, frontline Democrats running in tight red-to-blue races. Making sure the next generation of leaders in tough districts have our full support, and that the old, ineffective guard doesn’t weigh them down. When we challenge the status quo, some incumbents will rise to the occasion and emerge stronger, reminded of who they serve. Others will demonstrate exactly why they need to be replaced. Either way, the party gets stronger, and the American people win. This $20 million initiative is ambitious. But it’s not a random number pulled out of a hat. Based on how much these elections cost, it’s the amount of money that we think makes a serious dent in the way people think about the Democratic Party. It allows us not just to run in one or two important races, but to run in several and make a genuine splash. But here’s the catch. That $20 million only happens if we raise it together. I’m not independently wealthy. We don’t have a cadre of secret billionaires waiting in the wings to fund this effort. This isn’t a lottery ticket. This action plan for a renewed, stronger Democratic Party comes down to each of the people reading this email doing what they can with what they have. If we all rise to that level, we will hit this $20 million goal and the plan will work. I know that everyone reading this email isn’t in a position to donate. That is okay. And I believe we can fund this effort successfully in a truly progressive way. Here’s how: ⇢HIGH EARNERS: If you have done well and can afford it, please consider investing more for those who can’t. [ ]Click to donate $1,000, $500 or $100 or as much as you can. ⇢MEDIUM EARNERS: Give what you can. What’s more important is that we’re all in this together. If thousands of people give small amounts each month, this plan will still work. [ ]Click to donate $25 — [ ]or $5 each month. ⇢EVERYONE ELSE: If you are not in a position to donate, that’s okay. We each have a role to play in this plan, and yours might be to do all of the free things you can do. Get active on social media. Tell your friends about what we’re doing. Forward this email around. You are just as important in this fight. We’ll check in periodically with you on our progress here. But I really believe that today we’re going to make a big step in the right direction on fundraising for the plan. Thank you for reading, especially a long email like this one. It means a lot to me personally to be in this work and this fight with teammates as dedicated as you. The energy I draw from people like you is what keeps me fighting every day. So thank you. David Hogg Leaders We Deserve

body:
Jocelyn needs a strong grassroots team by her side to ensure she has the resources she needs to win this race and become the next Governor of Michigan.

**_“This is shaping up to be one of the most complex gubernatorial contests of the cycle.”_**
Winning in Michigan is _never_ easy, so this doesn’t come as a surprise.
We know that this race will come down to the wire, but we also know what we need to do to win it: **Compete for every single vote across all 83 Michigan counties.**
That’s where you come in. Every dollar you give to Jocelyn’s campaign helps her travel across the state and speak to voters on the ground about her plans to ensure that every Michigander gets a fair shot in life.
Jocelyn has never backed down from a tough fight, and she won’t start now. But she also can’t win this toss-up race alone. **She needs a strong grassroots team by her side to ensure she has the resources she needs to win this race and become the next Governor of Michigan.**

| | My Fellow Patriot, I’m reaching out because my research shows you are a strong voice for conservative values in your community.And today, I need to warn you about what’s at stake, **[**and tell you how you can help.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8b6b5e3699af4195a48ead3d3d6ce55a&_e=nI2MwdTK89pyqrFjQb6c9u1y7yi_zWn2t7FY0KFv6WzHSC4nnFd4NV6xatOhrHtfwfAUmNWsklYqZ_W-N6gJBZNPfqtgzQO8mZ3qjY5quSnpw5dqxOJcefISOu41s-_0k7i6eJOKN9HzSLOFB8L1y0rh-JbwcPWYSTOiQR9PigQZZhVcA2-MJA3nz7CfueCeF5Wq6eKj2gKSKGVFvaPkS_5dvKf9i1jHshuZ8aiYx9eic-OOzY7AiS47KCYH0KfNsc9PbzVP2x4iT-ntXhZwHOIm9NUpbJ6ps2MEfRe2mOBBG8_3HHX3uIZqKoUjNqF4JFVqjkG5zpF3HNdK7xAiNckWfhazVUAcZ9LirxLDWqw%3D)** Do you remember the 2002 election? Republicans had won the House, Senate, and White House for the first time since Eisenhower.**But by 2008, Democrats had regained control and unleashed Obama’s radical agenda.** The opportunity for lasting conservative change had been wasted. Now, the results of the 2024 election have given us the chance to undo the damage of Biden and Harris. But if we don’t demand action from Republicans, _this victory could slip through our fingers just like it did in 2008._ **[You can take action today by partnering with AMAC Action, the most influential group in America when it comes to standing up for the values of conservative seniors!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8b6b5e3699af4195a48ead3d3d6ce55a&_e=nI2MwdTK89pyqrFjQb6c9u1y7yi_zWn2t7FY0KFv6WzHSC4nnFd4NV6xatOhrHtfwfAUmNWsklYqZ_W-N6gJBZNPfqtgzQO8mZ3qjY5quSnpw5dqxOJcefISOu41s-_0k7i6eJOKN9HzSLOFB8L1y0rh-JbwcPWYSTOiQR9PigQZZhVcA2-MJA3nz7CfueCeF5Wq6eKj2gKSKGVFvaPkS9qtjcL53YY47IrN7wNUTkf0eSv5cxJqEK_hTnCXesWL5UWd-2il3xUEdhMVC--xQpDArPG8VtIoYedOX6QLX577kdPPyqbXhJeLRIhzJR2qFNxn-esFNFiQeM5lYcfO_abv-0C3EjElcgHDFexsSc8%3D)** My friend, it’s simple: The Democrats work as a cohesive unit that bands together to push their agenda forward. But too many Republicans in Congress are content to sit on the sidelines.Donald Trump has hit the ground running in his first few months in office. He’s signed countless executive orders, secured our border, sworn in his rock-solid cabinet, and laid out his vision for:
---
| |
* Lowering inflation and taxes
* Saving Medicare and social security from insolvency
* Protecting our children and grandchildren from woke left-wing ideologies
* Protecting our constitutional freedoms
* Keeping America safe and strong
* Securing our elections

---
And so much more. **But none of this happens without the Republican majorities in congress getting their act together – and no one is in a better position to whip them into shape than AMAC Action.** Remember, Donald Trump’s first term was undermined at every turn not just by the radical left, but by weak RINOs. clean_body: I need to warn you about what’s at stake| | | | I’m reaching out because my research shows you are a strong voice for conservative values in your community. | | | | | | My Fellow Patriot, I’m reaching out because my research shows you are a strong voice for conservative values in your community.And today, I need to warn you about what’s at stake, Do you remember the 2002 election? Republicans had won the House, Senate, and White House for the first time since Eisenhower.But by 2008, Democrats had regained control and unleashed Obama’s radical agenda. The opportunity for lasting conservative change had been wasted. Now, the results of the 2024 election have given us the chance to undo the damage of Biden and Harris. But if we don’t demand action from Republicans, this victory could slip through our fingers just like it did in 2008. My friend, it’s simple: The Democrats work as a cohesive unit that bands together to push their agenda forward. But too many Republicans in Congress are content to sit on the sidelines.Donald Trump has hit the ground running in his first few months in office. He’s signed countless executive orders, secured our border, sworn in his rock-solid cabinet, and laid out his vision for: | | Lowering inflation and taxes Saving Medicare and social security from insolvency Protecting our children and grandchildren from woke left-wing ideologies Protecting our constitutional freedoms Keeping America safe and strong Securing our elections And so much more. But none of this happens without the Republican majorities in congress getting their act together – and no one is in a better position to whip them into shape than AMAC Action. Remember, Donald Trump’s first term was undermined at every turn not just by the radical left, but by weak RINOs. AMAC Action will not stand by and let radical Democrats and weak-kneed Republicans tank the America First Agenda of We the People.In the months ahead, we will be taking every step possible to undo the damage done by the Biden-Harris trainwreck......to protect the interests of you and your family... My friend if you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections.That’s why we have 77 chapters and over 340 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage.AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you.And our advocacy has NEVER been more important than it is today.Because if patriotic conservatives like you and I don’t stand up and demand change this opportunity will be wasted, and all you and I have worked for will be for nothing.But with your help, and with conservatives holding the trifecta of Government, White House, House, and Senate...We can not only undo the chaos of the Biden/Harris administration AND the Obama/Biden years...But we can also create lasting conservative change.It's clear 2025 is going to be a year of epic battles. So please friend, make an investment in the America First movement today!Don’t let this opportunity go to waste.Become a force multiplier by joining millions of fellow conservatives in demanding change.And I don’t want to rush you, but it’s critical that we make the change we want to see happen before the midterm season, when Congress will all but grind to a halt...That means we don’t have four years, we have just months to make this happen. So don’t wait, Thank you, friend. History will remember what you and I did to save our great nation. | | I look forward to your response. For Freedom, Rebecca Weber, ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 1904 Thomas Avenue, Suite 103,Leesburg, FL 34748 |

The SAVE Act is a direct attack on millions of eligible voters. It would end online voter registration, registration by mail, and even voter registration drives.
Most troubling of all, it requires every voter to prove their citizenship with passports or birth certificates in order to exercise their right to vote.
Republicans know over **_140 million Americans_** don’t have a passport, and **_69 million women_** don’t have a birth certificate matching their legal name.
Our efforts to engage and mobilize voters have never been more important, and with critical Special Elections coming up here in the Peach State, we can’t afford to take any chances.
[Peter, we can’t let Republicans disenfranchise millions of voters across the country. Will you chip in $10 to the Democratic Party of Georgia to help us fight back against the SAVE Act and mobilize the Democratic vote like never before?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106573377/541947086/850125521?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_042525_SAVEACT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjBkZmM1Ny1jZDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbz4mZ4jRwuiSw0ueIN0P6qthPIoiH5Bvb5iPbN1O5c=)

It’s called the SAVE Act — and it’s one of the most extreme attacks on voting rights we’ve seen in years. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = The SAVE Act is a direct attack on millions of eligible voters. It would end online voter registration, registration by mail, and even voter registration drives. Most troubling of all, it requires every voter to prove their citizenship with passports or birth certificates in order to exercise their right to vote. Republicans know over 140 million Americans don’t have a passport, and 69 million women don’t have a birth certificate matching their legal name. name: Wes Moore
subject: re: ActBlue
body:
It's Wes Moore, and I have some bad news.
Donald Trump signed a memorandum this week targeting Democrats’ ability to raise money for our campaigns.
Help us fight back » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250426-1?refcode=em20250426-1]
Already, the Trump administration is attacking public servants, disappearing people without due process, and raising costs for everybody with extreme tariffs.
Now, this administration is also using its power to attack ActBlue, the online platform that helps resource campaigns like ours. This isn’t just an attack on one donation platform. It’s an attempt by the Trump administration to limit our ability to organize against their disastrous policies.
Donald Trump is trying to silence the voices of millions of grassroots supporters, all while empowering billionaires to keep buying power and influence in our government.
It’s outrageous.
We need to show that we have the collective strength to stop them. Please, rush a contribution of $10 or any amount to help us continue to fight for Maryland. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250426-1?refcode=em20250426-1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250426-1?refcode=em20250426-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=10]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250426-1?refcode=em20250426-1-el&express_lane=true&amount=25]

Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250426-1?refcode=em20250426-1-el-other]
Thank you for helping us prove that there’s strength in our numbers today.
Elevate,
Wes Moore

body:

# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8511%2E5257348%2ENwtAuw)
Derek, do you know how much money Elon Musk spent on elections in 2024?
**_$291 million._**
He spent hundreds of millions of dollars blasting negative attack ads across the airwaves and offering to pay people to elect Republicans up and down the ballot who would sit on the sidelines and give him the green light to dismantle every inch of our federal government to line his own pockets.
He could spend _even more_ this time around.
Musk’s millions helped Republicans send Donald Trump to the White House, win the Senate, and hold the House — and he’s already indicated that he wants to put _$100 million_ into Trump’s political operation to support GOP candidates in 2026.
The 2026 midterm elections will come down to whether our grassroots team can stand up and help Democrats running in House, Senate, and local races win their elections.
[**Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is just days away, and reaching our goals will mean we have the resources to stand up to his lies and support the Democrats who will make the difference in fighting back. Can you pitch in any amount right now to help us close the gap and hit our goal?**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20250426_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8511%2E5257348%2ENwtAuw)

clean_body: | Derek, do you know how much money Elon Musk spent on elections in 2024? $291 million. He spent hundreds of millions of dollars blasting negative attack ads across the airwaves and offering to pay people to elect Republicans up and down the ballot who would sit on the sidelines and give him the green light to dismantle every inch of our federal government to line his own pockets. He could spend even more this time around. Musk’s millions helped Republicans send Donald Trump to the White House, win the Senate, and hold the House — and he’s already indicated that he wants to put $100 million into Trump’s political operation to support GOP candidates in 2026. The 2026 midterm elections will come down to whether our grassroots team can stand up and help Democrats running in House, Senate, and local races win their elections. body:
Minnesota is cutting child poverty, expanding labor rights, investing in education, and much more.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106573941/541948874/-246440955?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzYyZjhmYi1jZjIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdhxQjG7H-oFOGatMUPOVeyw3V5OLOgQuBWQmLWDcPU=)

Peter,
Minnesota is cutting child poverty, expanding labor rights, investing in education, and much more. We put people first over the last six years, and we gave Minnesotans the freedom to live their lives the way they want to live them—even if it’s not the way their neighbors would want to live theirs.
But now, everything we’ve built is under attack.
Donald Trump and his fellow extremists are dismantling basic services like Social Security and Medicare, leaving working families behind, and threatening our freedoms.
**Let’s be real clear, Peter****: if you say you love freedom, but you don’t believe in freedom for everybody, then the thing you love isn’t freedom—it’s privilege. **
In Minnesota, we’re standing our ground and showing the world there’s a better way forward. We’re protecting health care, defending democracy, and delivering historic tax cuts for working Minnesotans. But to keep fighting for true freedom for all Minnesotans, we need your help.

In March**, DOGE cut billions of dollars from the USPS budget and cut nearly 10,000 employees!**

Now, **Trump and Musk are quietly shopping the USPS to private investors and laying the groundwork to sell it off!**

**If privatized, essential USPS services could vanish or become outrageously expensive** — cutting off rural communities, seniors, veterans, and millions of Americans who depend on affordable, reliable mail.

**[That’s why postal workers are taking to the streets and asking Americans to stand with them against these dangerous threats! Can you add your name now to stand with postal workers and demand that Congress reject Trump’s plan to privatize the USPS? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106574224/541950082/1878703426?refcode=NDCAF_20250426_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2NkMmNhYS1kMDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gt2Bvy0Fn0E7D6gXHySRIXTpWLZgR2XAW2wQRKfCL_g=&emci=368f98c2-ff21-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f3cd2caa-d022-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=48524772)**

body:
Just in case you missed this |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106574465/541950761/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE473_20250426_ABAttacksKicker_PL&sourceid=1056002&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWNkMmNhYS1kMDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGTi7mtAzuOhjkFcmUlPhZo-CK4CzmSkJ51UjawGJZo=) Peter,

I wanted to make sure you saw this email from my team:

Donald Trump is trying to take away the tools that power this movement. The reports are true — he's taken action against ActBlue, the platform that grassroots donors like you have used for years to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot.

**We know why he's doing it: because he's scared.** | [AND HE SHOULD BE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106574466/541950762/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE473_20250426_ABAttacksKicker_PL&sourceid=1056002&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWNkMmNhYS1kMDIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGTi7mtAzuOhjkFcmUlPhZo-CK4CzmSkJ51UjawGJZo=)

Peter,

You may have seen the reports: Donald Trump just took action against ActBlue, the online donation platform used across the Democratic ecosystem and by countless campaigns and organizations.

Let's be clear: when Trump and his allies lash out, it's not because they're winning. It's because they're afraid.

Afraid of the momentum Democrats are building. Afraid of the women we're helping to elect. Afraid of you — and the grassroots power that's fueling this fight.

As EMILYs List President Jessica Mackler put it:
_"Republicans are poised to lose big in the midterms, so Trump is doing what he does best: distract, create chaos, increase anxiety, and instill fear. But Trump's focus on ActBlue tells us one thing: they fear Democratic power and the countless grassroots donors across the country who are fueling the resistance. They don't want us to fight back, but we won't let their pathetic strategy work. Now's the time to double down, not back away."_
[**We're not backing down. We're not going dark. And we're not letting anyone tell us we can't win. clean_body: Just in case you missed this | = Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw this email from my team: Donald Trump is trying to take away the tools that power this movement. The reports are true — he's taken action against ActBlue, the platform that grassroots donors like you have used for years to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot. We know why he's doing it: because he's scared. | = Scared of what we've built. Scared of the women we're helping to elect. Scared of you — and the millions of people across the country who are ready to fight back. That's why now is the time to dig in , not back off. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With you in the fight, Christen Sparago (they/she) Interim Vice President of Digital, EMILYs List —Original Message— Sent: Thurs., April 24, 2025 From: the EMILYs List Digital Team Trump and his allies don't want us to fight back. They have no idea what they're up against. = Peter, You may have seen the reports: Donald Trump just took action against ActBlue, the online donation platform used across the Democratic ecosystem and by countless campaigns and organizations. Let's be clear: when Trump and his allies lash out, it's not because they're winning. It's because they're afraid. Afraid of the momentum Democrats are building. Afraid of the women we're helping to elect. Afraid of you — and the grassroots power that's fueling this fight. As EMILYs List President Jessica Mackler put it: "Republicans are poised to lose big in the midterms, so Trump is doing what he does best: distract, create chaos, increase anxiety, and instill fear. But Trump's focus on ActBlue tells us one thing: they fear Democratic power and the countless grassroots donors across the country who are fueling the resistance. They don't want us to fight back, but we won't let their pathetic strategy work. Now's the time to double down, not back away." = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Whatever comes next, this movement is ready. Fellow American,

We're OUTRAGED, and you should be too.

Maryland’s radical Senator **Chris Van Hollen** just stooped to an unthinkable low: jetting off to El Salvador to sip margaritas with Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a known MS-13 gang member who's been terrorizing American streets.**This isn't just disgraceful --it's a betrayal of every law-abiding citizen.**

While you're working hard to protect your family, Van Hollen is off in Central America, cozying up to a tattooed thug tied to a brutal cartel known for murder, drug trafficking, and unspeakable violence. Garcia isn't some “misunderstood immigrant”--he’s a stone-cold predator who was rightfully deported under President Trump to keep our communities safe.

But Van Hollen? He thinks he knows better than our brave ICE agents and our Commander-in-Chief.

**Let's be clear:** this isn't about “due process.” It's about pandering to the open-borders mob and coddling criminals--all while spitting in the face of every American who believes in law and order.

Instead of standing with the victims of MS-13's brutality, Van Hollen is posing for photo ops with a gangster in a San Salvador hotel. Margaritas, Chris? _Really?_ Try facing the families torn apart by machetes instead of clinking glasses with their attackers.

We've had ENOUGH of Van Hollen's anti-American antics. He's not just embarrassing Maryland--he's endangering our nation by defending a terrorist over American citizens.

## Man jailed after throwing cat at grandma’s door in ‘angry rage’ over football
A man has been jailed for three years after throwing his grandmother's cat at a door in a drunken rage over a football match. Kieron Thornby, 20, of Western Hill, Sunderland, has also been banned from keeping animals for life after pleading guilty to causing unnecessary suffering to the ginger tabby cat named Teddy Bear. body:
Two options. One choice.
#
Let’s play a quick game of Would You Rather, Peter:
**Option 1:** Would you prefer to vote for a candidate who has received hundreds of thousands of dollars in campaign contributions from the massive corporations responsible for tearing up our country?
**Option 2:** Or would you rather support a candidate who is building a true grassroots movement, with support from tens of thousands of everyday people across the country, just $5 or $15 at a time?
**Heartland Patriots is committed to supporting candidates who align squarely with Option 2.** We want to support real working people who make the decision to run for office for all the right reasons — to stand up to the billionaires and oligarchs actively undermining our democracy, to defend the freedoms that make our country so great, and to actually make lives better for everyday people in their communities.
**[So Peter, will you help us support these candidates during this critical moment in our country by rushing a donation of $10 today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88074?refcode=em20250426-8894&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8894%2E614464%2EBM3ncz)**

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, America just endured four years of everything but worship being welcomed into the White House, but times have changed, and the presence of the Holy Spirit is now welcomed!! Yesterday, I had the honor to lead worship at the White House. It was a powerful time where leaders in America’s government worshiped together and prayed for wisdom to help lead this great nation. | | | | Over the next few days, I’ll share more about how God opened the door, confirmed His plans, and moved powerfully among His people—stay tuned!! body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106575126/541953047/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzVjMWYxOS1kNjIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a9p4LD_3oaHmrx1b-nQMXm0r3ZyOacf3lZ9F647ceW8=&emci=93d61ac3-4c21-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=935c1f19-d622-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=12666102) Yadira’s GOP opponent, Gabe Evans, has gone all-in on Trump and MAGA extremism, Peter. Just look at his track record:

**He voted for a budget resolution that would gut billions in funding from Medicaid and the Children’s Health Insurance Program** – threatening access to healthcare for seniors, children, and people with disabilities.

Nearly _1.3 million_ people across the state rely on these critical programs. But instead of protecting Coloradans’ access to healthcare, Gabe Evans sided with extremists in Congress to give a tax break to billionaires.

_And that’s not all._

**Gabe Evans has stood firmly behind Trump and his tariffs** as they wreak havoc on hard working families struggling to make ends meet. He’s ignored the concerns of Coloradans who know that these policies will only increase prices and make life harder.

**[If you want to fight back against Gabe Evans, protect Coloradans’ healthcare, and defend working families, will you donate now to help Yadira Caraveo hit her end-of-month goal and win back CO-08?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106575127/541953048/2033110592?refcode=email_042625_gabeevans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzVjMWYxOS1kNjIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a9p4LD_3oaHmrx1b-nQMXm0r3ZyOacf3lZ9F647ceW8=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106575128/541953049/2033110592?refcode=email_042625_gabeevans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzVjMWYxOS1kNjIyLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a9p4LD_3oaHmrx1b-nQMXm0r3ZyOacf3lZ9F647ceW8=)

While working as a doctor in Adams County, Yadira saw firsthand how families across the state were struggling to keep up with rising healthcare and costs of living. To fight back and protect hard working Coloradans, she ran for the state legislature and then for Congress.

She took on special interests and Big Pharma, pushed to allow Medicare to lower prices, and worked to address the high cost of living.

Yadira won’t stand by while Gabe Evans strips Coloradans of their healthcare and makes life harder and more expensive for working families. She’s running to win back CO-08 and continue her fight to protect Medicaid and defend Coloradans – _but she can’t do it alone._

**[CO-08 is going to be one of the toughest House races in 2026. If we’re going to win, we need strong grassroots supporters like you to help our campaign reach our first end-of-month goal and flip this seat. name: Katie Porter for Governor
subject: It’d be easier if we did this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39674%2E3422442%2EbPaTJ8)
Dear Derek,
Our April fundraising deadline is coming up, so we’re asking for your help to reach our goal.
We don’t take money from corporations, lobbyists, or executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks. **It would be easier to raise money with these pledges, but that’s not the promise that Katie made to voters.**
We rely on folks like you chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can to power our campaign.
This April milestone is only the second end-of-month target we’ve had since Katie launched her campaign, so we’re firing on all cylinders to raise the resources we need to have a strong foundation to elect Katie as California’s next governor.
**[Can you join our campaign with a donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250426_1_ak?refcode=em20250426-39674&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39674_3422442_bPaTJ8&akid=39674%2E3422442%2EbPaTJ8)**

Thanks,
Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250426-39674&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39674_3422442_bPaTJ8&akid=39674%2E3422442%2EbPaTJ8)**

clean_body: Dear Derek, Our April fundraising deadline is coming up, so we’re asking for your help to reach our goal. We don’t take money from corporations, lobbyists, or executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks. It would be easier to raise money with these pledges, but that’s not the promise that Katie made to voters. We rely on folks like you chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can to power our campaign. This April milestone is only the second end-of-month target we’ve had since Katie launched her campaign, so we’re firing on all cylinders to raise the resources we need to have a strong foundation to elect Katie as California’s next governor. Thanks, Team KP Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

Their hatred for Trump is more important to them than your child’s future. While kids struggle with reading or doing basic math, the Left is flooding classrooms with gender ideology, race-based discipline, and anti-American garbage. body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89465?t=6&akid=19648%2E878179%2EUTCiNQ) [Team, I need to share FIVE reasons why your support is critical to electing Democrats nationwide. If you’re short on time, please split $10 between the Voter Protection Project and the DCCC before the end-of-month fundraising deadline to help us hit our goals and propel Democrats to victory. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89465?t=7&akid=19648%2E878179%2EUTCiNQ)

**FACT #1:** Democrats need to win just THREE seats to flip the House.

**FACT #2:** Republicans will stop at nothing to enact Donald Trump's reckless billionaire-first agenda.

**FACT #3:** Last year, House Democrats defied the Trump wave and SHRUNK the GOP's majority to the narrowest in nearly a century.

**FACT #4:** We’re approaching a major test in our fight to defeat the Trump Trifecta.

**FACT #5:** [Donating $10 (or more if you can!) is the most significant thing you can do right now to help ensure Democrats have the resources to fight back against Republicans. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89465?t=8&akid=19648%2E878179%2EUTCiNQ)

Look, if everyone reading this email today gave just $10 before the end-of-month deadline, we could close our budget gap and have the resources to defeat Republicans nationwide.

**So I’m asking: Can you split $10 between the DCCC and the Voter Protection Project right now to help create undeniable momentum for Democrats, prove the strength of our movement and hand right-wing extremists a devastating setback?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between the DCCC and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89466?t=9&akid=19648%2E878179%2EUTCiNQ)

Thank you,
Hakeem Jeffries

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19648%2E878179%2EUTCiNQ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19648%2E878179%2EUTCiNQ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19648%2E878179%2EUTCiNQ) to request fewer emails. body:
Their theory is simple: it worked in 2021, so it can work again now. And, frankly, they may be right. But it doesn’t have to be.

| Peter,

Do you remember the 2021 election? Do you remember when Republican Glenn Youngkin won and how you felt at that moment?

For months leading up to Election Day, polls showed the race neck-and-neck. It was stressful, and it was tight. Waking up, it felt like every day a new outside Republican group was pouring in money to flip the Governor’s office red. Republicans across Virginia were united as they mobilized.

_**And they succeeded.**_

Now, we’ve got another Governor’s election here in Virginia this year—and Glenn Youngkin is dusting off his 2021 playbook to help his Lt. Governor, Winsome Earle-Sears, follow in his footsteps. Their theory is simple: it worked in 2021, so it can work again now. And, frankly, they may be right. But it doesn’t have to be.

Here at Abigail Spanberger HQ, we’re doing everything we can to stop him. We’re talking to voters nonstop in every community across the Commonwealth. We’re mobilizing volunteers who believe in Abigail’s vision for Virginia and want to help out. And we’re running a campaign that we’re determined to win—no matter how close the polls are or how much outside money Republicans pour in.

But we need your help to make it happen. [_**We're coming up on our April fundraising deadline on Wednesday. Will you chip in $25 today to help power Abigail Spanberger’s campaign to victory this November?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106575544/541954770/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-26_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJmMzhlYmQtZDkyMi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RP_-UulxLEw3BKAam_kQ_5X2ubNTrU_VyFKvMCjn7PE=)

clean_body: Their theory is simple: it worked in 2021, so it can work again now. And, frankly, they may be right. But it doesn’t have to be. | = | Peter, Do you remember the 2021 election? Do you remember when Republican Glenn Youngkin won and how you felt at that moment? For months leading up to Election Day, polls showed the race neck-and-neck. It was stressful, and it was tight. Waking up, it felt like every day a new outside Republican group was pouring in money to flip the Governor’s office red. Republicans across Virginia were united as they mobilized. And they succeeded. Now, we’ve got another Governor’s election here in Virginia this year—and Glenn Youngkin is dusting off his 2021 playbook to help his Lt. Governor, Winsome Earle-Sears, follow in his footsteps. Their theory is simple: it worked in 2021, so it can work again now. And, frankly, they may be right. But it doesn’t have to be. Here at Abigail Spanberger HQ, we’re doing everything we can to stop him. We’re talking to voters nonstop in every community across the Commonwealth. We’re mobilizing volunteers who believe in Abigail’s vision for Virginia and want to help out. And we’re running a campaign that we’re determined to win—no matter how close the polls are or how much outside money Republicans pour in. But we need your help to make it happen. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O.
